label:
采集 汇编 装备
Harvest Compendium Equipment

Hydra Teeth.name: 九头蛇之牙 Hydra Teeth
Hydra Teeth.description:
这颗牙很干净且锋利。这颗牙可以被制作成一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{怪物精准弹药}。

This tooth is clean and sharp. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{Monster Precision Ammunition}.

Skulltaker Skull.name: 夺颅者之颅 Skulltaker Skull
Skulltaker Skull.description:
这颗头骨呈病态的黄色。该头骨可被制作成@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.JKDQng8JUYE49O2R]{死亡防护头盔}。

This skull is a sickly yellow. The skull can be crafted into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.JKDQng8JUYE49O2R]{Helm of Death Protection}.

Unprocessed Sin Spirit (Wrath).name: 未净化的罪灵（愤怒） Unprocessed Sin Spirit (Wrath)
Unprocessed Sin Spirit (Wrath).description:
启动 1 交互

罪孽之灵可能对其目标造成极其不利的效果。确切效果因其采集自哪种罪孽孽种而异。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{吸取 1}和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 1}（2 轮）

Activate 1 Interact

Sin spirit can have incredibly adverse effects on its target. The exact effects vary depending on the sinspawn it was harvested from.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (2 rounds)

Dragonhide.name: 龙皮 Dragonhide
Dragonhide.description:
这种龙皮布满鳞片且坚韧。你可以使用这些皮革片段来制作一套龙皮护甲（核心规则书）或一面龙皮盾牌（核心规则书）。

This dragonhide is scaly and strong. You can use these sections of hide to craft a set of dragonhide armor (Core Rulebook) or a dragonhide shield (Core Rulebook).

Weapon Potency Rune Framework.name: 武器效能符文框架 Weapon Potency Rune Framework
Weapon Potency Rune Framework.description:
此框架概述了安装一枚@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DKWuJb2rSgiotOG7]{武器强能}符文的步骤。当你将强击符文蚀刻到一件武器上时，其价格降低25%。

This framework outlines the steps to install a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DKWuJb2rSgiotOG7]{Weapon Potency} rune. When you etch the striking rune into a weapon, its price is lowered by 25%.

Vampire Blood.name: 吸血鬼（特征） 血液 Vampire Blood
Vampire Blood.description:
启动 1 交互

该血液呈深邃的暗红色。饮用后，你获得快速治疗 5，持续 [[/r 2d3#Rounds of fast healing]] 轮。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.zLliyp9wwjI0tIaF]{效果：吸血鬼（特征）血液}

Activate 1 Interact

The blood is a deep, dark red color. When consumed, you gain fast healing 5 for [[/r 2d3#Rounds of fast healing]] rounds.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.zLliyp9wwjI0tIaF]{Effect: Vampire Blood}

Nightmare Fuel.name: 梦魇燃料 Nightmare Fuel
Nightmare Fuel.description:
这个小瓶里的内容物气体多于液体，会让你充满一种大难临头的感觉。梦魇燃料可用于制作一剂 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.z7eOUqVwyht6tj11]{沉睡酒}、一剂 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.uJkXunwTHwgvyHyP]{无甜之梦}，或一份 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.z2u9VOU2Iva1Y5iI]{梦魇烟雾}。

The contents of this vial are more gas than liquid and fill you with a sense of impending doom. Nightmare fuel can be used to craft a dose of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.z7eOUqVwyht6tj11]{Slumber Wine}, a dose of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.uJkXunwTHwgvyHyP]{Unsweet Dreams}, or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.z2u9VOU2Iva1Y5iI]{Nightmare Smoke}.

High-Grade Alghollthu Rawhide Armor.name: 高等 阿尔古苏 生皮护甲 High-Grade Alghollthu Rawhide Armor
High-Grade Alghollthu Rawhide Armor.description:
采集宝典注记：由于尚不支持自定义材料，此物品代表一件通用的阿尔古苏生皮护甲，以及其自动化规则。你可以编辑其细节和特征以匹配你想要的护甲类型，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{皮甲} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{胸甲}。

穿戴阿尔古苏生皮护甲的角色，在为【逃脱】与【挤身】而进行的特技与运动检定中获得 +2 物品加值。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包含价值至少 60 gp + 每 负载 6 gp 的阿尔古苏生皮。

Harvest Compendium Note: As custom materials are not yet supported, this item represents a generic piece of Alghollthu Rawhide armor, along with its automated rules. You can edit its details and traits to match the type of armor you want, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}.

The wearer of alghollthu rawhide armor has a +2 item bonus to Acrobatics and Athletics checks made to Escape and Squeeze.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include alghollthu rawhide worth at least 60 gp + 6 gp per Bulk.

Ceustodaemon Eyes.name: 刻斯托戴蒙之眼 Ceustodaemon Eyes
Ceustodaemon Eyes.description:
启动 2 交互

这只眼睛很小且呈纯橙色。吞下这只眼睛后，你获得2环@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{See Invisibility}法术的效果。

Activate 2 Interact

The eye is small and pure orange. After consuming the eye, you gain the effects of a 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{See Invisibility} spell.

Expired Documents with Intact Seals.name: 带有完好印章的过期文件 Expired Documents with Intact Seals

Eel Teeth.name: 鳗鱼之牙 Eel Teeth
Eel Teeth.description:
这些牙非常锋利。牙尖可以被制作为一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{怪物精密弹药}。

These teeth are incredibly sharp. A tooth point can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{Monster Precision Ammunition}.

Warg Fangs.name: 座狼獠牙 Warg Fangs
Warg Fangs.description:
这件物品的功能等同于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{枭熊爪}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{狼牙} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{血腥利爪} 护符。你在附加护符时选择其一。

This functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear Claw}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon} talisman. You choose which when you affix the talisman.

Alicorn Staff.name: 天角兽法杖 Alicorn Staff
Alicorn Staff.description:
这根法杖由白橡木制成，顶端镶有一根抛光的完整独角兽角——也被称为alicorn。

启动 施放法术

频率 每日一次

效果 你从法杖中施放一个法术，以一名对你友好的、正在持用一把武器的生物为目标。除该法术的正常效果外，你选择该生物正持用的一把武器，使其获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{Ghost Touch}属性符文的效果，持续1小时。穿戴@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.FNDq4NFSN0g2HKWO]{Handwraps of Mighty Blows}的生物也可以成为此效果的目标。

启动 施放法术

效果 你从法杖中消耗一定数量的充能，以从其列表中施放一个法术。

  • 戏法 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4]{Light}
  • 1环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.QqxwHeYEVylkYjsO]{Detect Poison}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}
  • 2环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}
  • 3环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.SUKaxVZW2TlM8lu0]（仅限毒药）

制作需求 提供所有所列等级的所有所列法术各一次施放，且初始原材料必须包含一根独角兽角

This staff is made of white oak and has a polished, whole unicorn horn—also known as alicorn—as its head.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day

Effect You cast a spell from the staff, targeting a creature that is friendly to you and who is wielding a weapon. Along with the normal effects of the spell, one weapon the creature is wielding of your choice is imbued with the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{Ghost Touch} property rune for 1 hour. A creature wearing @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.FNDq4NFSN0g2HKWO]{Handwraps of Mighty Blows} can also be targeted with this effect.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.

  • Cantrip @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4]{Light}
  • 1st @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.QqxwHeYEVylkYjsO]{Detect Poison}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}
  • 2nd @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}
  • 3rd @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.SUKaxVZW2TlM8lu0] (poison only)

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells, and the initial raw materials must include one unicorn horn

Frost Essence.name: 霜寒精粹 Frost Essence
Frost Essence.description:
这些纯净冰块的白色碎片散发着细微的薄雾。寒霜精华可用于制作一份 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Xnmx6SJ6OkJOfYxF]{冰冻弹药}、一瓶 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.EpxmUtLpCkE8R6KJ]{寒霜瓶}或一瓶 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.mRs24OwmGPjoIDvO]{寒冷抗力药水}。

These white shards of pure ice exude a fine mist. Frost essence can be used to craft a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Xnmx6SJ6OkJOfYxF]{Freezing Ammunition}, a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.EpxmUtLpCkE8R6KJ]{Frost Vial} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.mRs24OwmGPjoIDvO]{Potion of Cold Resistance}.

Standard-Grade Bulette Shellplate Armor.name: 标准级布雷特壳板护甲 Standard-Grade Bulette Shellplate Armor
Standard-Grade Bulette Shellplate Armor.description:
采集汇编注记：由于尚不支持自定义材料，此物品代表一件通用的布蕾特甲壳板护甲，以及其自动化规则。你可以编辑其细节与特征以匹配你想要的护甲类型，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{皮甲} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{胸甲}。

布蕾特甲壳板护甲的穿戴者在进行用于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{跳高} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{跳远} 的运动检定时，获得+2物品加值。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包含价值至少60 gp + 每点负载6 gp 的 mulette 甲壳板护甲。

Harvest Compendium Note: As custom materials are not yet supported, this item represents a generic piece of Bulette Shellplate armor, along with its automated rules. You can edit its details and traits to match the type of armor you want, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}.

The wearer of bulette shellplate armor gains a +2 item bonus to Athletics checks made to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{High Jump} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump}.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include mulette shellplate worth at least 60 gp + 6 gp per Bulk.

Basilisk Gullet Oil.name: 蛇妖嗉囊油 Basilisk Gullet Oil
Basilisk Gullet Oil.description:
启动 2 交互

这种油触摸起来有颗粒感，仿佛里面装满了沙粒。该油可用于涂抹一名被石化的生物，使其立刻恢复为血肉之躯。

Activate 2 Interact

This oil feels grainy when touched, as if filled with grains of sand. The oil can be used to coat a creature that has been petrified, instantly restoring it to flesh.

High-Grade Baomal Shellplate Armor.name: 高等宝蜥壳板护甲 High-Grade Baomal Shellplate Armor
High-Grade Baomal Shellplate Armor.description:
采集宝典注记：由于系统尚不支持自定义材料，该物品代表一件通用的宝玛尔甲壳板护甲，以及其自动化规则。你可以编辑其细节和特征以匹配你想要的护甲类型，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{皮甲} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{胸甲}。

宝玛尔甲壳板护甲的穿戴者获得物理抗力 5。

启动 R 构想

频率 每天一次

触发 你受到物理伤害

效果 由护甲授予的物理抗力在对抗该触发伤害时提高至 15。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.JBD6OcV6tCNwWfgD]{效果：宝玛尔甲壳板护甲}

制作需求 初始原材料包含价值至少 16000 gp + 每 负载 1600 gp 的宝玛尔甲壳板。

Harvest Compendium Note: As custom materials are not yet supported in the system, this item represents a generic piece of Baomal Shellplate armor, along with its automated rules. You can edit its details and traits to match the type of armor you want, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}.

The wearer of baomal shellplate armor has physical resistance 5.

Activate R envision

Frequency once per day

Trigger You take physical damage

Effect The physical resistance granted by the armor increases to 15 against the triggering damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.JBD6OcV6tCNwWfgD]{Effect: Baomal Shellplate Armor}

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials include baomal shellplate worth at least 16000 gp + 1600 gp per Bulk.

Cave Worm Teeth.name: 洞穴蠕虫之牙 Cave Worm Teeth
Cave Worm Teeth.description:
这些牙略微弯曲，且尖端锋利如剃刀。一枚牙可用于制作一把属于匕首武器组的武器。该武器的伤害骰提高：造成1d6伤害而非1d4、造成1d8伤害而非1d6，依此类推（最高至1d12）。它还具有致命特征。制作该武器时，致命伤害骰的骰型比该武器的伤害骰高一级（最高至1d12）。

These teeth curve slightly and have a razor-sharp point. A tooth can be used to craft a weapon from the knife weapon group. This weapon has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4. 1d8 damage instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12). It also has the deadly trait. The size of the deadly damage die is one step higher than the weapon's damage die when it is crafted (to a maximum of 1d12).

Demon Cruor.name: 恶魔血液 Demon Cruor
Demon Cruor.description:
恶魔血液的颜色几乎是纯黑色。这种血液可用于制作一份 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.tcy8xmXlo3bUtHhT]{邪恶涂层油} 或一份 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.TpxNmOa5zZnN2Tzv]{邪恶抗力药水（次级）}

Demon cruor is almost pure black in color. The cruor can be used to craft an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.tcy8xmXlo3bUtHhT]{Oil of Evil Coating} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.TpxNmOa5zZnN2Tzv]{Potion of Evil Resistance (Lesser)}

Cleansing Potion (Lesser).name: 净化药水（次级） Cleansing Potion (Lesser)
Cleansing Potion (Lesser).description:
启动 1 交互

饮用这瓶药水会净化你的身体。如果你正处于 虚弱、反胃、迟缓 或 呆滞（状态）状态之一，你将其中一种状态的值降低 1。你选择该状态

Activate 1 Interact

Drinking this potion cleanses your body. If you are under the enfeebled, sickened, slowed, or stupefied conditions, you reduce the value of one of those conditions by 1. You choose the condition

Unprocessed Drider Venom.name: 未加工的夺心蛛魔毒液 Unprocessed Drider Venom
Unprocessed Drider Venom.description:
启动 2 互动

这种毒液浓稠且拉丝。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:19]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d8[poison]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}（1 轮）。

Activate 2 Interact

This venom is thick and stringy.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:19]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d8[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (1 round).

Guildmaster's Uniform.name: 会长制服 Guildmaster's Uniform
Guildmaster's Uniform.description:
这套服装的功能等同于一套@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{皮甲}。穿着它时，你在将自己伪装成公会会长时进行的欺瞒检定获得+1物品加值。

This outfit functions as a set of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor}. While wearing it, you gain a +1 item bonus to Deception checks made to present yourself as a guildmaster.

Pegasus Tail Hair.name: 飞马尾鬃毛 Pegasus Tail Hair
Pegasus Tail Hair.description:
这些毛簇可用于制作一枚@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.n5L7HE9H8jn8ftQy]{Climbing Bolt}或一条@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.G4cmHHhAChAlypFN]{Rope of Climbing}。若在制作陷阱时作为额外组件使用，则所需原材料的总成本降低10%。每个陷阱只能以此方式使用一簇尾毛。

These tufts of hair can be used to craft a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.n5L7HE9H8jn8ftQy]{Climbing Bolt} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.G4cmHHhAChAlypFN]{Rope of Climbing}. If used as an additional component when crafting a snare, the cost of the total required raw materials is lowered by 10%. Only one tuft of tail hair can be used in this manner per snare.

Astradaemon Hide.name: 阿斯特拉恶魔皮革 Astradaemon Hide
Astradaemon Hide.description:
这张皮革呈亮蓝色和红色，并带有淡淡的橙色光芒。这张皮革可以被制作成一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.iu7sKCQWfwZVOnDM]{移位斗篷}。

This hide is bright blue and red, and has a faint orange glow. The hide can be crafted into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.iu7sKCQWfwZVOnDM]{Displacement Cloak}.

Bloody Wemmuth Sap.name: 血腥温姆斯树液 Bloody Wemmuth Sap
Bloody Wemmuth Sap.description:
这种树液有甜美的气味。这种树液可用于制作一瓶@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.hDLbR56Id2OtU318]{生命药剂}或一瓶@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.2RuepCemJhrpKKao]{治疗药水}。

This sap has a sweet scent. The sap can be used to craft an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.hDLbR56Id2OtU318]{Elixir of Life} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.2RuepCemJhrpKKao]{Healing Potion}.

Kraken Blood.name: 海怪血液 Kraken Blood
Kraken Blood.description:
这种血液在小瓶中呈蓝色，暴露在空气中超过一分钟后会变成红色。该血液可用于制作 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.zcJgT5RS8p2MEbOB]{Sea Touch Elixir (Lesser)} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Eb4dEuV22QVlMumS]{Potion of Swimming}。

This blood appears blue in its vial and turns red when exposed to air for longer than a minute. The blood can be used to craft a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.zcJgT5RS8p2MEbOB]{Sea Touch Elixir (Lesser)} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Eb4dEuV22QVlMumS]{Potion of Swimming}.

Quetzalcoatlus Talons.name: 风神翼龙之爪 Quetzalcoatlus Talons
Quetzalcoatlus Talons.description:
这件物品的功能等同于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear 爪}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon}护符。你在附着护符时选择其中一种。

This functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear Claw}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon} talisman. You choose which when you affix the talisman.

Low-Grade Faerie Dragonhide Armor.name: 低级精灵龙皮护甲 Low-Grade Faerie Dragonhide Armor
Low-Grade Faerie Dragonhide Armor.description:
采集宝典注记：由于自定义材料尚未受支持，此物品代表一件通用的小仙龙生皮护甲，以及其自动化规则。你可以编辑其细节与特征，使之匹配你想要的护甲类型，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}。

小仙龙皮护甲闪烁着虹彩般的色泽。

启动 2 构想

频率 每天一次

效果 你变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}，如同受到一道2环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} 法术影响。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包含至少价值 70 sp + 每负载 7 sp 的小仙龙皮。

Harvest Compendium Note: As custom materials are not yet supported, this item represents a generic piece of Faerie Dragon Rawhide armor, along with its automated rules. You can edit its details and traits to match the type of armor you want, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}.

Faerie dragonhide armor shimmers in iridescent colors.

Activate 2 envision

Frequency once per day

Effect You turn @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} as if by a 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} spell.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include faerie dragonhide worth at least 70 sp + 7 sp per Bulk.

Skeletal Lore Necklace.name: 骷髅学识项链 Skeletal Lore Necklace
Skeletal Lore Necklace.description:
佩戴时，你可以汲取构成这条项链的骨骼所属生物的记忆。这使你获得骷髅学识（技能）的受训熟练度。此外，你可以说并理解所有构成该项链的骨骼所属生物所知的语言。GM决定这些骨骼所赋予的语言。

While worn, you can tap into the memories of the creatures whose bones make up this necklace. This grants you trained proficiency in the Skeletal Lore skill. In addition, you can speak and understand all the languages known by the creatures whose bones make up the necklace. The GM decides the languages granted by the bones.

Arboreal Sap.name: 树液 Arboreal Sap
Arboreal Sap.description:
这种树液带有甜美的气味。这种树液可用于制作一瓶@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.hDLbR56Id2OtU318]{生命灵药}或一瓶@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.2RuepCemJhrpKKao]{治疗药水}。

This sap has a sweet scent. The sap can be used to craft an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.hDLbR56Id2OtU318]{Elixir of Life} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.2RuepCemJhrpKKao]{Healing Potion}.

Shemhazian Pincher Points.name: 舍姆哈齐安钳夹点 Shemhazian Pincher Points
Shemhazian Pincher Points.description:
这个钳刺尖端非常锋利。钳刺尖端可以用于制作一把来自长矛武器组的武器。该武器上蚀刻有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.KCQRFvUgbyclvOGi]{Striking (Greater)} 符文。该武器的伤害骰增加，将造成1d6伤害而非1d4；1d8伤害而非1d6，以此类推（最高至1d12）。如果该武器尚未具有擒拿（武器特征），它也会获得该擒拿（武器特征）。

This pincher point is very sharp. A pincher point can be used to craft a weapon from the spear weapon group. The weapon has a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.KCQRFvUgbyclvOGi]{Striking (Greater)} rune etched into it. This weapon has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4. 1d8 damage instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12). It also has the grapple weapon trait if it doesn't already.

Standard-Grade Alghollthu Rawhide Armor.name: 标准级阿尔古苏生皮护甲 Standard-Grade Alghollthu Rawhide Armor
Standard-Grade Alghollthu Rawhide Armor.description:
采集宝典注记：由于尚不支持自定义材料，本物品代表一件通用的阿尔古苏生皮护甲，以及其自动化规则。你可以编辑其细节与特征，使之匹配你想要的护甲类型，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{皮甲} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{胸甲}。

穿戴阿尔古苏生皮护甲者，在进行用于“逃脱”和“挤压”的特技与运动检定时，获得+2物品加值。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包含价值至少60 gp + 每负载6 gp的阿尔古苏生皮。

Harvest Compendium Note: As custom materials are not yet supported, this item represents a generic piece of Alghollthu Rawhide armor, along with its automated rules. You can edit its details and traits to match the type of armor you want, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}.

The wearer of alghollthu rawhide armor has a +2 item bonus to Acrobatics and Athletics checks made to Escape and Squeeze.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include alghollthu rawhide worth at least 60 gp + 6 gp per Bulk.

Spirit Cloth.name: 灵布 Spirit Cloth
Spirit Cloth.description:
这种半透明织物轻如空气。它可以用来制作一个 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.jaEEvuQ32GjAa8jy]{宽敞袋}。

This translucent fabric is light as air. It can be used to craft a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.jaEEvuQ32GjAa8jy]{Spacious Pouch}.

Undead Bone Dust.name: 不死生物骨粉 Undead Bone Dust
Undead Bone Dust.description:
这种粉末呈黄白色。不死生物的骨头可用于制作 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.SyOFseGlGhDD67C1]{救生之尘} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.jCquE204kIbIMvV2]{法术精华}。

This dust is a yellowish white. Undead bone can be used to craft @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.SyOFseGlGhDD67C1]{Dust of Lifeguarding} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.jCquE204kIbIMvV2]{Spell Essence}.

Mummy Gauze Strips.name: 木乃伊（特征）裹布条 Mummy Gauze Strips
Mummy Gauze Strips.description:
启动 F 操控

触发 你施放一个需要你为火焰伤害掷骰的法术。

这块纱布异常干燥。当你启动它并为该法术掷骰伤害时，你为火焰伤害额外掷1个伤害骰。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.JtFhqtRTkl1KXsiT]{效果：额外火焰伤害}

Activate F manipulate

Trigger You cast a spell that requires you to roll for fire damage.

This gauze is incredibly dry. When you activate it and roll damage for the spell, you roll 1 additional die of fire damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.JtFhqtRTkl1KXsiT]{Effect: Additional Fire Damage}

Giant's Name Rune.name: 巨人之名符文 Giant's Name Rune
Giant's Name Rune.description:
启动 F 构想

触发 你用镶附的武器成功打击一个生物

需求 你受训于运动。

此符文承载着一位强大巨人的名号。当你启动该符文时，你对该生物造成等同于你力量调整值的额外伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.h8LKKG7idFfdDANo]{效果：巨人之名符文}

Activate F envision

Trigger You successfully Strike a creature with the affixed weapon

Requirements You are trained in Athletics.

This rune carries the name of a mighty giant. When you activate the rune, you deal additional damage to the creature equal to your Strength modifier.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.h8LKKG7idFfdDANo]{Effect: Giant's Name Rune}

Dragon Teeth (Silver or White).name: 龙牙（银色或白色） Dragon Teeth (Silver or White)
Dragon Teeth (Silver or White).description:
这颗牙带有火焰、寒霜或与其采集自的巨龙相匹配的另一种元素的痕迹。这颗牙可以被制作成一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.XBsoiD7Q2qdsxU5h]{龙族弹药（银色或白色）}

This tooth has traces of fire, frost, or another element matching the dragon it was harvested from. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.XBsoiD7Q2qdsxU5h]{Draconic Ammunition (Silver or White)}

Reflecting Eyes.name: 反射之眼 Reflecting Eyes
Reflecting Eyes.description:
这只眼睛会反射光线。一只眼睛可以用于制作一瓶 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.88pGCHV0uKMskTVO]{黑暗视觉药剂}。

This eye reflects light. An eye can be used to craft a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.88pGCHV0uKMskTVO]{Darkvision Elixir}.

Gargoyle Teeth.name: 石像鬼之牙 Gargoyle Teeth
Gargoyle Teeth.description:
这颗牙很干净且锋利。这颗牙可以被制作成一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{怪物精确弹药}。

This tooth is clean and sharp. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{Monster Precision Ammunition}.

Wendigo Antlers.name: 温迪戈鹿角 Wendigo Antlers
Wendigo Antlers.description:
这只鹿角很长、很锋利，而且不知为何仍然湿润。鹿角可以用于制作一把造成穿刺伤害的近战武器。该武器上蚀刻有一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.KCQRFvUgbyclvOGi]{Striking (Greater)}符文。该武器的伤害骰也有所提升，造成1d6伤害而非1d4、1d8而非1d6，依此类推（最高至1d12）。

This antler is long, sharp, and somehow still wet. An antler can be used to craft a melee weapon that deals piercing damage. The weapon has a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.KCQRFvUgbyclvOGi]{Striking (Greater)} rune etched into it. This weapon also has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4, 1d8 instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12).

Bloody Talon.name: 血腥之爪 Bloody Talon
Bloody Talon.description:
启动 F 想象

触发 你用所附着的武器成功打击一名能够流血且尚未受到伤害的生物。

这只爪饰有红色符号。有时，这只爪会被换成合适的牙或爪。当你启动这只爪时，你对该生物造成额外1d4点持续流血伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.5uIZ76UAJO8PtNgV]{效果: 血腥之爪}

Activate F envision

Trigger You successfully Strike a creature with the affixed weapon that can bleed and hasn’t taken damage.

This talon is decorated with red symbols. Sometimes, the talon is exchanged for a suitable tooth or claw. When you activate the talon, you deal an additional 1d4 persistent bleed damage to the creature.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.5uIZ76UAJO8PtNgV]{Effect: Bloody Talon}

Octupus Ink.name: 章鱼墨汁 Octupus Ink
Octupus Ink.description:
启动 1 互动

这种墨水漆黑如夜，且只能在水下启动。当你打开小瓶时，墨水充满以你为中心的 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20]。云雾内的生物处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未察觉} 状态，并且无法使用它们的嗅觉。墨水持续 1 分钟，或直到被强水流驱散

Activate 1 Interact

This ink is pitch black and can only be activated underwater. When you open the vial, the ink fills a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] centered on you. Creatures inside the cloud are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} and can’t use their sense of smell. The ink lasts for 1 minute or until dispersed by a strong current

Unprocessed Pit Fiend Venom.name: 未加工的坑魔毒液 Unprocessed Pit Fiend Venom
Unprocessed Pit Fiend Venom.description:
启动 2 交互

这种毒液效力极强且极为罕见。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:38]

最大持续时间 10轮

阶段 1 @Damage[6d6[poison]] 伤害和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 1}（1轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[7d6[poison]] 伤害和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 2}（1轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[8d6[poison]] 伤害和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 3}（1轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This venom is highly potent and extremely rare.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:38]

Maximum Duration 10 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[6d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[7d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[8d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 3} (1 round)

Radiant Tongue.name: 辉光之舌 Radiant Tongue
Radiant Tongue.description:
启动 1 交互

这条舌头呈现金色光泽。食用这条舌头后，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.SwUiVavHKMWG7t5K] 法术的效果，持续1小时。

Activate 1 Interact

The tongue has a golden hue. After consuming this tongue, you gain the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.SwUiVavHKMWG7t5K] spell for 1 hour.

Distilled Daemon Pestilence.name: 蒸馏恶魔瘟疫 Distilled Daemon Pestilence
Distilled Daemon Pestilence.description:
启动 2 交互

蒸馏后的恶魔瘟疫能影响一名生物数日，并最终导致死亡。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:25]

阶段 1 携带者，无效果（1周）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 1}（1周）

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 2}（1周）

阶段 4 Drain 2（1周）

阶段 5 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 3}（1周）

阶段 6 死亡

Activate 2 Interact

Distilled daemonic pestilence can affect a creature for several days and eventually cause death.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:25]

Stage 1 carrier with no effects (1 week)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (1 week)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} (1 week)

Stage 4 drained 2 (1 week)

Stage 5 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 3} (1 week)

Stage 6 death

Ooze Goo (Lesser).name: 软泥黏胶（次级） Ooze Goo (Lesser)
Ooze Goo (Lesser).description:
启动 1 打击

这种黏液是一种强力腐蚀剂。软泥怪黏液的功能等同于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.M1k5QQc1qQLxzyCK]{酸液瓶（次级）}。

 

Activate 1 Strike

This goo is a strong corrosive. The ooze goo functions as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.M1k5QQc1qQLxzyCK]{Acid Flask (Lesser)}.

Poracha Eyes.name: 波拉查之眼 Poracha Eyes
Poracha Eyes.description:
启动 1 交互

这只眼睛会发出明亮的蓝光。吞下这只眼睛后，你会立刻将自己以及你所穿戴或携带的任何物品从你当前的空间传送到你在40英尺内能看到的一处空的空间。

Activate 1 Interact

This eye glows bright blue. After consuming this eye, you instantly teleport yourself and any items you're wearing or carrying from your current space to an empty space you can see within 40 feet.

Giant Wasp Stinger.name: 巨型黄蜂毒刺 Giant Wasp Stinger
Giant Wasp Stinger.description:
这根毒刺上有微小的倒钩。毒刺可以被制作成一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.DBe6zma7g7Gz6YH8]{动物精准弹药}。

This stinger has microscopic bars on it. A stinger can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.DBe6zma7g7Gz6YH8]{Animal Precision Ammunition}.

Minotaur Nose Ring.name: 牛头人鼻环 Minotaur Nose Ring
Minotaur Nose Ring.description:
这枚戒指蕴含着强大牛头怪的部分力量。佩戴这枚戒指时，你可以选择要体现牛头怪的哪种性相。在你的每日准备期间，你选择获得+2物品加值以避免迷路并找到方向，或获得+2物品加值用于进行【挫败】的威吓检定。所选的增益持续到你的下一次每日准备。

This ring carries some of the power of the mighty minotaur. While wearing this ring, you can choose which aspect of the minotaur to embody. During your daily preparations, you choose whether you gain a +2 item bonus to avoid becoming lost and to find your way, or a +2 item bonus to Intimidation checks made to Demoralize. The chosen benefit lasts until your next daily preparations.

Returning Rune Framework.name: 回返符文框架 Returning Rune Framework
Returning Rune Framework.description:
此框架概述了安装 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qlunQzfnzPQpMG6U]{回归} 符文的步骤。当你将强击符文蚀刻进一把武器时，其价格降低25%。

This framework outlines the steps to install a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qlunQzfnzPQpMG6U]{Returning} rune. When you etch the striking rune into a weapon, its price is lowered by 25%.

Roc Feathers.name: 洛克鸟羽毛 Roc Feathers
Roc Feathers.description:
这些羽毛可用于制作一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.96Vbld5r0bbEUFJ1]{远程弹药} 或一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.cJKQ5uwGQhilXq8G]{幸运羽毛}。

These feathers can be used to craft a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.96Vbld5r0bbEUFJ1]{Long-Range Ammunition} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.cJKQ5uwGQhilXq8G]{Lucky Feather}.

Serving Platter.name: 餐盘 Serving Platter
Serving Platter.description:
这个托盘的作用如同@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.1k3AsSW7lpU0kEpY]{圆盾}，但需要一只手持握。

This platter functions like a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.1k3AsSW7lpU0kEpY]{Buckler} but requires one hand to hold.

Alghollthu Master Tentacles.name: 阿尔古苏主宰触手 Alghollthu Master Tentacles
Alghollthu Master Tentacles.description:
这些触须蜷曲并抽动，仿佛它们有自己的意识。触须可用于制作一把来自链枷武器组的武器。该武器上蚀刻有一枚@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DKWuJb2rSgiotOG7]{武器强度（+1）}符文，并且如果它原本没有，则获得擒拿（武器特征）武器特征。

These tentacles curl and twitch, as though they have a mind of their own. A tentacle can be used to craft a weapon from the flail weapon group. The weapon has a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DKWuJb2rSgiotOG7]{Weapon Potency (+1)} rune etched into it, and it has the grapple weapon trait if it doesn't already.

Dust of Lifeguarding (Greater).name: 救生尘（强效） Dust of Lifeguarding (Greater)
Dust of Lifeguarding (Greater).description:
启动 1 交互

将这把粉尘洒在自己身上可守护你免于死亡。使用这把粉尘后，你在1小时内对抗死亡效果、毒药和疾病获得+5物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.0rfy4aT2RIVTKwUC]{效果：护命之尘（强效）}

Activate 1 Interact

Sprinkling this dust over yourself guards you against death. After using this dust, you gain a +5 item bonus against death effects, poison, and disease for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.0rfy4aT2RIVTKwUC]{Effect: Dust of Lifeguarding (Greater)}

Oil of Fire Coating.name: 火焰涂层油 Oil of Fire Coating
Oil of Fire Coating.description:
启动 1 互动

这种油闪耀着火焰的热与光。这种油可以涂抹在一把由金属制成的近战武器上，或涂抹在五发弹药上。持续1分钟，该武器或弹药在命中时造成额外的1d6火焰伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Bd4SdYpQkdU8ijE4]{效果：火焰涂层油}

Activate 1 Interact

This oil glows with the heat and light of flame. The oil can be applied to a melee weapon made of metal or to five pieces of ammunition. For 1 minute, the weapon or ammunition deals an additional 1d6 fire damage on a hit.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Bd4SdYpQkdU8ijE4]{Effect: Oil of Fire Coating}

Dragon Blood (Wyrm).name: 巨龙血液（巨龙） Dragon Blood (Wyrm)
Dragon Blood (Wyrm).description:
这种血液十分黏稠，并带有刺鼻的气味。根据采集血液的巨龙种类，这种血液可用于制作一瓶巨龙之息药水。

巨龙类型 药水
黑龙或铜龙 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.LR7Ke2V8vHjQYBni]{Black Dragon's Breath Potion (Wyrm)}
蓝龙或黄铜龙 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.idtIMGkFmIe958Et]{Brass Dragon's Breath Potion (Wyrm)}
黄铜龙、金龙或红龙 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.d2sU6nOtBdIVJMVI]{Red Dragon's Breath Potion (Wyrm)}
绿龙 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.OJvCWeJPHEc7GpFG]{Green Dragon's Breath Potion (Wyrm)}
银龙或白龙 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.PW3H8TnouiLaTC8G]{Silver Dragon's Breath Potion (Wyrm)}

 

This blood is thick and has a sharp smell. This blood can be used to craft a Wyrm's Breath Potion, depending on the type of dragon the blood was harvested from.

Dragon Type Potion
Black or Copper @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.LR7Ke2V8vHjQYBni]{Black Dragon's Breath Potion (Wyrm)}
Blue or Brass @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.idtIMGkFmIe958Et]{Brass Dragon's Breath Potion (Wyrm)}
Brass, gold, or red @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.d2sU6nOtBdIVJMVI]{Red Dragon's Breath Potion (Wyrm)}
Green @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.OJvCWeJPHEc7GpFG]{Green Dragon's Breath Potion (Wyrm)}
Silver or white @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.PW3H8TnouiLaTC8G]{Silver Dragon's Breath Potion (Wyrm)}

Dragon Fangs (Brass, Gold, or Red).name: 龙之獠牙（黄铜、黄金或红） Dragon Fangs (Brass, Gold, or Red)
Dragon Fangs (Brass, Gold, or Red).description:
这根尖牙接触时很烫。尖牙可用于制作一件造成穿刺伤害的武器。该武器是一把+1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.XszNvxnymWYRaoTp]{Flaming}武器。该武器的伤害骰也会提高，造成 1d6 伤害而非 1d4，1d8 而非 1d6，依此类推（最大至 1d12）。

This fang is hot to the touch. A fang can be used to craft a weapon that deals piercing damage. The weapon is a +1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.XszNvxnymWYRaoTp]{Flaming} weapon. This weapon also has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4, 1d8 instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12).

Book on Law and Rhetoric.name: 法律与修辞学之书 Book on Law and Rhetoric
Book on Law and Rhetoric.description:
如果你在尝试回忆知识以了解所述地区的法律时查阅本书，你在该次掷骰中获得+1物品加值。

此外，如果你花费1小时研读本书，你会洞悉当地上层社会使用的修辞方式。你对当地贵族与上层阶级市民进行的基于魅力的检定获得+2物品加值。该加值持续的小时数等于你的智力调整值（最低为1）。

If you consult this book while trying to Recall Knowledge about the laws of the described region, you gain a +1 item bonus to the roll.

In addition, if you spend 1 hour studying the book, you gain an insight into the rhetoric employed among the upper echelons of local society. You gain a +2 item bonus to Charisma-based checks against local nobles and upper-class citizens. This bonus lasts for a number of hours equal to your Intelligence modifier (minimum of 1).

Archon Ichor.name: 天使灵体液 Archon Ichor
Archon Ichor.description:
启动 F 操控

触发 你施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{Translocate}，且你在上一轮内见过另一名生物施放过Translocate。

这种灵液看起来像血液，但没有气味。当你启动这份灵液时，假设你的Translocate距离足够，你会出现在与该生物相同的距离与方向上，就如同你们任意一方使用Translocate之前那样。

Activate F manipulate

Trigger You cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{Translocate} and you have seen another creature cast Translocate within the last round.

This ichor looks like blood but it has no smell. When you activate the ichor, assuming your Translocate has enough distance, you appear the same distance and direction from the creature as before either of you used Translocate.

Dragon Fangs (Silver or White).name: 龙牙（银色或白色） Dragon Fangs (Silver or White)
Dragon Fangs (Silver or White).description:
这枚尖牙覆着霜晶。尖牙可用于制作一把造成穿刺伤害的武器。该武器是一把+1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.M5M1WJ5KzbYfRGsY]{Frost}武器。该武器的伤害骰也会提高一级，造成1d6伤害而非1d4，1d8而非1d6，依此类推（最多提高至1d12）。

This fang is covered in rime. A fang can be used to craft a weapon that deals piercing damage. The weapon is a +1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.M5M1WJ5KzbYfRGsY]{Frost} weapon. This weapon also has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4, 1d8 instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12).

Wendigo Pelt.name: 温迪戈皮毛 Wendigo Pelt
Wendigo Pelt.description:
这张毛皮又粗糙又薄。这张毛皮可用于制作一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.P76bJdzgkzBBSeTH]{冬季斗篷}。

This pelt is scraggly and thin. The pelt can be used to craft a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.P76bJdzgkzBBSeTH]{Winter Cloak}.

Mantle of Undetection.name: 反侦测斗篷 Mantle of Undetection
Mantle of Undetection.description:
这件斗篷使其穿戴者能够保持无法被侦测。

启动 R 构想

频率 每小时一次

触发 一次侦测、显露或探知类的预言法术试图以你为目标或了解你的信息

效果 你尝试使用你的隐匿调整值作为你的反制调整值，以反制该效果。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包含两段海蛇的鳍。

This mantle allows its wearer to remain undetectable.

Activate R envision

Frequency once per hour

Trigger A detection, revelation, or scrying divination attempts to target or learn about you

Effect You try to counteract the effect using your Stealth modifier as your counteract modifier.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include two sections of sea serpent in.

Iron Boots.name: 铁靴 Iron Boots
Iron Boots.description:
这双铁靴沉重而结实。它们可以卖给收藏家，也可以直接当作废铁出售。

These iron boots are heavy and solid. They can be sold to collectors, or simply as scrap.

Ancient Dragon Fangs (Silver or White).name: 远古巨龙獠牙（银或白） Ancient Dragon Fangs (Silver or White)
Ancient Dragon Fangs (Silver or White).description:
这枚獠牙覆着霜纹。獠牙可用于制作一把造成穿刺伤害的武器。该武器是一把+1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Sexud7FdxIrg50vU]{Frost (Greater)} 武器。该武器的伤害骰也会提升，造成1d6伤害而非1d4、1d8而非1d6，依此类推（最高至1d12）。

This fang is covered in rime. A fang can be used to craft a weapon that deals piercing damage. The weapon is a +1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Sexud7FdxIrg50vU]{Frost (Greater)} weapon. This weapon also has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4, 1d8 instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12).

Mu Spore Teeth.name: 木孢子之牙 Mu Spore Teeth
Mu Spore Teeth.description:
启动 F 想象

触发 你用固定的武器成功打击一名生物。

这颗牙呈黄色，并带有酸臭味。当你启动这颗牙时，你的打击额外造成2d6精准伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.hlc6JGoF1JFpmZbC]{效果：穆孢子牙}

Activate F envision

Trigger You successfully Strike a creature with the affixed weapon.

This tooth is yellow and has a sour smell. When you activate the tooth, your Strike deals an additional 2d6 precision damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.hlc6JGoF1JFpmZbC]{Effect: Mu Spore Teeth}

Protean Heart.name: 万变之心 Protean Heart
Protean Heart.description:
启动 1 交互

这颗心呈三角形，且具有美丽的棱彩光泽。吞食这颗心后，你获得4环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.aqRYNoSvxsVfqglH]{Unfettered Movement} 法术的效果，持续10分钟。

Activate 1 Interact

This heart is in the shape of a triangle and beautifully prismatic. After consuming this heart, you gain the effects of a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.aqRYNoSvxsVfqglH]{Unfettered Movement} spell for 10 minutes.

Giant Clan Amulet.name: 巨人氏族护符 Giant Clan Amulet
Giant Clan Amulet.description:
这些护身符对历史学家和收藏家来说很有价值。

These amulets are valuable to historians and collectors.

Monster Teeth.name: 怪物牙齿 Monster Teeth
Monster Teeth.description:
这些牙非常锋利。一颗牙可以被制作成一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{怪物精准弹药}。

These teeth are incredibly sharp. A tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{Monster Precision Ammunition}.

Tiefling Spellbook.name: 提夫林法术书 Tiefling Spellbook
Tiefling Spellbook.description:
这本法术书里爬满了法术。它包含以下法术：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.mAMEt4FFbdqoRnkN]，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.vLA0q0WOK2YPuJs6]，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.2ZdHjnpEQJuqOYSG]，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.TVKNbcgTee19PXZR]。

This spellbook has spells crawled inside it. It contains the following spells: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.mAMEt4FFbdqoRnkN], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.vLA0q0WOK2YPuJs6], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.2ZdHjnpEQJuqOYSG], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM], and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.TVKNbcgTee19PXZR].

Shambler Vines.name: 蹒跚藤蔓 Shambler Vines
Shambler Vines.description:
这根藤蔓柔韧且富有弹性。这些藤蔓可用于制作一枚@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.n5L7HE9H8jn8ftQy]{攀爬栓}或一条@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.G4cmHHhAChAlypFN]{攀爬绳索}

This vine is supple and flexible. The vines can be used to craft a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.n5L7HE9H8jn8ftQy]{Climbing Bolt} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.G4cmHHhAChAlypFN]{Rope of Climbing}

Faded Aeon Stone.name: 褪色的永恒石 Faded Aeon Stone
Faded Aeon Stone.description:
这颗宝石可能会被误认为是一块普通石头，只是它略微透明。褪色的永恒石可以用于制作一颗永恒石（核心规则书）。

This gemstone could be mistaken for an ordinary rock, except it's slightly transparent. The faded aeon stone can be used to craft an aeon stone (Core Rulebook).

Unprocessed Tarn Linnorm Venom.name: 未加工的灰斑亚龙毒液 Unprocessed Tarn Linnorm Venom
Unprocessed Tarn Linnorm Venom.description:
启动 2 交互

这种毒液有一股刺鼻的气味。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:38]

最大持续时间 10 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[7d6[acid]] 伤害并且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[11d6[acid]] 伤害并且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 2}（1 轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This venom has an acrid smell.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:38]

Maximum Duration 10 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[7d6[acid]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[11d6[acid]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} (1 round)

Abominable Missives of the Atrophied.name: 萎缩者的可憎信函 Abominable Missives of the Atrophied
Abominable Missives of the Atrophied.description:
这本法术书里爬满了法术。它包含以下法术：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl]、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.8ViwItUgwT4lOvvb]、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.J7Y7tl0bbdz7TcCc]、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.IxhGEKl63R4QBvkj]、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.DYdvMZ8G2LiSLVWw]，以及@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.N1Z1oLPdBxaSgrEE]。

This spellbook has spells crawled inside it. It contains the following spells: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.8ViwItUgwT4lOvvb], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.J7Y7tl0bbdz7TcCc], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.IxhGEKl63R4QBvkj], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.DYdvMZ8G2LiSLVWw], and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.N1Z1oLPdBxaSgrEE].

Golden Roc Feathers.name: 金色巨鹏羽毛 Golden Roc Feathers
Golden Roc Feathers.description:
尽管实际上并不是由黄金制成，这些巨大的羽毛在某些市场中备受追捧。

Though not actually made of gold, these huge feathers are highly sought-after in certain markets.

Rakshasa Hand.name: 罗刹之手 Rakshasa Hand
Rakshasa Hand.description:
启动 2 交互

这只手以反向固定在其手腕上。当你启动这只手时，你会折断一根手指，并施放一个3环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.KHnhPHL4x1AQHfbC]{心灵阅读} 法术，使用你的施法者能力且不消耗法术位。你必须是秘法施法者才能以这种方式使用该部件，并且拥有相应环阶的法术位，但你不需要已知该法术或将其准备。收获时，一只手有[[/r 1d4#未折断的手指]]根未折断的手指。

Activate 2 Interact

This hand is affixed in reverse to its wrist. When you activate the hand, you break a finger and cast a 3rd-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.KHnhPHL4x1AQHfbC]{Mind Reading} spell, using your spellcasting ability and without expending a spell slot. You must be an occult spellcaster to use the component in this way and have a spell slot of the appropriate rank, but you do not need to know the spell or have it prepared. A hand has [[/r 1d4#Unbroken fingers]] unbroken fingers when harvested.

Standard-Grade Cave Worm Rawhide Armor.name: 标准级洞穴蠕虫生皮护甲 Standard-Grade Cave Worm Rawhide Armor
Standard-Grade Cave Worm Rawhide Armor.description:
采集宝典注记：由于自定义材料尚未受支持，该物品代表一件通用的洞穴蠕虫生皮护甲，以及其自动化规则。你可以编辑其细节与特征以匹配你想要的护甲类型，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{皮甲}或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{胸甲}。

启动 F 构想

频率 每小时一次

触发 你在你的回合结束时具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑（状态）}状态之一

效果 当你启动该护甲时，你结束一个正在影响你的状态。该状态必须是麻痹、迟缓或震慑。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包括价值至少250 gp + 每点负载25 gp的洞穴蠕虫生皮。

Harvest Compendium Note: As custom materials are not yet supported, this item represents a generic piece of Cave Worm Rawhide armor, along with its automated rules. You can edit its details and traits to match the type of armor you want, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}.

Activate F envision

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You end your turn with either the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} condition

Effect When you activate this armor, you end one condition that is affecting you. The condition must be either paralyzed, slowed, or stunned.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include cave worm rawhide worth at least 250 gp + 25 gp per Bulk.

Toxic (Greater).name: 剧毒（强效） Toxic (Greater)
Toxic (Greater).description:
这把武器会产生稳定的毒药涓流。该武器在一次成功的打击时额外造成 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害。在一次重击时，除非目标在一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:34] 中成功，否则目标还会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}，直到其下个回合结束

The weapon produces as steady trickle of poison. The weapon deals an additional @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage on a successful Strike. On a critical hit, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} until the end of its next turn unless it succeeds at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:34]

Mammoth Tusk Tips.name: 猛犸獠牙尖端 Mammoth Tusk Tips
Mammoth Tusk Tips.description:
这根猛犸象牙尖沉重且破损。一根象牙可用于制作一件属于棍棒或锤类武器组的武器。该武器上刻有一枚 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DxCuJKynlnMQZHgp]{Striking} 符文。该武器的伤害骰也有所提高，造成 1d6 而非 1d4、1d8 而非 1d6，依此类推（最高至 1d12）。

This mammoth tusk tip is heavy and damaged. A tusk can be used to craft a weapon from the club or hammer weapon groups. The weapon has a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DxCuJKynlnMQZHgp]{Striking} rune etched into it. This weapon also has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 instead of 1d4, 1d8 instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12).

Leshy Sap.name: 莱希树液 Leshy Sap
Leshy Sap.description:
这种树汁带有甜甜的气味。这种树汁可以用来制作一份@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.hDLbR56Id2OtU318]{生命灵药}或一份@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.2RuepCemJhrpKKao]{治疗药水}。

This sap has a sweet scent. The sap can be used to craft an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.hDLbR56Id2OtU318]{Elixir of Life} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.2RuepCemJhrpKKao]{Healing Potion}.

Standard-Grade Remorhaz Rawhide Armor.name: 标准级雷莫拉兹生皮护甲 Standard-Grade Remorhaz Rawhide Armor
Standard-Grade Remorhaz Rawhide Armor.description:
采集宝典注记：由于自定义材料尚未受支持，此物品代表一件通用的雷莫拉兹生皮护甲，以及其自动化规则。你可以编辑其细节与特征以匹配你想要的护甲类型，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{皮甲} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{胸甲}。

穿戴雷莫拉兹生皮护甲者获得寒冷与火焰抗力15。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包含价值至少200 gp + 每负载20 gp的克拉肯生皮。

Harvest Compendium Note: As custom materials are not yet supported, this item represents a generic piece of Remorhaz Rawhide armor, along with its automated rules. You can edit its details and traits to match the type of armor you want, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}.

The wearer of remorhaz rawhide armor has cold and fire resistance 15.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include kraken rawhide worth at least 200 gp + 20 gp per Bulk.

Skullcap of Treerazer.name: 毁木者颅帽 Skullcap of Treerazer
Skullcap of Treerazer.description:
这顶颅骨帽粗糙扭曲，布满凹坑与突起。该颅骨帽可以被制作成一顶@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.JKDQng8JUYE49O2R]{死亡防护头盔}。

The skullcap is gnarled, filled with divots and protrusions. The skullcap can be crafted into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.JKDQng8JUYE49O2R]{Helm of Death Protection}.

Long-Range Ammunition.name: 远程弹药 Long-Range Ammunition
Long-Range Ammunition.description:
弹药 箭矢，弩矢

这种弹药可以飞得比普通弹药更远。发射时，攻击的射程增量长度增加30英尺。

制作需求 初始制作材料必须包括两根鹰羽毛或其他合适的羽毛（见 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-journals.mALAKsH9rWdxCVAi]{最佳iary生物条目}）

Ammunition arrow, bolt

This ammunition can fly further than regular ammunition. When fired, the attack’s range increments increase in length by 30 feet.

Craft Requirements The initial crafting materials must include two eagle-feathers or other suitable feathers (see @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-journals.mALAKsH9rWdxCVAi]{Bestiary Creature Entries})

Winter Wolf Pelt.name: 冬狼皮裘 Winter Wolf Pelt
Winter Wolf Pelt.description:
这张皮毛洁白明亮且厚重。这张皮毛可用于制作一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.P76bJdzgkzBBSeTH]{冬季斗篷}。

This pelt is bright white and heavy. The pelt can be used to craft a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.P76bJdzgkzBBSeTH]{Winter Cloak}.

Nessian Warhound Rawhide.name: 奈辛战獒生皮 Nessian Warhound Rawhide
Nessian Warhound Rawhide.description:
这块皮革呈鲜红色。它可以用来制作一枚火焰@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Lw3B9DpnyrpXD9Di]{能量抗性}符文。

This hide is a bright red color. It can be used to craft a fire @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Lw3B9DpnyrpXD9Di]{Energy-Resistant} rune.

Dragon Teeth (Green).name: 龙牙（绿） Dragon Teeth (Green)
Dragon Teeth (Green).description:
这颗牙带有火焰、寒霜或与其采集来源巨龙相匹配的其他元素痕迹。这颗牙可以被制作成一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.NEqyHUcbhm7wiJ5v]{龙族弹药（绿）}

This tooth has traces of fire, frost, or another element matching the dragon it was harvested from. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.NEqyHUcbhm7wiJ5v]{Draconic Ammunition (Green)}

Pixie Dust.name: 妖精之尘 Pixie Dust
Pixie Dust.description:
启动 1 互动

你可以将一剂小精灵尘洒在一发弹药上。如果你在你的下一回合开始前用这发弹药命中一名生物，则该弹药改为施加下列特殊效果之一，而非造成伤害。每种效果取决于目标的意志豁免。在重击时，将豁免结果视为差一档。

  • 魅惑（情绪，失能，精神）目标承受魅惑法术的效果，但有以下例外：若唯一的敌对行为只是你用一发小精灵尘弹药命中它，则它的豁免不会因此获得加值；且你可以选择将目标的爱慕引导向另一名生物，而非你自己。@Check[type:will|dc:17|traits:emotion,incapacitation,mental]
  • 记忆丧失（精神）目标失去其最近5分钟的记忆。@Check[type:will|dc:17|traits:mental]
  • 睡眠（失能，精神，睡眠）目标承受一个3环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.o4lRVTwSxnOOn5vl]{Sleep} 法术的效果。@Check[type:will|dc:17|traits:incapacitation,mental,sleep]
  • 制伏（精神，非致命）目标受到 @Damage[4d6[mental]] 伤害，取决于其 @Check[type:will|dc:17|basic:true|traits:mental,nonlethal]

Activate 1 Interact

You can sprinkle a dose of pixie dust onto a piece of ammunition. If you hit a creature with that piece of ammunition before your next turn, the ammunition inflicts one of the following special effects instead of dealing damage. Each effects depends on the target's Will save. On a critical hit, treat the save result as one degree worse.

  • Charm (emotion, incapacitation, mental) The targets suffers the effects of a charm spell, except it doesn't gain a bonus to its save if the only hostile act was you hitting it with a piece of pixie dust ammunition, and you can choose to direct the target's adoration toward another creature rather than yourself. @Check[type:will|dc:17|traits:emotion,incapacitation,mental]
  • Memory Loss (mental) The target loses the last 5 minutes of its memory. @Check[type:will|dc:17|traits:mental]
  • Sleep (incapacitation, mental, sleep) The target suffers the effects of a 3rd-level @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.o4lRVTwSxnOOn5vl]{Sleep} spell. @Check[type:will|dc:17|traits:incapacitation,mental,sleep]
  • Subdual (mental, nonlethal) The target takes @Damage[4d6[mental]] damage, depending on its @Check[type:will|dc:17|basic:true|traits:mental,nonlethal]

High-Grade Remorhaz Rawhide Armor.name: 高品质雷魔蛰蜥生皮护甲 High-Grade Remorhaz Rawhide Armor
High-Grade Remorhaz Rawhide Armor.description:
采集宝典注记：由于自定义材料尚未受到支持，此物品代表一件通用的雷莫拉兹生皮护甲，以及其自动化规则。你可以编辑其细节与特征以匹配你想要的护甲类型，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{皮甲} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{胸甲}。

穿戴雷莫拉兹生皮护甲者获得寒冷与火焰抗力15。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包含价值至少 16000 gp + 每 负载 1600 gp 的海妖生皮。

Harvest Compendium Note: As custom materials are not yet supported, this item represents a generic piece of Remorhaz Rawhide armor, along with its automated rules. You can edit its details and traits to match the type of armor you want, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}.

The wearer of remorhaz rawhide armor has cold and fire resistance 15.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include kraken rawhide worth at least 16000 gp + 1600 gp per Bulk.

Phoenix Ash.name: 凤凰灰烬 Phoenix Ash
Phoenix Ash.description:
启动 1 交互

这温暖的灰烬充满了发光的火焰微粒。食用这灰烬后，你在1小时内免疫火焰伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.GpZMzs8WV1viU76s]{效果：凤凰灰烬}

Activate 1 Interact

This warm ash is filled with glowing motes of flame. After consuming this ash, you are immune to fire damage for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.GpZMzs8WV1viU76s]{Effect: Phoenix Ash}

Dragon Teeth (Blue or Bronze).name: 龙牙（蓝龙或青铜龙） Dragon Teeth (Blue or Bronze)
Dragon Teeth (Blue or Bronze).description:
这颗牙上有火焰、寒霜或其他与其所采集自的巨龙相匹配的元素痕迹。这颗牙可以被制作成一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.howxCMyba5Fzc0Ge]

This tooth has traces of fire, frost, or another element matching the dragon it was harvested from. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.howxCMyba5Fzc0Ge]

Quelaunt's Limbs.name: 奎劳恩特的肢体 Quelaunt's Limbs
Quelaunt's Limbs.description:
这些肢体覆盖着搏动的血管，每个末端都有三根锋利的爪。一条肢体可用于制作一把属于棍棒武器组的武器。该武器的伤害骰提升，造成1d6伤害而非1d4、造成1d8伤害而非1d6，依此类推（最高至1d12）。若其原本不具有，还会获得擒抱与推撞（武器特征）武器特征。

These limbs are covered in pulsing veins, each ending in three sharp claws. A limb can be used to craft a weapon from the club weapon group. This weapon has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4, 1d8 damage instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12). It also has the grapple and shove weapon traits if it doesn't already.

Pleroma Energy Fabric.name: 圆满能量织物 Pleroma Energy Fabric
Pleroma Energy Fabric.description:
这块织物一面朴素不起眼，另一面却描绘着宇宙的绚丽面貌。这块织物可以制作成一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.ToxC30mrGoXRMJQQ]{Pleroma Energy Cloak}。

This fabric is plain and unassuming on one side, but depicts a vibrant visage of the cosmos on the other. The fabric can be crafted into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.ToxC30mrGoXRMJQQ]{Pleroma Energy Cloak}.

Unprocessed Zombie Rot Cure.name: 未加工的丧尸（特征）腐烂腌制 Unprocessed Zombie Rot Cure
Unprocessed Zombie Rot Cure.description:
启动 2 交互

当以炼金方式加工后，这种腌制品可以由携带丧尸（特征）腐烂的生物食用。该生物在其下一次对抗该疾病的豁免检定中自动成功。

Activate 2 Interact

When processed alchemically, this cure can be consumed by a creature who carries zombie rot. The creature automatically succeeds on its next saving throw against the disease.

Standard-Grade Faerie Dragonhide Armor.name: 标准品级妖精龙皮护甲 Standard-Grade Faerie Dragonhide Armor
Standard-Grade Faerie Dragonhide Armor.description:
采集宝典注记：由于自定义材料尚不受支持，此物品代表一件通用的妖精龙生皮护甲，以及其自动化规则。你可以编辑其细节和特征以匹配你想要的护甲类型，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{皮甲} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{胸甲}。

妖精龙皮护甲闪烁着虹彩般的色泽。

启动 2 想象

频率 每日一次

效果 你变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}，如同受一个2环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{隐形} 法术影响。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包含价值至少 60 gp + 每 负载 6 gp 的妖精龙皮。

Harvest Compendium Note: As custom materials are not yet supported, this item represents a generic piece of Faerie Dragon Rawhide armor, along with its automated rules. You can edit its details and traits to match the type of armor you want, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}.

Faerie dragonhide armor shimmers in iridescent colors.

Activate 2 envision

Frequency once per day

Effect You turn @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} as if by a 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} spell.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include faerie dragonhide worth at least 60 gp + 6 gp per Bulk.

Unprocessed Giant Tarantula Venom.name: 未加工的巨型捕鸟蛛毒液 Unprocessed Giant Tarantula Venom
Unprocessed Giant Tarantula Venom.description:
启动 2 交互

这种毒液呈灰白色。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20]

最长持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} 与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}（1 轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害，off-guard @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}。（1 轮）

阶段 4 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}（1 轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This venom is an off-white color.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage, off-guard @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}. (1 round)

Stage 4 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} (1 round)

Linnorm Blood.name: 林诺姆血液 Linnorm Blood
Linnorm Blood.description:
这种血液浓稠且沉重。这种血液可用于制作一瓶@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.hDLbR56Id2OtU318]{生命灵药}或一瓶@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.2RuepCemJhrpKKao]{治疗药水}

This blood is dense and heavy. The blood can be used to craft an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.hDLbR56Id2OtU318]{Elixir of Life} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.2RuepCemJhrpKKao]{Healing Potion}

Charred Feathers.name: 焦黑的羽毛 Charred Feathers
Charred Feathers.description:
这根羽毛略微冒烟。这些羽毛可以用来制作一枚 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Do8vjuUBOslgPtyw]{Balisse Feather}

This feather is slightly smoldering. The feathers can be used to craft a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Do8vjuUBOslgPtyw]{Balisse Feather}

Standard-Grade Mukradi Rawhide Armor.name: 标准级穆克拉迪生皮护甲 Standard-Grade Mukradi Rawhide Armor
Standard-Grade Mukradi Rawhide Armor.description:
采集宝典注记：由于自定义材料尚未受支持，此物品代表一件通用的穆克拉迪生皮护甲，以及其自动化规则。你可以编辑其细节与特征以匹配你想要的护甲类型，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{皮甲} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{胸甲}。

穿戴穆克拉迪生皮护甲者对不同的伤害类型具有抗力。每天在你的每日准备期间，从酸、电击或火焰中选择一种伤害类型。你对所选伤害类型获得抗力10，持续至你的下一次每日准备。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.VlJJNZGX6Z2kzdeH]{效果：穆克拉迪生皮护甲}

制作需求 初始原材料必须包含价值至少60 gp + 每负载6 gp的穆克拉迪生皮

Harvest Compendium Note: As custom materials are not yet supported, this item represents a generic piece of Mukradi Rawhide armor, along with its automated rules. You can edit its details and traits to match the type of armor you want, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}.

The wearer of mukradi rawhide armor is resistant to different damage types. Each day during your daily preparations, choose one damage type from acid, electricity, or fire. You have resistance 10 to the chosen damage type until your next daily preparations.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.VlJJNZGX6Z2kzdeH]{Effect: Mukradi Rawhide Armor}

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include mukradi rawhide worth at least 60 gp + 6 gp per Bulk

Vorpal Rune Framework.name: 斩首符文框架 Vorpal Rune Framework
Vorpal Rune Framework.description:
此框架概述了安装一枚@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.6xaxxKfvXED6LfIY]{Vorpal}符文的步骤。当你将强袭符文蚀刻进一把武器时，其价格降低25%。

This framework outlines the steps to install a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.6xaxxKfvXED6LfIY]{Vorpal} rune. When you etch the striking rune into a weapon, its price is lowered by 25%.

Faceless Stalker Tongue.name: 无面潜行者之舌 Faceless Stalker Tongue
Faceless Stalker Tongue.description:
启用 F 构想

触发 你用所附着的武器成功打击一个生物。

这条舌头覆盖着细小的刺，会让你的皮肤感觉麻木。当你启用这条舌头时，你击中的生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}。

Activate F envision

Trigger You successfully Strike a creature with the affixed weapon.

This tongue is covered in little spines that leave your skin feeling numb. When you activate the tongue, the creature you hit is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

Deinosuchus Teeth.name: 恐鳄牙齿 Deinosuchus Teeth
Deinosuchus Teeth.description:
这些牙极其锋利。一颗牙可以被制作成一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{怪物精准弹药}。

These teeth are incredibly sharp. A tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{Monster Precision Ammunition}.

High-Grade Cave Worm Rawhide Armor.name: 高等洞穴蠕虫生皮护甲 High-Grade Cave Worm Rawhide Armor
High-Grade Cave Worm Rawhide Armor.description:
采集资料库注记：由于自定义材料尚未受支持，此物品代表一件通用的洞穴蠕虫生皮护甲，以及其自动化规则。你可以编辑其细节与特征，以匹配你想要的护甲类型，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}。

启动 F 构思

频率 每小时一次

触发 你在你的回合结束时带有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed}或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} 状态之一

效果 当你启动这套护甲时，你终止一个正在影响你的状态。该状态必须是麻痹、迟缓或震慑（状态）。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包含价值至少 4200 gp + 每 负载 420 gp 的洞穴蠕虫生皮。

Harvest Compendium Note: As custom materials are not yet supported, this item represents a generic piece of Cave Worm Rawhide armor, along with its automated rules. You can edit its details and traits to match the type of armor you want, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}.

Activate F envision

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You end your turn with either the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} condition

Effect When you activate this armor, you end one condition that is affecting you. The condition must be either paralyzed, slowed, or stunned.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include cave worm rawhide worth at least 4200 gp + 420 gp per Bulk.

Potion of Evil Resistance (Moderate).name: 邪恶抗力药水（中等） Potion of Evil Resistance (Moderate)
Potion of Evil Resistance (Moderate).description:
启动 1 互动

饮用这瓶黑色、黏稠的药水会在1小时内获得对邪恶的抗力10。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.xnKPasU8sPP34zgB]{效果：邪恶抗力药水（中等）}

Activate 1 Interact

Drinking this black, viscous potion grants resistance 10 to unholy for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.xnKPasU8sPP34zgB]{Effect: Potion of Evil Resistance (Moderate)}

Court Garb.name: 宫廷礼服 Court Garb
Court Garb.description:
这套服装的功能如同精制服装。穿着它时，你在进行以冒充与这套服装相匹配的宫廷成员为目的的欺骗检定时，获得+1物品加值。

This clothing functions like fine clothing. While wearing it, you gain a +1 item bonus to Deception checks made to pass as a member of the court matching the clothing.

Oil of the Bastion.name: 堡垒之油 Oil of the Bastion
Oil of the Bastion.description:
启动 2 交互

这种油里含有细小的石屑。当你将油涂抹在护甲上时，穿戴该护甲的生物在 1 小时内获得对反射豁免的 +2 环境加值。该生物只有在自其上个回合开始以来未采取过移动动作时，才能使用此加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.WNhyKh0wcZQOthXJ]{效果：壁垒之油}

Activate 2 Interact

This oil has little bits of stone in it. When you apply the oil to armor, the creature wearing the armor gains a +2 circumstance bonus to Reflex saves for 1 hour. The creature can only use this bonus if it hasn’t taken a move action since the beginning of its last turn.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.WNhyKh0wcZQOthXJ]{Effect: Oil of the Bastion}

Pit Fiend Horns.name: 深狱魔角 Pit Fiend Horns
Pit Fiend Horns.description:
这副胸甲做工精良，但无法使用。这副胸甲可以被制作成一个 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.uFohi5Q0TSOjXAAZ]{命令头盔}。

This breastplate is well made, but unusable. The breastplate can be crafted into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.uFohi5Q0TSOjXAAZ]{Helm of Command}.

Bulette Teeth.name: 紫虫牙齿 Bulette Teeth
Bulette Teeth.description:
这颗牙干净而锋利。这颗牙可以被制作成一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{怪物精准弹药}。

This tooth is clean and sharp. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{Monster Precision Ammunition}.

Daeodon Heart.name: 恐齿兽之心 Daeodon Heart
Daeodon Heart.description:
启动 2 交互

这颗心脏黑暗而强健。你可以吞食这颗心脏，使自己获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.qQt3CMrhLkUV1wCv]{Sudden Charge}专长的许可，持续时间为1小时。

如果你拥有Sudden Charge专长，你可以在持续时间内，将同一次Sudden Charge中的打击次数变为两次。照常对这些打击施加你的多重攻击减值。

Activate 2 Interact

This heart is dark and strong. You can consume the heart, granting yourself access to the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.qQt3CMrhLkUV1wCv]{Sudden Charge} feat for 1 hour.

If you have the Sudden Charge feat, you can Strike twice as part of the same Sudden Charge for the duration. Apply your multiple attack penalty to the Strikes normally.

Naga Tongue.name: 娜迦语 Naga Tongue
Naga Tongue.description:
启动 1 交互

这条舌头分叉且呈鲜亮的粉红色。食用这条舌头后，你在1小时内进行欺瞒、交涉和威吓检定时获得+1状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.mVDzYPgdAuFKNaBA]{效果：那伽之舌}

Activate 1 Interact

The tongue is split and bright pink. After consuming this tongue, you gain a +1 status bonus to Deception, Diplomacy, and Intimidation checks for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.mVDzYPgdAuFKNaBA]{Effect: Naga Tongue}

Bear Claws.name: 熊爪 Bear Claws
Bear Claws.description:
这件物品的功能如同一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{枭熊爪}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{狼牙}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{血腥爪}护符。你在附着该护符时选择其对应哪一种。

This functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear Claw}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon} talisman. You choose which when you affix the talisman.

Shuln Skeleton.name: 舒尔恩 骷髅（特征） Shuln Skeleton
Shuln Skeleton.description:
舒尔恩的骷髅（特征）由精金制成，极其稀有。它可以卖给收藏家，或卖给使用精金的工匠。如果采集了骷髅（特征），你就不能从该生物身上采集任何獠牙或爪。

The skeleton of a shuln is made of adamantine and is incredibly rare. It can be sold to collectors, or to artisans working with adamantine. If the skeleton is harvested, you cannot harvest any fangs or claws from the creature.

Animal Precision Ammunition.name: 动物精准弹药 Animal Precision Ammunition
Animal Precision Ammunition.description:
弹药 箭矢，弩矢

被该弹药命中的生物会受到1d4精准伤害。若该生物是动物，该加值提升至2d4。

制作需求 初始制作材料必须包含一颗恐龙牙或其他合适的牙（见 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-journals.mALAKsH9rWdxCVAi]{Bestiary Creature Entries}）

Ammunition arrow, bolt

A creature hit with this ammunition takes 1d4 precision damage. This bonus increases to 2d4 if the creature is an animal.

Craft Requirements The initial crafting materials must include one dinosaur tooth or other suitable tooth (see @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-journals.mALAKsH9rWdxCVAi]{Bestiary Creature Entries})

Religious Symbol of Pharasma.name: 法拉斯玛的圣徽 Religious Symbol of Pharasma
Religious Symbol of Pharasma.description:
如果你正挥舞着该圣徽，你在将自己伪装成法拉丝玛的信徒时进行的欺瞒检定获得+1物品加值。

If you're brandishing this symbol, you gain a +1 item bonus to Deception checks made to present yourself as a follower of Pharasma.

Small Wemmuth Vines.name: 小型温穆斯藤蔓 Small Wemmuth Vines
Small Wemmuth Vines.description:
这些藤蔓柔韧而富有弹性。这些藤蔓可用于制作一枚@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.n5L7HE9H8jn8ftQy]{攀爬栓}或一条@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.G4cmHHhAChAlypFN]{攀爬绳}。

These vines are supple and flexible. The vines can be used to craft a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.n5L7HE9H8jn8ftQy]{Climbing Bolt} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.G4cmHHhAChAlypFN]{Rope of Climbing}.

Gogiteth Front Leg.name: 戈吉瑟斯前腿 Gogiteth Front Leg
Gogiteth Front Leg.description:
这条腿纤细而灵活。一条腿可用于制作来自弓或矛武器组的武器。该武器上蚀刻有一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.KCQRFvUgbyclvOGi]{Striking (Greater)}符文。该武器的伤害骰也会增加，造成1d6伤害而非1d4、1d8而非1d6，依此类推（最高至1d12）。如果该武器尚未拥有灵巧（武器特征），它也会获得该特征。

This leg is slender and flexible. A leg can be used to craft a weapon from the bow or spear weapon groups. The weapon has a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.KCQRFvUgbyclvOGi]{Striking (Greater)} rune etched into it. This weapon also has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4, 1d8 instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12). It also has the agile weapon trait it doesn't already.

Scroll Case Filled with Tax Documents.name: 装满税务文件的卷轴匣 Scroll Case Filled with Tax Documents
Scroll Case Filled with Tax Documents.description:
这个箱子里装有数份税务文件，上面列出了税务征收员近期客户的姓名、已收税款以及地址（如适用）。

This case contains several tax documents, which list the names, collected taxes, and addresses (if applicable) of the tax collector's recent clients.

High-Grade Barghest Rawhide Armor.name: 高等巴格斯特生皮护甲 High-Grade Barghest Rawhide Armor
High-Grade Barghest Rawhide Armor.description:
采集宝典注记：由于系统尚不支持自定义材料，该物品代表一件通用的巴盖斯特生皮护甲，以及其自动化规则。你可以编辑其细节和特征，使其匹配你想要的护甲类型，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{皮甲} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{胸甲}。

穿戴巴盖斯特生皮护甲者获得火焰抗力 5 与物理抗力 5（除了魔法）。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包含价值至少 4100 gp + 每 负载 410 gp 的巴盖斯特生皮。

Harvest Compendium Note: As custom materials are not yet supported in the system, this item represents a generic piece of Barghest Rawhide armor, along with its automated rules. You can edit its details and traits to match the type of armor you want, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}.

The wearer of barghest rawhide armor has fire resistance 5 and physical resistance 5 (except magical).

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include barghest rawhide worth at least 4100 gp + 410 gp per Bulk.

Bulette Shellplates.name: 紫蜥兽甲壳板 Bulette Shellplates
Bulette Shellplates.description:
这些甲壳板有裂痕但很坚韧。你可以使用这些甲壳板来制作一套 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.t1oPhmZ9uiQrAfhl]{布雷特甲壳板护甲}。

These shellplates are cracked but tough. You can use these shellplates to craft a set of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.t1oPhmZ9uiQrAfhl]{Bulette Shellplate Armor}.

Low-Grade Alghollthu Rawhide Armor.name: 劣质阿尔古苏生皮护甲 Low-Grade Alghollthu Rawhide Armor
Low-Grade Alghollthu Rawhide Armor.description:
采集汇编注记：由于目前尚不支持自定义材料，此物品代表一件通用的阿尔古苏生皮护甲，以及其自动化规则。你可以编辑其细节与特征，以匹配你想要的护甲类型，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{皮甲} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{胸甲}。

阿尔古苏生皮护甲的穿戴者在进行用于脱逃与挤过的特技与运动检定时，获得+2物品加值。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包含价值至少70 sp + 每负载7 sp的阿尔古苏生皮。

Harvest Compendium Note: As custom materials are not yet supported, this item represents a generic piece of Alghollthu Rawhide armor, along with its automated rules. You can edit its details and traits to match the type of armor you want, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}.

The wearer of alghollthu rawhide armor has a +2 item bonus to Acrobatics and Athletics checks made to Escape and Squeeze.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include alghollthu rawhide worth at least 70 sp + 7 sp per Bulk.

Greater Barguest Eyes.name: 高等巴格斯特之眼 Greater Barguest Eyes
Greater Barguest Eyes.description:
激活 F 操控

触发 你以4环施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.zR67Rt3UMHKC5evy]{Flicker}

这只发光的眼睛呈黄绿色。当你激活它时，你不会为该次被触发的法术消耗一个法术位。

Activate F manipulate

Trigger You cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.zR67Rt3UMHKC5evy]{Flicker} at 4th rank

This glowing eye is yellow-green color. When you activate it, you do not expend a spell slot for that instance of the triggering spell.

Crystalline Dust.name: 晶尘 Crystalline Dust
Crystalline Dust.description:
粉尘粗糙而闪亮。它可用于制作一枚电能 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Lw3B9DpnyrpXD9Di]{Energy-Resistant} 符文。

The dust is coarse and shiny. It can be used to craft an electricity @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Lw3B9DpnyrpXD9Di]{Energy-Resistant} rune.

Scroll case with Ship's Charts.name: 附有船舶海图的卷轴匣 Scroll case with Ship's Charts
Scroll case with Ship's Charts.description:
如果你花费1小时研究这个箱子里的海图，你会对附近海岸线与海底的地形布局获得进一步的了解。你在所述区域内进行操舵与驾驶船只和小艇的检定时获得+2物品加值。该加值持续的小时数等于你的智力调整值（最低为1）。

If you spend 1 hour studying the charts in this case, you gain a further understanding of the configuration of the nearby shoreline and seafloor. You gain a +2 item bonus to checks to steer and pilot ships and boats in the described area. This bonus lasts for a number of hours equal to your Intelligence modifier (minimum of 1).

Roper Teeth.name: 潜伏怪之牙 Roper Teeth
Roper Teeth.description:
这颗牙很脏，但很锋利。这颗牙可以被制作成一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{怪物精准弹药}。

This tooth is grimy but sharp. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{Monster Precision Ammunition}.

Tax Ledgers.name: 税务账簿 Tax Ledgers
Tax Ledgers.description:
这些税务账册包含公会会长所监督的公会全体成员的信息。它列出了成员的姓名、已征收的税款以及地址（如适用）。

These tax ledgers contain information on all the members of the guild the guildmaster oversees. It lists a member's name, collected taxes, and an address (if applicable).

High-Grade Bulette Shellplate Armor.name: 高等布雷特壳板护甲 High-Grade Bulette Shellplate Armor
High-Grade Bulette Shellplate Armor.description:
采集汇编注记：由于自定义材料尚未受支持，该物品代表一件通用的布莱特壳甲护甲，以及其自动化规则。你可以编辑其细节与特征以匹配你想要的护甲类型，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{皮甲} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{胸甲}。

布莱特壳甲护甲的穿戴者在进行用于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{高跳} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{远跳} 的运动检定时，获得+2物品加值。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包含价值至少 4100 gp + 每负载 410 gp 的穆莱特壳甲。

Harvest Compendium Note: As custom materials are not yet supported, this item represents a generic piece of Bulette Shellplate armor, along with its automated rules. You can edit its details and traits to match the type of armor you want, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}.

The wearer of bulette shellplate armor gains a +2 item bonus to Athletics checks made to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{High Jump} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump}.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include mulette shellplate worth at least 4100 gp + 410 gp per Bulk.

Vampiric Ammunition.name: 吸血弹药 Vampiric Ammunition
Vampiric Ammunition.description:
弹药 箭矢，弩矢

被此弹药命中的生物会额外受到2d4虚体伤害。你获得等同于目标所受虚体伤害一半的临时生命值（在应用抗力等效果之后）。这些临时生命值持续1分钟。

制作需求 初始制作材料必须包括一枚吸血鬼（特征）獠牙。

Ammunition arrow, bolt

A creature hit with this ammunition takes an additional 2d4 void damage. You gain temporary Hit Points equal to half the void damage the target takes (after applying resistances and the like). The temporary Hit Points last for 1 minute.

Craft Requirements The initial crafting materials must include one vampire fang.

Unprocessed Jungle Drake Venom.name: 未处理的丛林龙毒液 Unprocessed Jungle Drake Venom
Unprocessed Jungle Drake Venom.description:
启动 2 交互

这种毒液呈绿色，并带有黄色条纹。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 2}（1 轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This venom is green with streaks of yellow.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} (1 round)

Leopard Fangs.name: 豹牙 Leopard Fangs
Leopard Fangs.description:
这具有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{枭熊爪}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{狼牙}或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{血腥利爪} 护符的效果。你在固定该护符时选择其作为哪一种。

This functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear Claw}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon} talisman. You choose which when you affix the talisman.

Sylvan Wineskin.name: 西尔凡酒囊 Sylvan Wineskin
Sylvan Wineskin.description:
这个酒囊里装着一位萨堤尔留下的附魔酒精。当你从酒囊中饮用时，你在1小时内的意志豁免获得+1物品加值。对抗恐惧效果时，此加值提升为+2。此酒囊在采集时含有[[/r 2d4#drafts of wine]]份葡萄酒。当最后一份被饮尽时，酒囊失去其魔法。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.I0LaAZPPSzt5SfBo]{效果：森林酒囊}

This wineskin is filled with enchanted alcohol a satyr left inside. When you drink from the wineskin, you gain a +1 item bonus to Will saves for 1 hour. This bonus is increased to +2 against fear effects. The wineskin holds [[/r 2d4#drafts of wine]] drafts of wine when harvested. When the last draft is consumed, the wineskin loses its magic.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.I0LaAZPPSzt5SfBo]{Effect: Sylvan Wineskin}

Fresh Basilisk Blood.name: 新鲜蛇发怪蜥蜴血液 Fresh Basilisk Blood
Fresh Basilisk Blood.description:
启动 2 交互

这种血液极其黏稠。一瓶石化蜥蜴血液可以用来涂覆一个被某个生物的石化凝视变成石头的生物，使其立刻恢复为血肉之躯。该血液只能从死亡时间不超过1小时的石化蜥蜴身上采集，并且在被采集后1小时失去其性质。

Activate 2 Interact

This blood is highly viscous. A vial of basilisk blood can be used to coat a creature that has been turned to stone by a creature's Petrifying Gaze, instantly restoring it to flesh.
