The blood can only be harvested from a basilisk that has been dead for less than an hour, and it loses its properties 1 hour after it has been harvested.

Liquid Air.name: 液态空气 Liquid Air
Liquid Air.description:
这种液体完全透明，几乎没有重量。液态空气可用于制作 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.7TQw7V1zZKl0a0Xz]{瓶装空气}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.kORpovlPYicysr2g]{迅捷药水}或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.tyt6rFtv32MZ4DT9]{猎豹精华（次级）}。

This liquid is completely transparent and weighs almost nothing. Liquid air can be used to craft @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.7TQw7V1zZKl0a0Xz]{Bottled Air}, a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.kORpovlPYicysr2g]{Potion of Quickness}, or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.tyt6rFtv32MZ4DT9]{Cheetah's Elixir (Lesser)}.

Cloaker Vocal Cords.name: 隐蔽兽声带 Cloaker Vocal Cords
Cloaker Vocal Cords.description:
这些声带以几乎听不见的音调振动。这些声带可被制作成一个 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.aXVCj8lPTaPp68wt]{潜行披风怪哀鸣号角}。

These vocal cords vibrate with a nearly inaudible tone. The cords can be crafted into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.aXVCj8lPTaPp68wt]{Horn of Cloaker Moaning}.

Shuln Claws.name: 舒尔恩爪 Shuln Claws
Shuln Claws.description:
这只爪由精金制成。该爪可用于制作一把属于匕首武器组的武器。该武器刻有一枚 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.KCQRFvUgbyclvOGi]{Striking (Greater)} 符文。该武器还具有以下特性。

撕裂护甲 当你使用该武器进行近战打击并掷出大成功或大失败时，你对目标的护甲造成等同数值的伤害，无视任何低于10的硬度。

This claw is made of adamantine. The claw can be used to craft a weapon from the knife weapon group. The weapon has a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.KCQRFvUgbyclvOGi]{Striking (Greater)} rune etched into it. The weapon also has the following feature.

Armor-Rending When you score a critical hit with a melee Strike using this weapon, you deal the same amount of damage to the target's armor, bypassing any Hardness lower than 10.

Stegosaurus Dorsal Plates.name: 剑龙背板 Stegosaurus Dorsal Plates
Stegosaurus Dorsal Plates.description:
这些背板拥有美丽的天然伪装。

These dorsal plates have a beautiful natural camouflage.

Unprocessed Tor Linnorm Venom.name: 未处理的托尔林诺姆毒液 Unprocessed Tor Linnorm Venom
Unprocessed Tor Linnorm Venom.description:
启动 2 交互

这种毒液灼热无比，会散发出缕缕轻烟。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:39]

最大持续时间 10 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[8d6[fire]] 火焰伤害和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[12d6[fire]] 火焰伤害和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 2}（1 轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This venom is searing hot and lets off thin wisps of smoke.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:39]

Maximum Duration 10 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[8d6[fire]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[12d6[fire]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} (1 round)

Succubus Horns.name: 魅魔之角 Succubus Horns
Succubus Horns.description:
这些角光滑而优雅。一只角可以被制作成一枚@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.dT87Ogto7ZMzX886]{诱惑护符}。

These horns are smooth and elegant. A horn can be crafted into an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.dT87Ogto7ZMzX886]{Amulet of Seduction}.

Corruption Essence.name: 腐化精华 Corruption Essence
Corruption Essence.description:
这种液体呈深色，闻起来带有酸味。若将其倒入或投掷进一个体型为5立方英尺或更小的液体水体中，该精粹会永久玷污它。该液体将变得无法饮用，且无法支援水中呼吸的生命。若水系魔法或炼金物品的等级低于腐化精粹，此效果会将其摧毁

This liquid is dark and sour smelling. If poured or thrown into a body of liquid 5 cubic feet or smaller in size, the essence permanently befouls it. The liquid becomes undrinkable and unable to support water-breathing life. This effect destroys water magic or alchemical items if they’re of a lower level than the corruption essence

Unprocessed Giant Viper Venom.name: 未加工的巨型蝰蛇毒液 Unprocessed Giant Viper Venom
Unprocessed Giant Viper Venom.description:
启动 2 交互

这种毒液浓稠且呈金色。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 1}（1 轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This venom is thick and golden.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (1 round)

Alghollthu Eyes.name: 阿尔古苏之眼 Alghollthu Eyes
Alghollthu Eyes.description:
启动 F 操控

触发 你施放了一个以另一名生物为目标并迫使其进行豁免检定的奥术法术。

这只眼睛会自行眨动，但只会在你不看它的时候。当你启动这只眼睛时，被该奥术法术选为目标的生物在对抗该法术的豁免上承受–2环境减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.cKqKNofD6gjeeeRK]{效果：阿尔古苏之眼}

Activate F manipulate

Trigger You cast an occult spell that targets another creature and forces them to make a saving throw.

This eye blinks on its own, but only when you're not looking. When you activate the eye, the creature targeted by the occult spell suffers a –2 circumstance penalty on their save against the spell.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.cKqKNofD6gjeeeRK]{Effect: Alghollthu Eyes}

Hell Hound Fang.name: 地狱猎犬獠牙 Hell Hound Fang
Hell Hound Fang.description:
启动 F 观想

触发 你使用已装配的武器成功打击一名生物。

这枚牙在内部火焰的照耀下闪耀。当你启动该尖牙时，你对该生物造成额外1d6点火焰伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.JtFhqtRTkl1KXsiT]{效果：地狱猎犬尖牙}

Activate F envision

Trigger You successfully Strike a creature with the affixed weapon.

This tooth shines with an internal fire. When you activate the fang, you deal an additional 1d6 fire damage to the creature.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.JtFhqtRTkl1KXsiT]{Effect: Hell Hound Fang}

Judge's Robes.name: 审判官长袍 Judge's Robes
Judge's Robes.description:
穿着这些长袍时，你在进行用于冒充当地地区法官的欺瞒检定时，获得+2物品加值。

While wearing these robes, you gain a +2 item bonus to Deception checks made to pass as a judge of the local region.

Ancient Dragon Fangs (Green).name: 远古巨龙之牙（绿） Ancient Dragon Fangs (Green)
Ancient Dragon Fangs (Green).description:
这枚獠牙渗出绿色的毒药。獠牙可用于制作一把造成穿刺伤害的武器。该武器为+1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.8U4q9wmCmU0cBNrb]{Toxic (Greater)}武器。该武器的伤害骰也会提升，将1d4改为1d6、1d6改为1d8，依此类推（最高至1d12）。

This fang exudes greenish poison. A fang can be used to craft a weapon that deals piercing damage. The weapon is a +1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.8U4q9wmCmU0cBNrb]{Toxic (Greater)} weapon. This weapon also has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4, 1d8 instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12).

Ghoul Teeth.name: 食尸鬼（特征）之牙 Ghoul Teeth
Ghoul Teeth.description:
启动 F 构想

触发 你以所附着的武器成功打击一个活体、非精灵生物

若你接触这颗牙，它会使你麻木。你启动这颗牙时，该生物必须在一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15] 豁免中成功，否则变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}。它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次新的豁免，且在每次此类豁免时，DC 累积减少 1。

Activate F envision

Trigger You successfully Strike a living, non-elf creature with the affixed weapon

The tooth numbs you if you touch it. When you activate the tooth, the creature must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}. It can attempt a new save at the end of each of its turns, and the DC cumulatively decreases by 1 on each such save.

Potion of Evil Resistance (Greater).name: 邪恶抗力药水（强效） Potion of Evil Resistance (Greater)
Potion of Evil Resistance (Greater).description:
启动 1 交互

饮用这瓶黑色、黏稠的药水会在1小时内获得15点对邪秽的抗力。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.dDWJtftAjgIolGaS]{效果：邪恶抗力药水（强效）}

Activate 1 Interact

Drinking this black, viscous potion grants resistance 15 to unholy for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.dDWJtftAjgIolGaS]{Effect: Potion of Evil Resistance (Greater)}

Sphinx Eyes.name: 斯芬克斯之眼 Sphinx Eyes
Sphinx Eyes.description:
启动 2 互动

这只眼睛是金色的，没有可见的瞳孔。吞食这只眼睛后，你获得2环@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{See Invisibility}法术的效果。

Activate 2 Interact

The eye is golden with no visible pupil. After consuming the eye, you gain the effects of a 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{See Invisibility} spell.

Cassisian Helm.name: 卡西西亚盔甲头盔 Cassisian Helm
Cassisian Helm.description:
这顶头盔泛着金色光泽。这顶头盔可被制作成 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.XtBbRBCOuduocgTR]{防护头盔}。

This helm has a golden sheen. The helm can be crafted into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.XtBbRBCOuduocgTR]{Helm of Protection}.

Curse-Breaker Claws.name: 破咒者之爪 Curse-Breaker Claws
Curse-Breaker Claws.description:
启动 R 想象

触发 你成为诅咒的目标并且必须进行一次豁免检定

需求 你在神秘学中为专家。

触摸这只爪超过几分钟会造成巨大的不适。你针对该诅咒的效果获得+5物品加值。若使用该爪使你在对抗该诅咒的豁免中成功，你会承受一些减益（见下表）。若你大成功，则不承受任何减益。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.wcbUt5GPc64RNGLz]{效果：破咒者之爪}

诅咒等级 效果
1-4 你受到 @Damage[1d6[mental]] 伤害
5-9 你受到 @Damage[2d6[mental]] 伤害。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，持续1小时。
10-14 你受到 @Damage[4d6[mental]] 伤害。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}，持续1小时，并且你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑}
15+ 你受到 @Damage[6d6[mental]] 伤害。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 3}，持续1小时，并且你获得困惑。

Activate R envision

Trigger You are targeted by a curse and must make a saving throw

Requirements You are an expert in Occultism.

Touching this claw for more than a few minutes causes immense discomfort. You gain a +5 item bonus against the effects of the curse. If using the claw causes you to succeed on the save against the curse, you suffer some penalties (see table below). If you critically succeed, you suffer no penalties.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.wcbUt5GPc64RNGLz]{Effect: Curse-Breaker Claws}

Curse Level Effects
1-4 You take @Damage[1d6[mental]] damage
5-9 You take @Damage[2d6[mental]] damage. You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 hour.
10-14 You take @Damage[4d6[mental]] damage. You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} for 1 hour, and you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}
15+ You take @Damage[6d6[mental]] damage. You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 3} for 1 hour, and you are Confused.

Drake Teeth (Fire).name: 龙牙（火焰） Drake Teeth (Fire)
Drake Teeth (Fire).description:
这颗牙上有火焰、寒霜或其他与其采集来源的巨龙相匹配的元素痕迹。这颗牙可以被制作成一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.rPxVgaEQAlnqcpTO]{龙裔弹药（火焰）}。

This tooth has traces of fire, frost, or another element matching the dragon it was harvested from. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.rPxVgaEQAlnqcpTO]{Draconic Ammunition (Fire)}.

Cursed Sand.name: 诅咒沙尘 Cursed Sand
Cursed Sand.description:
这些沙子看起来像普通的沙子，但当它沉降时，其表面会形成诡异的图像。你可以通过将沙子吹到你5英尺内某个活着的生物脸上来启用这些沙子。该生物必须进行一次针对诅咒的@Check[type:fortitude|dc:20|trait:curse]豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响，并在24小时内对诅咒沙免疫。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物受到@Damage[2d6[void]]伤害，并且在接下来的1小时内无法回复生命值。

大失败 该生物受到@Damage[4d6[void]]伤害，并且在接下来的1小时内无法回复生命值。

This sand looks like regular sand, but when it settles, eerie images form on its surface. You can activate the sand by blowing it into the face of a living creature within 5 feet of you. The creature must make a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20|trait:curse] save against a curse.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected and becomes immune to cursed sand for 24 hours.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature takes @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and can't regain hit points for the next hour.

Critical Failure The creature takes @Damage[4d6[void]] damage and can't regain hit points for the next hour.

Draconic Ammunition (Black or Copper).name: 龙族弹药（黑龙或铜龙） Draconic Ammunition (Black or Copper)
Draconic Ammunition (Black or Copper).description:
弹药 箭矢，弩矢

被此弹药命中的生物会受到1d6点与龙的颜色相匹配的伤害（见下表）。

制作需求 初始制作材料必须包含一枚龙牙或其他合适的牙（见生物条目）。

龙的类型 伤害类型
黑龙或铜龙 酸
蓝龙或黄铜龙 电击
黄铜龙、金龙或红龙 火焰
绿龙 毒药
银龙或白龙 寒冷

 

Ammunition arrow, bolt

A creature hit with this ammunition takes 1d6 damage of a type matching the dragon's color (see the table below).

Craft Requirements The initial crafting materials must include one dragon tooth or other suitable tooth (see creature entries).

Dragon Type Damage Type
Black or Copper Acid
Blue or Brass Electricity
Brass, gold, or red Fire
Green Poison
Silver or white Cold

Unprocessed Shuln Saliva.name: 未加工的舒尔恩唾液 Unprocessed Shuln Saliva
Unprocessed Shuln Saliva.description:
启动 2 交互

舒尔恩的唾液对猎人和战士而言是一种珍贵商品。舒尔恩唾液可克服“无可阻挡”能力。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:28]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1  @Damage[2d6[poison]] 伤害且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[3d6[poison]] 伤害且slowed 1（1 轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[4d6[poison]] 伤害且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}，持续[[/r 2d6#Hours paralyzed]]小时（1 轮）

Activate 2 Interact

Shuln saliva is a valuable commodity for hunters and warriors. Shuln saliva overcomes the Inexorable ability.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:28]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1  @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[3d6[poison]] damage and slowed 1 (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[4d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} for [[/r 2d6#Hours paralyzed]] hours (1 round)

Tiger Fangs.name: 虎牙 Tiger Fangs
Tiger Fangs.description:
这件物品的功能等同于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{枭熊爪}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{狼牙} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{血淋淋的爪}护符。你在将护符固定时选择其一。

This functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear Claw}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon} talisman. You choose which when you affix the talisman.

Pure Frost Crystals.name: 纯霜水晶 Pure Frost Crystals
Pure Frost Crystals.description:
启动 F 操控

触发 你施放一个需要你为寒冷伤害掷骰的法术

需求 你拥有寒冷抗力 5 或更高。

这种精粹看起来完全像纯冰，但它永不融化。碎片中蒸腾出一团寒冷的薄雾。当你启动它时，你不再为该法术掷骰决定伤害，而是造成可能的最大伤害值。

Activate F manipulate

Trigger You cast a spell that requires you to roll for cold damage

Requirements You have cold resistance 5 or higher.

This essence looks exactly like pure ice but it never melts. A cold mist steams from the shards. When you activate it, instead of rolling damage for the spell, you deal the maximum possible amount of damage.

Unprocessed Ice Linnorm Venom.name: 未加工的冰霜林诺姆毒液 Unprocessed Ice Linnorm Venom
Unprocessed Ice Linnorm Venom.description:
启动 2 互动

这种毒液极其寒冷，会在其容器表面覆盖一层薄薄的霜。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:35]

最大持续时间 10 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[5d6[cold]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{枯竭 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[7d6[cold]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{枯竭 2}（1 轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This venom is so cold it covers its container in a thin layer of frost.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:35]

Maximum Duration 10 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[5d6[cold]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[7d6[cold]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} (1 round)

Dragon Head Teeth.name: 龙首牙齿 Dragon Head Teeth
Dragon Head Teeth.description:
这颗牙带有火焰、寒霜或其他与其采集来源的巨龙相匹配的元素痕迹。这颗牙可以被制作成一件龙族弹药。

巨龙类型 伤害类型
黑龙或铜龙 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.I02YUoBn9ItwO9BG]{Draconic Ammunition (Black or Copper)}
蓝龙或青铜龙 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.howxCMyba5Fzc0Ge]{Draconic Ammunition (Blue or Bronze)}
黄铜龙、金龙或红龙 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.rPxVgaEQAlnqcpTO]{Draconic Ammunition (Brass, Gold, or Red)}
绿龙 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.NEqyHUcbhm7wiJ5v]{Draconic Ammunition (Green)}
银龙或白龙 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.XBsoiD7Q2qdsxU5h]{Draconic Ammunition (Silver or White)}

 

The tooth has traces of fire, frost, or another element matching the dragon it was harvested from. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of draconic ammunition.

Dragon Type Damage Type
Black or Copper @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.I02YUoBn9ItwO9BG]{Draconic Ammunition (Black or Copper)}
Blue or Bronze @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.howxCMyba5Fzc0Ge]{Draconic Ammunition (Blue or Bronze)}
Brass, gold, or red @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.rPxVgaEQAlnqcpTO]{Draconic Ammunition (Brass, Gold, or Red)}
Green @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.NEqyHUcbhm7wiJ5v]{Draconic Ammunition (Green)}
Silver or white @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.XBsoiD7Q2qdsxU5h]{Draconic Ammunition (Silver or White)}

Unprocessed Wasp Venom.name: 未加工的黄蜂毒液 Unprocessed Wasp Venom
Unprocessed Wasp Venom.description:
启动 2 交互

这种毒液呈暗淡的绿色。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:16]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 无效果（1 轮）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}（1 轮）

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}（1 轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This venom is a dull green color.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:16]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 no effect (1 round)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} (1 round)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} (1 round)

Standard-Grade Dragon Turtle Shellplate.name: 标准级龙龟壳板护甲 Standard-Grade Dragon Turtle Shellplate Armor
Standard-Grade Dragon Turtle Shellplate.description:
采集宝典注记：由于自定义材料尚未受支持，此物品代表一件通用的龙龟甲壳板护甲，以及其自动化规则。你可以编辑其细节与特征，以匹配你想要的护甲类型，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{皮甲} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{胸甲}。

穿戴龙龟甲壳板护甲者具有火焰抗力 15。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包含价值至少 200 gp + 每点负载 20 gp 的龙龟甲壳板。

Harvest Compendium Note: As custom materials are not yet supported, this item represents a generic piece of Dragon Turtle Shellplate armor, along with its automated rules. You can edit its details and traits to match the type of armor you want, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}.

The wearer of dragon turtle shellplate armor has fire resistance 15.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include dragon turtle shellplate worth at least 200 gp + 20 gp per Bulk.

Unprocessed Sin Spirit (Lust).name: 未净化罪灵（色欲） Unprocessed Sin Spirit (Lust)
Unprocessed Sin Spirit (Lust).description:
启动 1 交互

罪孽灵质会对其目标造成极其不利的效果。确切效果取决于其采集自哪一种罪裔魔。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2} 且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}（2 轮）

Activate 1 Interact

Sin spirit can have incredibly adverse effects on its target. The exact effects vary depending on the sinspawn it was harvested from.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} (2 rounds)

Mug Made from Pewter.name: 白镴制马克杯 Mug Made from Pewter

Mukradi Legs.name: 穆克拉迪腿 Mukradi Legs
Mukradi Legs.description:
这条腿纤细而柔韧。一条腿可用于制作一件来自弓或长矛武器组的武器。该武器上蚀刻有一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.KCQRFvUgbyclvOGi]{Striking (Greater)}符文。该武器的伤害骰也有所增加，造成1d6伤害而非1d4，1d8而非1d6，依此类推（最高至1d12）。

This leg is slender and flexible. A leg can be used to craft a weapon from the bow or spear weapon groups. The weapon has a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.KCQRFvUgbyclvOGi]{Striking (Greater)} rune etched into it. This weapon also has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4, 1d8 instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12).

Smilodon Fangs.name: 剑齿虎獠牙 Smilodon Fangs
Smilodon Fangs.description:
这颗剑齿虎的獠牙又大又锋利。獠牙可以用于制作一把来自匕首组的武器。该武器的伤害骰增加，造成 1d6 伤害而非 1d4。1d8 伤害而非 1d6，依此类推（最大至 1d12）。它也具有背刺者特征。

This smilodon fang is large and sharp. A fang can be used to craft a weapon from the knife group. This weapon has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4. 1d8 damage instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12). It also has the backstabber trait.

Book of Sigils.name: 纹章之书 Book of Sigils
Book of Sigils.description:
这本书里满是难以辨识的印记与符号。每天一次，当你尝试进行使用秘学的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定时，你可以花费1分钟查阅这本书，以在该检定上获得+2物品加值。

The book is filled with indecipherable sigils and symbols. Once per day, you can spend 1 minute consulting the book when trying to make a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} check using Occultism to gain a +2 item bonus to the check.

Helm of Death Protection.name: 死亡防护头盔 Helm of Death Protection
Helm of Death Protection.description:
佩戴时，这顶头盔保护其佩戴者免于
某些必死结局。

启动 1 想象

频率 每日一次

效果 你获得对死亡效果的免疫，持续1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.xYQMaFwsubBPBL6E]{Effect: Helm of Death Protection}

制作需求 初始原材料必须包含两个ceustodaemon角、一个leukodaemon头骨，或其他合适的物品（见 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-journals.mALAKsH9rWdxCVAi]{Bestiary Creature Entries}）。

While worn, this helmet protects its wearer from
certain death.

Activate 1 envision

Frequency once per day

Effect You gain immunity to death effects for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.xYQMaFwsubBPBL6E]{Effect: Helm of Death Protection}

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include two ceustodaemon horns, one leukodaemon skull, or other suitable item (see @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-journals.mALAKsH9rWdxCVAi]{Bestiary Creature Entries}).

Ancient Dragon Head.name: 远古巨龙头颅 Ancient Dragon Head
Ancient Dragon Head.description:
如果采集了头部，你就无法从该生物身上采集任何牙齿、獠牙或眼睛。

If the head is harvested, you cannot harvest any teeth, fang, or eyes from the creature.

Standard-Grade Baomal Shellplate Armor.name: 标准级宝摩尔贝壳板护甲 Standard-Grade Baomal Shellplate Armor
Standard-Grade Baomal Shellplate Armor.description:
采集汇编注记：由于系统尚不支持自定义材料，该物品代表一件通用的宝玛尔壳板护甲，以及其自动化规则。你可以编辑其细节和特征，以匹配你想要的护甲类型，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}。

穿戴宝玛尔壳板护甲者获得物理抗力 5。

启动 R 构想

频率 每日一次

触发 你受到物理伤害

效果 该护甲所给予的物理抗力在对抗该次触发的伤害时提升至 15。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.JBD6OcV6tCNwWfgD]{效果：宝玛尔壳板护甲}

制作需求 初始原材料包括价值至少 200 gp 的宝玛尔壳板，外加每 负载 20 gp。

Harvest Compendium Note: As custom materials are not yet supported in the system, this item represents a generic piece of Baomal Shellplate armor, along with its automated rules. You can edit its details and traits to match the type of armor you want, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}.

The wearer of baomal shellplate armor has physical resistance 5.

Activate R envision

Frequency once per day

Trigger You take physical damage

Effect The physical resistance granted by the armor increases to 15 against the triggering damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.JBD6OcV6tCNwWfgD]{Effect: Baomal Shellplate Armor}

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials include baomal shellplate worth at least 200 gp + 20 gp per Bulk.

Vrock Vocal Cords.name: 弗洛克鸟妖声带 Vrock Vocal Cords
Vrock Vocal Cords.description:
这些声带以几乎难以听见的音调振动。这些声带可以被制作成一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.XshmhpcRVYOVdDGA]{弗洛克尖啸号角}

These vocal cords vibrate with a nearly inaudible tone. The cords can be crafted into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.XshmhpcRVYOVdDGA]{Horn of Vrock Screeching}

Veiled Master Tentacles.name: 帷幕宗师触手 Veiled Master Tentacles
Veiled Master Tentacles.description:
这些触手蜷曲并抽搐，仿佛它们有自己的意识。触手可用于制作一把鞭子。该武器上蚀刻有一枚@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.pOoEiuEuITm4I2Il]{武器强效（+2）}符文。

These tentacles curl and twitch, as though they have a mind of their own. A tentacle can be used to craft a whip. The weapon has a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.pOoEiuEuITm4I2Il]{Weapon Potency (+2)} rune etched into it.

Snakeskin (Ball Python).name: 蛇皮（球蟒） Snakeskin (Ball Python)
Snakeskin (Ball Python).description:
凭借其独特的纹理和美丽的鳞片，蛇皮可以在许多市场中找到并出售。

With its distinctive pattern and beautiful scales, snakeskin can be found and sold in many markets.

Shark Teeth.name: 鲨齿 Shark Teeth
Shark Teeth.description:
这些牙很大且带锯齿。这些牙可用于制作一个 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Tj4uaNw2lgevxGl7]{鲨鱼牙护符}或一个 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{狼牙}。

These teeth are large and serrated. The teeth can be used to craft a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Tj4uaNw2lgevxGl7]{Shark Tooth Charm} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang}.

Remoraz Rawhide.name: 雷莫拉兹生皮 Remoraz Rawhide
Remoraz Rawhide.description:
这种生皮能够同时抵御冰与火。你可以使用这些生皮片段来制作一套 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.8axfvSvOSZGxrbmZ]{雷摩拉兹生皮皮甲或板甲护甲}

This rawhide can withstand both ice and flame. You can use these sections of rawhide to craft a set of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.8axfvSvOSZGxrbmZ]{Remorhaz Rawhide Leather or Plate Armor}

Empty Scroll Case.name: 空卷轴匣 Empty Scroll Case
Empty Scroll Case.description:
这个卷轴匣带有一条皮带，可挂在你的肩上或横跨胸前。它可容纳四张卷轴或其他羊皮纸放在其中。你可以通过 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F]{交互} 该匣来将物品收纳其中或将其取出。

This scroll case has a leather strap and hangs from your shoulder or over your chest. It can hold four scrolls or other pieces of parchment inside it. You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F]{Interact} with the case to stow items in it or remove them.

Chuul Tentacles.name: 夺骸蟹触手 Chuul Tentacles
Chuul Tentacles.description:
启动　F 操控

触发　你施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.DCQHaLrYXMI37dvW]{麻痹术}

触手会周期性地抽动并变得僵硬。当你启动它时，这一次的麻痹术改为以单动作施放，而非以双动作行动施放。

Activate F manipulate

Trigger You cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.DCQHaLrYXMI37dvW]{Paralyze}

The tentacle twitches and stiffens periodically. When you activate it, this instance of paralyze is cast a single action instead of two-action activity.

Shiv.name: 匕首 Shiv
Shiv.description:
这种原始的武器如同匕首般运作，但没有投掷与多用S特性。

This rudimentary weapon functions as a dagger without the thrown and versatile S properties.

Faceless Stalker Skin.name: 无面潜伏者皮肤 Faceless Stalker Skin
Faceless Stalker Skin.description:
启动 F 操控

触发 你施放一个双动作的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.dN8QBNuTiaBHCKUe]{Cursed Metamorphosis}

需求 你是奥秘学的专家。

皮肤融合成奇异的形状。当你启动这张皮肤时，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.dN8QBNuTiaBHCKUe]{Cursed Metamorphosis} 法术将以单动作施放，而不是一个双动作行动。

Activate F manipulate

Trigger You cast a two-action @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.dN8QBNuTiaBHCKUe]{Cursed Metamorphosis}

Requirements You are an expert in Arcana.

The skin melds into strange shapes. When you activate the skin, the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.dN8QBNuTiaBHCKUe]{Cursed Metamorphosis} spell is cast as a single action instead of a two-action activity.

Unprocessed Reefclaw Venom.name: 未加工的礁爪毒液 Unprocessed Reefclaw Venom
Unprocessed Reefclaw Venom.description:
激活 2 交互

这种毒液闻起来像海水。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:16]

最大持续时间 4 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}

Activate 2 Interact

This venom smells like saltwater.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:16]

Maximum Duration 4 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}

Boots of Trackless Steps.name: 无踪步之靴 Boots of Trackless Steps
Boots of Trackless Steps.description:
你在自然环境中总是获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.SB7cMECVtE06kByk]{Cover Tracks} 的好处，即使以全 速度移动也是如此。

制作 需求 初始的原始 材料必须包括两块绿龙足底贴片

You always gain the benefits of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.SB7cMECVtE06kByk]{Cover Tracks} in natural environments, even while moving at full Speed.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include two green dragon sole patches

Weakening Gas.name: 弱化气体 Weakening Gas
Weakening Gas.description:
启动 1 打击

这种气体带有刺鼻的气味，吸入时会灼痛。命中时，目标以及目标周围10英尺内的每个生物必须在一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:31] 中成功，否则将在1分钟内成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 2}（若为大失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 3}）

Activate 1 Strike

This gas has a sharp scent that hurts on inhalation. On a hit, the target and every creature within 10 feet of the target must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:31] or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} for 1 minute (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3} on a critical failure)

Mantis Mandibles.name: 螳螂颚钳 Mantis Mandibles
Mantis Mandibles.description:
启动 1 交互

这对颚在被吃下时会发出令人满足的脆响。吃下这对颚后，你会在战斗开始时迅速反应。在战斗的第1轮中，尚未行动的生物对你处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}。此效果持续1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.ykwUzz3yVE8zjsvb]{效果：螳螂颚}

Activate 1 Interact

This mandible has a satisfying crunch when eaten. After consuming this mandible, you react quickly when combat starts. During the first round of combat, creatures that haven't acted yet are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} to you. This effect lasts for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.ykwUzz3yVE8zjsvb]{Effect: Mantis Mandibles}

Pouches of Filth.name: 污秽小袋 Pouches of Filth
Pouches of Filth.description:
启动 F 操控

触发 你施放一个法术或使用一项能力，使一个生物变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱}

这团污秽散发着腐烂与秽物的恶臭。当你启动它时，被该法术或能力选为目标的生物在该豁免检定上承受 –2 环境减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.GrGgx92KYwx7tZi9]{效果：污秽小袋}

Activate F manipulate

Trigger You cast a spell or use an ability that causes a creature to become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled}

This filth stinks of rot and refuse. When you activate it, the creature targeted by the spell or ability suffers a –2 circumstance penalty on the saving throw.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.GrGgx92KYwx7tZi9]{Effect: Pouches of Filth}

Mu Spores.name: 穆菇孢子 Mu Spores
Mu Spores.description:
启动 F 操控

触发 你施放一个以非植物或真菌生物为目标且需要进行反射豁免的法术。

这些孢子会刺激眼睛和喉咙。当你启动它时，该法术的目标生物在对该法术进行的豁免检定上承受-2环境减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.coq7gBDS3jjLERmX]{效果：Mu 孢子}

Activate F manipulate

Trigger You cast a spell that targets a non-plant or fungi creature and requires a Reflex save.

These spores irritate the eyes and throat. When you activate it, the creature targeted by the spell suffers a -2 circumstance penalty on the saving throw for the spell.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.coq7gBDS3jjLERmX]{Effect: Mu Spores}

Tyrannosaurus Claws.name: 霸王龙爪 Tyrannosaurus Claws
Tyrannosaurus Claws.description:
这件物品的效果等同于一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{枭熊爪}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{狼牙}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{染血利爪}护符。你在贴附该护符时选择其中一种。

This functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear Claw}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon} talisman. You choose which when you affix the talisman.

Medical Textbook.name: 医学教科书 Medical Textbook
Medical Textbook.description:
如果你花费1小时研读这本书，你会对基础战地医疗与类人生物生理学有进一步的理解。你在医学检定上获得+2物品加值。该加值持续的小时数等于你的智力调整值（最低为1）。

If you spend 1 hour studying this book, you gain a further understanding of basic field medicine and humanoid physiology. You gain a +2 item bonus to Medicine checks. This bonus lasts for a number of hours equal to your Intelligence modifier (minimum of 1).

Bunyip Scent Gland.name: 邦尼普嗅腺 Bunyip Scent Gland
Bunyip Scent Gland.description:
启动 1 交互

这个腺体很小且油腻。吃下这个腺体后，你获得嗅觉，作为一种不精确嗅觉，射程为60英尺。你也获得血液嗅觉，使你可以在最远1英里外嗅到水体中的血液。这些感官持续1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.KmoohUKlNuhGzN30]{效果: Bunyip Scent Gland}

Activate 1 Interact

This gland is small and oily. After eating this gland, you gain scent as an imprecise scent to a range of 60 feet. You also gain blood scent, which allows you to smell blood in a body of water from up to 1 mile away. These senses last for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.KmoohUKlNuhGzN30]{Effect: Bunyip Scent Gland}

Unprocessed Viper Venom.name: 未加工的蝰蛇毒液 Unprocessed Viper Venom
Unprocessed Viper Venom.description:
启动 2 交互

这种毒液呈暗黄色。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15]

最长持续时间 4 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害 (1 轮)

Activate 2 Interact

This venom is a dull yellow color.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15]

Maximum Duration 4 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Nilith Hide.name: 尼利斯皮革 Nilith Hide
Nilith Hide.description:
启动 1 交互

这张皮革很有嚼劲，难以下咽。食用这张皮革后，你在1小时内获得对精神与物理伤害（银除外）5点抗力。

Activate 1 Interact

The hide is chewy and is hard to swallow. After consuming this hide, you gain resistance 5 to mental and physical damage (except silver) for 1 hour.

Slippery Slime.name: 滑溜黏液 Slippery Slime
Slippery Slime.description:
启动1 打击

这种黏液摸起来又黏又油。命中时，被打击的生物变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，并且其各项速度承受-5英尺减值，持续1小时或直到黏液被移除为止。被缠住的生物或与该生物相邻的生物可通过合计三次交互 actios 来移除黏液。这些动作不需要连续进行，也不必由同一个生物完成。

Activate 1 Strike

This slime is sticky and oily to the touch. On a hit, a struck creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} and takes a -5-foot penalty to its Speeds for 1 hour or until the slime is removed. The slime can be removed with a total of three Interact actios by the entangled creature or creatures adjacent to the creature. These actions don't need to be consecutive or made by the same creature.

Ice Linnorm Hide.name: 冰霜林诺姆皮革 Ice Linnorm Hide
Ice Linnorm Hide.description:
这种皮革具有与龙皮类似的特性。你可以使用这些皮革的部分来制作一套龙皮护甲或一面龙皮盾牌，其免疫寒冷伤害。

This hide holds similar properties to dragonhide. You can use these sections of hide to craft a set of dragonhide armor or a dragonhide shield that is immune to cold damage.

Horn of Cauthooj Screeching.name: 考苏吉尖啸号角 Horn of Cauthooj Screeching
Horn of Cauthooj Screeching.description:
这个长号角以考索吉羽毛装饰。它可以作为乐器演奏，使表演检定获得+2物品加值。

启动 2 操控（听觉，失能，精神，原始）

频率 每小时一次

效果 你吹响号角并发出悠长的嚎叫，使附近的生物变得野性而暴力。除你之外，所有能听见号角、位于@Template[type:emanation|distance:60]范围内的生物都必须尝试一次@Check[type:will|dc:24|traits:auditory,incapacitation,mental,primal]意志豁免以抵抗效果。

大成功 目标不受影响，且在24小时内暂时免疫。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑}状态1轮。

大失败 目标困惑1轮，并立即攻击自身（以困惑时攻击自身的常规方式）。这次打击不会使该生物获得纯骰检定以从困惑中恢复。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包括一套考索吉声带

This long horn is decorated with cauthooj feathers. It can be played as an instrument, granting a +2 item bonus to Performance checks.

Activate 2 manipulate (auditory, incapacitation, mental, primal)

Frequency once per hour

Effect You blow in the horn and create an ululating cry, turning nearby creatures wild and violent. Each creature within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:60] that can hear the horn other than you must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:24|traits:auditory,incapacitation,mental,primal] save to resist the effect.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and is temporarily immune for 24 hours.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The target is confused for 1 round and immediately attacks itself (in the normal fashion for attacking oneself while confused). This Strike doesn’t give the creature a flat check to recover from being confused.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include one set of cauthooj vocal cords

Alghollthu Rawhide.name: 阿尔古苏生皮 Alghollthu Rawhide
Alghollthu Rawhide.description:
这种生皮摸起来十分黏滑。你可以使用这些生皮片段来制作一套@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.EawipRrjmoYu1Xed]{阿尔古苏生皮皮革护甲}。

This rawhide is slimy to the touch. You can use these sections of rawhide to craft a set of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.EawipRrjmoYu1Xed]{Alghollthu Rawhide Leather Armor}.

Nilith Claws.name: 尼利斯的爪 Nilith Claws
Nilith Claws.description:
这只爪呈现出可怕的弧度并带有锋利的尖端。爪可以用来制作一把来自匕首武器组的武器。这把武器的伤害骰增加，造成1d6伤害而非1d4、1d8而非1d6，依此类推（最高至1d12）。如果它尚未拥有，还会获得灵巧（武器特征）。

This claw has a nasty curve and a sharp point. A claw can be used to craft a weapon from the knife weapon group. This weapon has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4, 1d8 instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12). It also has the agile weapon trait if it doesn't already.

Unprocessed Sin Spirit (Pride).name: 未净化的罪灵（傲慢） Unprocessed Sin Spirit (Pride)
Unprocessed Sin Spirit (Pride).description:
启动 1 交互

罪孽之灵会对其目标造成极其不利的效果。其具体效果取决于采集它的罪孽孽生体。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}（2 轮）

Activate 1 Interact

Sin spirit can have incredibly adverse effects on its target. The exact effects vary depending on the sinspawn it was harvested from.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (2 rounds)

Stone Golem Engine Core.name: 石魔像引擎核心 Stone Golem Engine Core
Stone Golem Engine Core.description:
石魔像的核心由坚硬的岩石制成，在被击败的魔像瓦砾中可能很难发现。它可以卖给收藏家和发明家，也可以干脆当作废料出售。

The core of the stone golem is made of hard rock and can be difficult to spot among the rubble of the defeated golem. It can be sold to collectors and inventors, or simply as scrap.

Chimera Claws.name: 奇美拉之爪 Chimera Claws
Chimera Claws.description:
这件物品的功能等同于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{枭熊爪}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{狼牙}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{血染利爪}护符。你在固定该护符时选择其中一种。

This functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear Claw}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon} talisman. You choose which when you affix the talisman.

Unprocessed Chuul Paralytic Venom.name: 未处理的丘尔麻痹毒液 Unprocessed Chuul Paralytic Venom
Unprocessed Chuul Paralytic Venom.description:
启动 2 交互

丘尔毒液会暂时使一名生物麻痹。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:23]

最大持续时间 6轮

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}（1轮）

Activate 2 Interact

Chuul venom temporarily paralyzes a creature.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:23]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} (1 round)

High-Grade Faerie Dragonhide Armor.name: 高等精制仙灵龙皮护甲 High-Grade Faerie Dragonhide Armor
High-Grade Faerie Dragonhide Armor.description:
采集宝典注记：由于尚不支持自定义材料，该物品代表一件通用的妖精龙生皮护甲，以及其自动化规则。你可以编辑其细节与特征以匹配你想要的护甲类型，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}。

妖精龙皮护甲闪烁着虹彩般的色泽。

启动 2 构想

频率 每天一次

效果 你变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}，如同受到一个2环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} 法术的影响。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包含价值至少 4100 gp + 每负载 410 gp 的妖精龙皮。

Harvest Compendium Note: As custom materials are not yet supported, this item represents a generic piece of Faerie Dragon Rawhide armor, along with its automated rules. You can edit its details and traits to match the type of armor you want, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}.

Faerie dragonhide armor shimmers in iridescent colors.

Activate 2 envision

Frequency once per day

Effect You turn @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} as if by a 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} spell.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include faerie dragonhide worth at least 4100 gp + 410 gp per Bulk.

Succubus Tongue.name: 魅魔之舌 Succubus Tongue
Succubus Tongue.description:
激活 1 互动

这条舌头呈鲜红色。食用这条舌头后，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.SwUiVavHKMWG7t5K] 法术的效果，持续 1 小时。

Activate 1 Interact

This tongue is bright red. After consuming this tongue, you gain the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.SwUiVavHKMWG7t5K] spell for 1 hour.

Iron Golem Engine Core.name: 铁魔像引擎核心 Iron Golem Engine Core
Iron Golem Engine Core.description:
铁杖与钢索保护并包裹着铁魔像的核心。它可以卖给收藏家和发明家，或仅仅作为废料出售。

Rods of iron and cords of steel protect and contain the iron golem's core. It can be sold to collectors and inventors, or simply as scrap.

Protean Blood.name: 变幻血液 Protean Blood
Protean Blood.description:
启用 1 交互

这种血液浓稠且呈虹彩。饮用这种血液后，你获得对酸、闪电或音波伤害的抗力5，持续1小时。你在饮用血液时选择伤害类型。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.PITlYREJAoCb6WW6]{效果：变幻者血液}

Activate 1 Interact

This blood is thick and iridescent. After consuming this blood, you gain resistance 5 to acid, electricity, or sonic damage for 1 hour. You choose the damage type when you drink the blood.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.PITlYREJAoCb6WW6]{Effect: Protean Blood}

Unprocessed Web Lurker Venom.name: 未处理的蛛网潜伏者毒液 Unprocessed Web Lurker Venom
Unprocessed Web Lurker Venom.description:
启动 2 交互

这种毒液略微半透明。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:16]

最大持续时间 10 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害、off-guard 与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}（1 轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This venom is slightly translucent.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:16]

Maximum Duration 10 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage, off-guard and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 round)

Draconic Ammunition (Green).name: 龙族弹药（绿） Draconic Ammunition (Green)
Draconic Ammunition (Green).description:
弹药 箭矢、弩矢

被该弹药命中的生物会受到1d6点伤害，伤害类型与巨龙的颜色相符（见下表）。

制作需求 初始制作材料必须包含一颗龙牙或其他合适的牙（见生物条目）。

巨龙类型 伤害类型
黑龙或铜龙 酸
蓝龙或黄铜龙 电击
黄铜龙、金龙或红龙 火焰
绿龙 毒药
银龙或白龙 寒冷

 

Ammunition arrow, bolt

A creature hit with this ammunition takes 1d6 damage of a type matching the dragon's color (see the table below).

Craft Requirements The initial crafting materials must include one dragon tooth or other suitable tooth (see creature entries).

Dragon Type Damage Type
Black or Copper Acid
Blue or Brass Electricity
Brass, gold, or red Fire
Green Poison
Silver or white Cold

Adamantine Golem Engine Core.name: 精金魔像引擎核心 Adamantine Golem Engine Core
Adamantine Golem Engine Core.description:
精金魔像的心脏燃烧着十几座熔炉的力量。它是一件强大的物品，甚至可以围绕它建造一整座熔炉。

The heart of an adamantine golem burns with the power of a dozen forges. It is a powerful item, and an entire forge can be built around it.

Manticore Claws.name: 蝎尾狮之爪 Manticore Claws
Manticore Claws.description:
此物品的效果等同于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{枭熊爪}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{狼牙}或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{血腥利爪}护符。你在固定护符时选择其中一种。

This functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear Claw}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon} talisman. You choose which when you affix the talisman.

Leukodaemon Feathers.name: 白魔羽毛 Leukodaemon Feathers
Leukodaemon Feathers.description:
这根羽毛通体纯黑，并散发着酸臭味。这些羽毛可以被制作成一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.n2TUsLbQxqCFjPyV]{邪恶弹药}。

This feather is pure black and has a sour smell. The feathers can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.n2TUsLbQxqCFjPyV]{Evil Ammunition}.

Dragon Blood (Young).name: 龙族血液（幼年） Dragon Blood (Young)
Dragon Blood (Young).description:
这种血液很浓稠，并带有刺鼻的气味。这种血液可用于制作幼龙吐息药水，具体取决于采集血液的龙的种类。

龙的种类 药水
黑龙或铜龙 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qNIv0owESzOzo1s0]{黑龙吐息药水（幼）}
蓝龙或黄铜龙 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.TzXNMv7tnFy1FYgg]{青铜龙吐息药水（幼）}
黄铜龙、金龙或红龙 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.fkGHYeGVK6O2VW1s]{红龙吐息药水（幼）}
绿龙 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.vvgCQzWkScCzte7K]{绿龙吐息药水（幼）}
银龙或白龙 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.LKwI47eeJC0Y4hGu]{银龙吐息药水（幼）}

 

This blood is thick and has a sharp smell. This blood can be used to craft a Young Dragon's Breath Potion, depending on the type of dragon the blood was harvested from.

Dragon Type Potion
Black or Copper @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qNIv0owESzOzo1s0]{Black Dragon's Breath Potion (Young)}
Blue or Brass @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.TzXNMv7tnFy1FYgg]{Bronze Dragon's Breath Potion (Young)}
Brass, gold, or red @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.fkGHYeGVK6O2VW1s]{Red Dragon's Breath Potion (Young)}
Green @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.vvgCQzWkScCzte7K]{Green Dragon's Breath Potion (Young)}
Silver or white @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.LKwI47eeJC0Y4hGu]{Silver Dragon's Breath Potion (Young)}

Owlbear Vocal Cords.name: 枭熊发声带 Owlbear Vocal Cords
Owlbear Vocal Cords.description:
这些声带只能发出响亮的尖啸。这些声带可以被制作成一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.s41ypTdQsknAvsNL]{枭熊尖啸号角}

These vocal cords can only produce a loud screech. The cords can be crafted into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.s41ypTdQsknAvsNL]{Horn of Owlbear Screeching}

Cave Worm Rawhide.name: 洞穴蠕虫生皮 Cave Worm Rawhide
Cave Worm Rawhide.description:
这种皮革很厚，颜色与它来源的洞穴蠕虫相匹配。你可以使用这些皮革片段来制作一套@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.8P7hBkn8GnyWUUnd]{洞穴蠕虫生皮皮革或板甲护甲}

This hide is thick and matches the color of the cave worm it came from. You can use these sections of hide to craft a set of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.8P7hBkn8GnyWUUnd]{Cave Worm Rawhide Leather or Plate Armor}

Celestial Feathers.name: 天界羽毛 Celestial Feathers
Celestial Feathers.description:
这根羽毛柔软如天鹅绒，在光线下举起时会闪闪发光。这些羽毛可用于制作一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.rNLvpOZB6qjHuWXT]{神圣弹药}或一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.cJKQ5uwGQhilXq8G]{幸运羽毛}。

This feather is soft like velvet and glitters when held up to a light. The feathers can be used to craft a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.rNLvpOZB6qjHuWXT]{Holy Ammunition} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.cJKQ5uwGQhilXq8G]{Lucky Feather}.

Dark Naga Eyes.name: 黑暗娜迦之眼 Dark Naga Eyes
Dark Naga Eyes.description:
启动 1 交互

这只眼睛似乎能将你看穿。吞下这只眼睛后，奥术能量会短暂在你体内激荡，使你能在接下来的1小时内施放一次@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.KHnhPHL4x1AQHfbC]{心灵探知}（3环，法术DC 20）。

Activate 1 Interact

This eye is looking right through you. After consuming this eye, arcane power briefly surges through you, allowing you to cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.KHnhPHL4x1AQHfbC]{Mind Reading} at 3rd-rank (spell DC 20) once within the next hour.

Cauthooj Foot Claws.name: 考图吉脚爪 Cauthooj Foot Claws
Cauthooj Foot Claws.description:
这些足部爪既柔韧又富有弹性。它们可用于制作一双@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.ecqz1iUGtyQEkZwy]{弹跃之靴}。

These foot claws are flexible and springy. They can be used to craft a pair of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.ecqz1iUGtyQEkZwy]{Boots of Bounding}.

Darkness Grenade (Lesser).name: 黑暗手榴弹（低级） Darkness Grenade (Lesser)
Darkness Grenade (Lesser).description:
当你启动这枚手雷时，你让它沿着地面弹跳，直到它在距你20英尺内一处未被占据的空间中停下。一团浓厚的 @Template[type:burst|distance:15]{15英尺半径} 黑暗帷幕自外壳中爆发，阻止光线在区域内穿透或在区域内发出，效果如同 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.4GE2ZdODgIQtg51c]{黑暗} 法术。黑暗的持续时间为 [[/r 1d4 + 1#黑暗持续时间]] 轮。

When you activate this grenade, you bounce it along the floor until it comes to rest in an unoccupied space within 20 feet of you. A thick @Template[type:burst|distance:15]{15-foot-radius} shroud of darkness erupts from the shell, preventing light from penetrating or emanating within the area, like with the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.4GE2ZdODgIQtg51c]{Darkness} spell. The darkness lasts for [[/r 1d4 + 1#Darkness duration]] rounds.

Dragon Fangs (Green).name: 龙牙（绿） Dragon Fangs (Green)
Dragon Fangs (Green).description:
这颗獠牙渗出绿绿色的毒药。獠牙可用于制作一把造成穿刺伤害的武器。该武器是一把+1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.leqZKQWSmvaM3Tf7]{Toxic}武器。该武器的伤害骰也会提高，造成1d6伤害而非1d4，1d8而非1d6，以此类推（最高至1d12）。

This fang exudes greenish poison. A fang can be used to craft a weapon that deals piercing damage. The weapon is a +1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.leqZKQWSmvaM3Tf7]{Toxic} weapon. This weapon also has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4, 1d8 instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12).

Baomal Shellplates.name: 鲍马尔甲壳板 Baomal Shellplates
Baomal Shellplates.description:
这些甲壳板坚韧而坚硬。你可以使用这些甲壳板来制作一套 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.JPMN64sOZA7MuUVX]{Baomal 甲壳板护甲}。

These shellplates are tough and hard. You can use these shellplates to craft a set of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.JPMN64sOZA7MuUVX]{Baomal Shellplate Armor}.

Astradaemon Tail.name: 阿斯特拉戴蒙之尾 Astradaemon Tail
Astradaemon Tail.description:
这条尾巴又长又纤细。尾巴可以用于制作一把@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.f1gwoTkf3Nn0v3PN]{Whip}。该武器上蚀刻有一枚@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.KCQRFvUgbyclvOGi]{Striking (Greater)}符文。该武器的伤害骰也有所增加，造成1d6而非1d4、1d8而非1d6，依此类推（最大至1d12）。

This tail is long and slender. A tail can be used to craft a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.f1gwoTkf3Nn0v3PN]{Whip}. The weapon has a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.KCQRFvUgbyclvOGi]{Striking (Greater)} rune etched into it. This weapon also has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 instead of 1d4, 1d8 instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12).

Signet Ring.name: 玺戒 Signet Ring
Signet Ring.description:
这枚印戒上刻有某个贵族家族的纹章。此印戒设计用于压入蜡中，在信件上制作蜡封。佩戴此戒指时，你在进行将自己冒充为相关贵族家族成员的欺骗检定时，获得+2物品加值。

This signet ring has the crest of a noble family on it. The signet is designed to be pushed into wax to make wax seals on letters. While wearing this ring, you gain a +2 item bonus to Deception checks made to pass yourself off as a member of the relevant noble family.

Impure Acid.name: 不纯强酸 Impure Acid
Impure Acid.description:
这种酸液中含有碎屑和污垢。不纯的酸液可用于制作 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.M1k5QQc1qQLxzyCK]{酸液瓶}、一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.903CuhvVUhE1lmoB]{腐蚀性弹药}，或一瓶 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.u1gZaIZHnEfZDc1o]{抗酸药水}。

This acid has debris and dirt in it. Impure acid can be used to craft an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.M1k5QQc1qQLxzyCK]{Acid Flask}, a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.903CuhvVUhE1lmoB]{Corrosive Ammunition}, or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.u1gZaIZHnEfZDc1o]{Potion of Acid Resistance}.

Winter Wolf Teeth.name: 冬狼之牙 Winter Wolf Teeth
Winter Wolf Teeth.description:
此物如同@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{枭熊爪}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{狼牙}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{染血利爪}护符般发挥作用。你在固定该护符时选择其一。

This functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear Claw}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon} talisman. You choose which when you affix the talisman.

Dinosaur Teeth.name: 恐龙之牙 Dinosaur Teeth
Dinosaur Teeth.description:
这些牙极其锋利。一颗牙可以被制作成一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.DBe6zma7g7Gz6YH8]{动物精准弹药}。

These teeth are incredibly sharp. A tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.DBe6zma7g7Gz6YH8]{Animal Precision Ammunition}.

Winter Cloak.name: 冬之斗篷 Winter Cloak
Winter Cloak.description:
这件斗篷厚重而沉。穿着斗篷时，你在寒冷温度下受到保护，最高可达极寒。

启动 R 观想

频率 每日一次

触发 你受到寒冷伤害

效果 你获得对触发的伤害的抗力15。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.TK9yrTXg3T9afNtu]{Effect: Winter Cloak}

制作需求 初始原材料必须包括一张冬狼皮或其他合适的皮毛（见 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-journals.mALAKsH9rWdxCVAi]{Bestiary Creature Entries}）。

This cloak thick and heavy. While wearing the cloak, you are protected from cold temperatures up to incredible cold.

Activate R envision

Frequency once per day

Trigger You take cold damage

Effect You gain resistance 15 to the triggering damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.TK9yrTXg3T9afNtu]{Effect: Winter Cloak}

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include one winter wolf pelt or other suitable pelt (see @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-journals.mALAKsH9rWdxCVAi]{Bestiary Creature Entries}).

Ghost Bane Oil.name: 幽灵（特征）克星油 Ghost Bane Oil
Ghost Bane Oil.description:
启动 1 交互

这种油浓稠且呈虹彩。该油可以涂抹在一把近战武器上，或涂抹在五发弹药上。持续1分钟，该武器或弹药可以伤害无实体生物，仿佛其上蚀刻有幽灵接触符文一般。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.MSMhjdGxTGyWoYul]{效果：幽灵克星油}

制作需求 初始制作材料必须包括一瓶灵质。 

Activate 1 Interact

This oil is thick and iridescent. The oil can be applied to a melee weapon or to five pieces of ammunition. For 1 minute, the weapon or ammunition can harm incorporeal creatures, as though it had ghost touch rune etched into it.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.MSMhjdGxTGyWoYul]{Effect: Ghost Bane Oil}

Craft Requirements The initial crafting materials must include one vial of ectoplasm.

Heart of Treerazer.name: 毁木者之心 Heart of Treerazer
Heart of Treerazer.description:
启动 2 交互

这颗心脏散发着恶臭，并渗出咸涩的血液。它散发着微弱的泛绿光芒。吞食这颗心脏后，你会被充盈的恶魔能量所灌注。在接下来的7天内，你有一次机会可以施放@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.tsKnoBuBbKMXkiz5]{深渊契约}仪式，即使你不是恶魔也可以。食用这颗心脏并不会让你获得该仪式的知识。你仍必须知晓该仪式才能施放它，并且该仪式的所有其他需求仍然适用。

Activate 2 Interact

This heart has a foul stench and oozes brackish blood. It glows with a faint greenish light. After consuming the heart, you are filled with fiendish energy. Once within the next 7 days, you can cast the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.tsKnoBuBbKMXkiz5]{Abyssal Pact} ritual even if you aren't a demon. Eating the heart does not give you knowledge of the ritual. You must still know the ritual in order to cast it, and all other requirements of the ritual must still apply.

Unprocessed Azure Worm Venom.name: 未加工的蓝晶巨虫毒液 Unprocessed Azure Worm Venom
Unprocessed Azure Worm Venom.description:
启用 2 交互

这种毒液呈绿色，带有黄色条纹。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:34]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[3d6[poison]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[4d6[poison]] 伤害并且 笨拙 2（1 轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[6d6[poison]] 伤害并且 笨拙 2（1 轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This venom is green with streaks of yellow.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:34]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[3d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[4d6[poison]] damage and clumsy 2 (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[6d6[poison]] damage and clumsy 2 (1 round)

Dragon Turtle Teeth.name: 龙龟之牙 Dragon Turtle Teeth
Dragon Turtle Teeth.description:
这颗牙很干净且锋利。这颗牙可以被制作成一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{怪物精准弹药}。

This tooth is clean and sharp. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{Monster Precision Ammunition}.

Megaprimatus Head.name: 巨型灵长目头颅 Megaprimatus Head
Megaprimatus Head.description:
如果头部已被采集，你无法从该生物身上采集任何獠牙。

If the head is harvested, you cannot harvest any fangs from the creature.

Flaming Rune Framework.name: 烈焰符文框架 Flaming Rune Framework
Flaming Rune Framework.description:
该框架概述了安装一枚@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.XszNvxnymWYRaoTp]{Flaming}符文的步骤。当你将强袭符文蚀刻到一把武器上时，其价格降低25%。

This framework outlines the steps to install a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.XszNvxnymWYRaoTp]{Flaming} rune. When you etch the striking rune into a weapon, its price is lowered by 25%.

Carver's Kit.name: 雕刻工具套装 Carver's Kit
Carver's Kit.description:
如果没有合适的工具，只能获得生物战利品的一部分。诸如损坏的武器和护甲之类的物品可以直接捡起，但要完整采收一个生物则需要技能与巧劲。这种等级的精密操作需要使用一种称为雕刻工工具包的工匠工具，它是一套工具包，由刮刀、剁碎刀片、骨锯以及数把精细小刀组成。

Without the appropriate tools, only part of a creature’s loot can be obtained. Items such as broken weapons and armor can simply be picked up, but fully harvesting a creature requires skill and finesse. This level of precision requires the use of a type of artisan’s tools called a carver’s kit, a toolkit that consists of scrapers, a mincing blade, bonesaws, and several fine knives.

Stuffed Spider Doll.name: 填充蜘蛛玩偶 Stuffed Spider Doll
Stuffed Spider Doll.description:
启动 2 交互

这只小型填充蜘蛛的细节出人意料地精致。你通过将蜘蛛撕成两半并把碎片扔向你10英尺内的一处空旷空间来启动它。一只@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.9X7hOvCKy1bqw0g6]{巨型狼蛛}被召唤到该空间内。该蜘蛛具有被召唤（特征），并持续10分钟或直到其生命值降至0，以先发生者为准。你不需要维持一个法术来指挥这些被召唤的生物。

Activate 2 Interact

This small stuffed spider is surprisingly detailed. You activate the spider by tearing it in two and throwing the pieces at a clear space within 10 feet of you. A @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.9X7hOvCKy1bqw0g6]{Giant Tarantula} is summoned in the space. The spider has the summoned trait and remains for 10 minutes or until reduced to 0 Hit Points, whichever comes first. You do not need to Sustain a Spell to direct these summoned creatures.

Lightning Concentrate.name: 闪电（专注） Lightning Concentrate
Lightning Concentrate.description:
这些带蓝色的水晶闪耀着闪电的精华。闪电浓缩物可用于制作 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.AFR01HVd7DcZvkpP]{Bottled Lightning} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.cAyxcRSSnfscGyMa]{Potion of Electricity Resistance}。

These blueish crystals glow with the essence of lightning. Lightning concentrate can be used to craft @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.AFR01HVd7DcZvkpP]{Bottled Lightning} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.cAyxcRSSnfscGyMa]{Potion of Electricity Resistance}.

Simurgh Heart.name: 西穆尔格之心 Simurgh Heart
Simurgh Heart.description:
这颗心脏巨大而强壮。这颗心脏可以被制作成一根@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.jk6upKuQYkcKRJw4]{西穆尔格之心杖}。

This heart is big and strong. The heart can be crafted into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.jk6upKuQYkcKRJw4]{Heartstaff of the Simurgh}.

Construction Schematics.name: 构造蓝图 Construction Schematics
Construction Schematics.description:
如果你在尝试回忆知识以了解示意图中列出的建筑物时查阅这些图纸，你在该次掷骰上获得+1物品加值。

If you consult these schematics while trying to Recall Knowledge about the buildings listed in the schematics, you gain a +1 item bonus to the roll.

Nymph Heart.name: 宁芙（特征）之心 Nymph Heart
Nymph Heart.description:
启动 F 操控

触发 你施放一个具有情绪（特征）的法术，该法术以另一名生物为目标并要求其进行一次豁免检定。

这颗心看起来像一束根须或水生花朵，取决于它采自哪种宁芙（特征）。当你启动它时，该法术的目标生物在其豁免上承受 -1 环境减值。

Activate F manipulate

Trigger You cast a spell with the emotion trait that targets another creature and requires them to make a saving throw.

The heart looks like a bundle of roots or watery flowers, depending on the type of nymph it was harvested from. When you activate it, the creature targeted by the spell suffers a -1 circumstance penalty on its save.

Standard-Grade Barghest Rawhide Armor.name: 标准级巴盖斯特生皮护甲 Standard-Grade Barghest Rawhide Armor
Standard-Grade Barghest Rawhide Armor.description:
采集宝典注记：由于系统尚不支持自定义材料，本物品代表一件通用的巴盖斯特生皮护甲，以及其自动化规则。你可以编辑其细节与特征以匹配你想要的护甲类型，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{皮甲} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{胸甲}。

穿戴巴盖斯特生皮护甲者获得火焰抗力 5 与物理抗力 5（魔法除外）。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包含价值至少 60 gp + 每 负载 6 gp 的巴盖斯特生皮。

Harvest Compendium Note: As custom materials are not yet supported in the system, this item represents a generic piece of Barghest Rawhide armor, along with its automated rules. You can edit its details and traits to match the type of armor you want, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}.

The wearer of barghest rawhide armor has fire resistance 5 and physical resistance 5 (except magical).

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include barghest rawhide worth at least 60 gp + 6 gp per Bulk.

Unprocessed Sin Spirit (Sloth).name: 未净化的罪孽灵（怠惰） Unprocessed Sin Spirit (Sloth)
Unprocessed Sin Spirit (Sloth).description:
启动 1 交互

罪孽之灵能对其目标造成极其不利的效果。具体效果会因其采集自的罪孽孳生体而异。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17]

最大持续时间 6轮

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（1轮）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}，且所有速度承受-10尺状态减值，持续1分钟（2轮）

Activate 1 Interact

Sin spirit can have incredibly adverse effects on its target. The exact effects vary depending on the sinspawn it was harvested from.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} and a -10-foot status penalty to all Speeds for 1 minute (2 rounds)

Hyaenodon Heart.name: 鬣狗龙之心 Hyaenodon Heart
Hyaenodon Heart.description:
启动 2 交互

这颗心脏黑暗而强健。你可以吞食这颗心脏，使自己在1小时内获得对 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.39CqlOzlHjEhh0E4]{Slam Down} 专长的许可。

Activate 2 Interact

This heart is dark and strong. You can consume the heart, granting yourself access to the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.39CqlOzlHjEhh0E4]{Slam Down} feat for 1 hour.

Rust Monster Antennae.name: 锈蚀怪物触角 Rust Monster Antennae
Rust Monster Antennae.description:
启动 F 观想

触发 你成功对一名穿戴或持握由金属制成的物品的生物造成一次打击。

这根抽搐的触角覆盖着一层红锈。当你启动该触角时，你对目标穿戴或携带的一件金属物品造成 @Damage[2d6] 伤害（大成功时加倍），无视其硬度。若你命中一件无人看管的金属物品，该物品自动承受此伤害。若被作为目标的生物使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.m4HQ2o5aPxjXf2kY]{盾牌格挡} 反应动作（）并以一面金属盾牌对抗该攻击，则该盾牌自动获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.6dNUvdb1dhToNDj3]{损坏} 状态，但不会锈蚀任何其他物品

Activate F envision

Trigger You successfully Strike a creature wearing or holding an item made of metal.

This twitching antenna is covered in a layer of red rust. When you activate the antenna, you deal @Damage[2d6] damage (doubled on a critical hit) to a metal item the target is wearing or carrying, ignoring its Hardness. If you hit an unattended metal item, the item takes this damage automatically. If the targeted creature uses the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.m4HQ2o5aPxjXf2kY]{Shield Block} reaction with a metal shield against the attack, the shield is automatically @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.6dNUvdb1dhToNDj3]{Broken}, but no other item is rusted

Cauthooj Feathers.name: 考索吉 羽毛 Cauthooj Feathers
Cauthooj Feathers.description:
这些羽毛可以被制作成一份 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.96Vbld5r0bbEUFJ1]{远射程弹药}或一份 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.cJKQ5uwGQhilXq8G]{幸运羽毛}。

These feathers can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.96Vbld5r0bbEUFJ1]{Long-Range Ammunition} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.cJKQ5uwGQhilXq8G]{Lucky Feather}.

Chuul Claw.name: 丘尔的爪 Chuul Claw
Chuul Claw.description:
这只爪致密而坚硬。爪可用于制作木棒或锤类武器组中的一把武器。该武器上蚀刻有一个 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DxCuJKynlnMQZHgp]{Striking} 符文。该武器的伤害骰也有所增加，造成 1d6 伤害而非 1d4，造成 1d8 伤害而非 1d6，依此类推（最高至 1d12）。如果该武器尚未具有擒拿（武器特征），则它也获得该擒拿（武器特征）。

This claw is dense and hard. A claw can be used to craft a weapon from the club or hammer weapon groups. The weapon has a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DxCuJKynlnMQZHgp]{Striking} rune etched into it. This weapon also has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4, 1d8 damage instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12). It also has the grapple weapon trait if it doesn't already.

Tarn Linnorm Hide.name: 焦油林巨龙 皮革 Tarn Linnorm Hide
Tarn Linnorm Hide.description:
这张皮革具有与龙皮相似的特性。你可以使用这些皮革片段来制作一套龙皮护甲或一面龙皮盾牌，使其免疫酸液伤害。

This hide holds similar properties to dragonhide. You can use these sections of hide to craft a set of dragonhide armor or a dragonhide shield that is immune to acid damage.

Mukradi Rawhide.name: 穆克拉迪生皮 Mukradi Rawhide
Mukradi Rawhide.description:
这种生皮既坚硬又柔韧。你可以使用这些生皮片段来制作一套 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.BTUyd0Th29Ws8FrH]{穆克拉迪生皮皮革或板甲护甲}。 

This raw hide is hard and flexible. You can use these sections of rawhide to craft a set of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.BTUyd0Th29Ws8FrH]{Mukradi Rawhide Leather or Plate Armor}.

Energy Rune Framework.name: 能量符文框架 Energy Rune Framework
Energy Rune Framework.description:
此框架概述了安装 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Wm0X7Pfd1bfocPSv]{腐蚀}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.XszNvxnymWYRaoTp]{炽焰}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.M5M1WJ5KzbYfRGsY]{霜冻}或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.NVst7e69agGG9Qwd]{电击}符文的步骤。符文的类型由墓骑士的生或死决定。当你将强击符文蚀刻进一件武器时，其价格降低25%。

This framework outlines the steps to install a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Wm0X7Pfd1bfocPSv]{Corrosive}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.XszNvxnymWYRaoTp]{Flaming}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.M5M1WJ5KzbYfRGsY]{Frost} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.NVst7e69agGG9Qwd]{Shock} rune. The type of rune is determined by the graveknight's life or death. When you etch the striking rune into a weapon, its price is lowered by 25%.

Religious Symbol.name: 宗教圣徽 Religious Symbol
Religious Symbol.description:
如果你正在挥舞这个符号，你在进行欺骗检定以将自己伪装成其所对应神祇的信徒时，获得+1物品加值。

If you're brandishing this symbol, you gain a +1 item bonus to Deception checks made to present yourself as a follower of whichever god it matches.

Kraken Rawhide.name: 海妖生皮 Kraken Rawhide
Kraken Rawhide.description:
这块皮革厚实而光滑。你可以使用这些皮革片段来制作一套@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.zMx9m5iuCxNboaBF]{海妖生皮皮革护甲}

This hide is thick and slick. You can use these sections of hide to craft a set of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.zMx9m5iuCxNboaBF]{Kraken Rawhide Leather Armor}

Stony Basilisk Eyes.name: 石质蜥蜴怪之眼 Stony Basilisk Eyes
Stony Basilisk Eyes.description:
这只眼睛有坚硬的外壳，仿佛被石头包覆。它可以被制作成一枚 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.vL6AtFbcxbipGvtf]{Basilisk Eye}。

This eye has a hard exterior, as if it were coated in stone. It can be crafted into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.vL6AtFbcxbipGvtf]{Basilisk Eye}.

Wounding Rune Framework.name: 致伤符文框架 Wounding Rune Framework
Wounding Rune Framework.description:
此框架概述了安装一枚 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.fo6Yhq5mbQXsnZs0]{Wounding} 符文的步骤。当你将强袭符文蚀刻到一把武器上时，其价格降低25%。

This framework outlines the steps to install a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.fo6Yhq5mbQXsnZs0]{Wounding} rune. When you etch the striking rune into a weapon, its price is lowered by 25%.

Dragon Fangs (Black or Copper).name: 龙牙（黑龙或铜龙） Dragon Fangs (Black or Copper)
Dragon Fangs (Black or Copper).description:
一股细细的酸液从这枚尖牙中滴落。尖牙可用于制作一把造成穿刺伤害的武器。该武器是一把+1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Wm0X7Pfd1bfocPSv]{Corrosive}武器。该武器的伤害骰也会提升，造成1d6伤害而非1d4、1d8而非1d6，依此类推（最高至1d12）。

A thin stream of acid trickles out of this fang. A fang can be used to craft a weapon that deals piercing damage. The weapon is a +1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Wm0X7Pfd1bfocPSv]{Corrosive} weapon. This weapon also has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4, 1d8 instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12).

Devil Heart.name: 恶魔之心 Devil Heart
Devil Heart.description:
这颗心脏很小，通体纯黑。吞食这颗心脏后，你会立刻将自己短距离传送，仿佛你施放了一个4环@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{移位}法术。

This heart is small and pure black. After consuming this heart, you instantly teleport yourself a short distance, as if you had a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{Translocate} spell.

Cloak of Reactive Resistance.name: 反应抗力斗篷 Cloak of Reactive Resistance
Cloak of Reactive Resistance.description:
这件斗篷覆盖着细小的龙鳞。穿着这件斗篷时，你获得AC+1物品加值。

启动 R 想象 

频率 每小时一次

触发 你受到与采集其翅膀的龙之类型相匹配的伤害（见下表）

效果 你获得对触发伤害的抗力10。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.CAiCAWVjPl1B4nvY]{效果：反应式抗力斗篷}

制作 需求 初始原材料必须包含两段伤害类型相同的龙翼。

龙的类型 抗力
黑龙或铜龙 强酸
蓝龙或青铜龙 电击
黄铜龙、金龙或红龙 火焰
绿龙 毒药
银龙或白龙 寒冷

This cloak is covered in small dragon scales. While wearing this cloak, you gain a +1 item bonus to AC.

Activate R envision 

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You take damage matching the type of dragon the wings were harvested from (see the table below)

Effect You gain resistance 10 to the triggering damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.CAiCAWVjPl1B4nvY]{Effect: Cloak of Reactive Resistance}

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include two sections of dragon wing with matching damage type.

Dragon Type Resistance
Black or copper Acid
Blue or bronze Electricity
Brass, gold, or red Fire
Green Poison
Silver or white Cold

Arboreal Bark Strips.name: 树皮条 Arboreal Bark Strips
Arboreal Bark Strips.description:
启动 F 操控

触发 你施放一个需要你掷骰火焰伤害的法术。

这块树皮上长满了苔藓，且非常易燃。当你启动该树皮并为该法术掷骰伤害时，你额外掷骰1个火焰伤害骰。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.DZ5JY4VDKui7uodb]{效果：树栖树皮条}

Activate F manipulate

Trigger You cast a spell that requires you to roll fire damage.

This bark is overgrown with moss and is highly flammable. When you activate the bark and roll damage for the spell, you roll 1 additional die of fire damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.DZ5JY4VDKui7uodb]{Effect: Arboreal Bark Strips}

Drake Teeth (Cold).name: 龙牙（寒冷） Drake Teeth (Cold)
Drake Teeth (Cold).description:
这枚牙上留有火焰、寒霜或其他与其采集来源的巨龙相匹配的元素痕迹。这枚牙可以被制作成一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.XBsoiD7Q2qdsxU5h]{龙族弹药（寒冷）}。

This tooth has traces of fire, frost, or another element matching the dragon it was harvested from. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.XBsoiD7Q2qdsxU5h]{Draconic Ammunition (Cold)}.

Dust of Lifeguarding.name: 救生之尘 Dust of Lifeguarding
Dust of Lifeguarding.description:
启用 1 互动

将这种粉尘洒在自己身上能守护你免于死亡。使用这种粉尘后，你在1小时内对抗死亡效果、毒药和疾病的豁免检定获得+2物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.cRPY5gdiwsEDOiic]{效果：救生守护粉尘}

Activate 1 Interact

Sprinkling this dust over yourself guards you against death. After using this dust, you gain a +2 item bonus on saving throws against death effects, poison, and disease for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.cRPY5gdiwsEDOiic]{Effect: Dust of Lifeguarding}

Ancient Dragon Fangs (Blue or Bronze).name: 远古巨龙獠牙（蓝龙或青铜龙） Ancient Dragon Fangs (Blue or Bronze)
Ancient Dragon Fangs (Blue or Bronze).description:
这枚尖牙偶尔会产生电荷。一枚尖牙可用于制作一把造成穿刺伤害的武器。该武器为一把+1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.TEa1oKZbwsOvC6TZ]{Shock (Greater)}武器。该武器的伤害骰也会提升，造成 1d6 伤害而非 1d4，1d8 而非 1d6，依此类推（最高至 1d12）。

This fang occasionally produces an electrical charge. A fang can be used to craft a weapon that deals piercing damage. The weapon is a +1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.TEa1oKZbwsOvC6TZ]{Shock (Greater)} weapon. This weapon also has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4, 1d8 instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12).

Cleansed Water.name: 净化之水 Cleansed Water
Cleansed Water.description:
这种水清澈如玻璃且没有味道。净化水可用于制作 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.ktjFOp3U0wQD9t0Z]{Antidote}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.UqinuuCWePTYGhVO]{Antiplague}，或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.2NzaqTfp7PbaNfxy]{Cleansing Potion}。

This water is glass-clear and has no taste. Cleansed water can be used to craft an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.ktjFOp3U0wQD9t0Z]{Antidote}. an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.UqinuuCWePTYGhVO]{Antiplague}, or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.2NzaqTfp7PbaNfxy]{Cleansing Potion}.

Helm of Charity.name: 慈善头盔 Helm of Charity
Helm of Charity.description:
启动 1 操作

当你启动这顶头盔时，你接触另一个生物并承担该生物的伤口，将至多25点你的生命值转移到被接触的生物身上。你不能转移超过你当前拥有的生命值。

制作需求 初始的原始材料必须包括两支长角亚种天使的鹿角。

Activate 1 manipulate

When you activate this helm, you touch another creature and take on that creature’s wounds, transferring up to 25 of your Hit Points to the touched creature. You cannot transfer more Hit Points than you currently have.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include two horned archon antlers.

Pleroma Energy Cloak.name: 圆满能量斗篷 Pleroma Energy Cloak
Pleroma Energy Cloak.description:
这件能量斗篷闪烁着宇宙之力，其景象被隐藏在褶皱之中。穿着斗篷时，你无视那些会使你的速度受到环境减值的效果。

启动 1 想象

频率 每日一次

效果 你获得40英尺的飞行速度，持续10分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.TPyFJGg94bMwEy95]{效果：圆满能量斗篷}

启动 R 命令

频率 每小时一次

触发 你在一次豁免检定中大失败

效果 该大失败改为失败。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包含一段圆满能量织物。

This energy cloak shimmers with the power of the cosmos, the sight of which is hidden within its folds. While wearing the cloak, you ignore effects that would give you a circumstance penalty to your Speeds.

Activate 1 envision

Frequency once per day

Effect You gain a fly Speed of 40 feet for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.TPyFJGg94bMwEy95]{Effect: Pleroma Energy Cloak}

Activate R command

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You critically fail a saving throw

Effect The critical failure becomes a failure instead.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include one section of pleroma energy fabric.

Potion of Evil Resistance (Lesser).name: 邪恶抗力药水（次级） Potion of Evil Resistance (Lesser)
Potion of Evil Resistance (Lesser).description:
启动 1 交互

饮下这瓶黑色、黏稠的药水后，你获得对邪秽的抗力5，持续1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.hoKd78XeyO9Bbxig]{效果：邪恶抗力药水}

Activate 1 Interact

Drinking this black, viscous potion grants resistance 5 to unholy for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.hoKd78XeyO9Bbxig]{Effect: Potion of Evil Resistance}

Spider Silk.name: 蛛丝 Spider Silk
Spider Silk.description:
这种丝绸细腻、柔软且坚韧。这种丝绸可用于制作一双 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.skBa6D1uxb0b2USn]{Spider Climbing Slippers}、一枚 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.n5L7HE9H8jn8ftQy]{Climbing Bolt} 或一根 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.G4cmHHhAChAlypFN]{Rope of Climbing}。

This silk is fine, soft, and strong. The silk can be used to craft a pair of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.skBa6D1uxb0b2USn]{Slippers of Spider Climbing}, a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.n5L7HE9H8jn8ftQy]{Climbing Bolt} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.G4cmHHhAChAlypFN]{Rope of Climbing}.

Mammoth Tusks.name: 猛犸象长牙 Mammoth Tusks
Mammoth Tusks.description:
构成这根长牙的象牙备受追捧，价值极高。若进行了采集，你无法从该生物身上采集任何牙尖。

The ivory that makes up this tusk is highly sought-after and very valuable. If harvested, you cannot harvest any tusk tips from the creature.

Poetry Book.name: 诗集 Poetry Book
Poetry Book.description:
如果你花费1小时研读这本书，你就能练习其中诗歌的节奏与韵律。你在进行用于背诵诗歌的表演检定时获得+2物品加值。该加值持续的小时数等同于你的智力调整值。

If you spend 1 hour studying this book, you can practice the rhythms and cadence of the poetry within. You gain a +2 item bonus to Performance checks made to recite poetry. This bonus lasts for a number of hours equal to your Intelligence modifier.

Flytrap Teeth.name: 捕蝇草之齿 Flytrap Teeth
Flytrap Teeth.description:
这颗牙很干净且锋利。这颗牙可以被制作成一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.xohlwRjp5hOnww9B]{植物精准弹药}。

This tooth is clean and sharp. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.xohlwRjp5hOnww9B]{Plant Precision Ammunition}.

Cloak of Magic Protection.name: 魔法防护斗篷 Cloak of Magic Protection
Cloak of Magic Protection.description:
这件斗篷看起来像虎皮。穿着这件斗篷时，你获得对抗魔法的所有豁免的+2物品加值，以及对抗神圣魔法的所有豁免的+3物品加值。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包含两块罗刹生皮。

This cloak looks like a tiger hide. While wearing the cloak, you gain a +2 item bonus to all saves against magic, and a +3 item bonus to all saves against divine magic.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include two sections of Rakshasa rawhide.

Illusion Dust.name: 幻术粉尘 Illusion Dust
Illusion Dust.description:
启动 F 操控

触发 你施放一个双动作幻术法术。

它看起来像粉末，但当被触碰时，幻术尘感觉像液体。当你启动它时，触发的幻术法术将以单动作而非双动作行动来施放。

Activate F manipulate

Trigger You cast a two-action illusion spell.

It looks like powder, but when touched, illusion dust feels like a liquid. When you activate it, the triggering illusion spell is cast as a single action instead of a two-action activity.

Wendigo Blood.name: 温迪戈血液 Wendigo Blood
Wendigo Blood.description:
这种血液中含有霜晶。这种血液可以用于制作一瓶@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.hDLbR56Id2OtU318]{生命灵药}或一瓶@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.2RuepCemJhrpKKao]{治疗药水}。

This blood has frost crystals in it. The blood can be used to craft an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.hDLbR56Id2OtU318]{Elixir of Life} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.2RuepCemJhrpKKao]{Healing Potion}.

Troll Claws.name: 巨魔爪 Troll Claws
Troll Claws.description:
这作为一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{枭熊爪}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{狼牙}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{血腥利爪}护符发挥作用。你在附上该护符时选择其中一种。

This functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear Claw}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon} talisman. You choose which when you affix the talisman.

Dragon Turtle Shellplates.name: 龙龟甲壳板 Dragon Turtle Shellplates
Dragon Turtle Shellplates.description:
这些龟甲板坚韧且坚硬。你可以使用这些龟甲板来制作一套 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.IWrFsHY8rgfVHUZR]{龙龟龟甲板护甲}。

These shellplates are tough and hard. You can use these shellplates to craft a set of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.IWrFsHY8rgfVHUZR]{Dragon Turtle Shellplate Armor}.

Brain Collector Teeth.name: 采脑者之牙 Brain Collector Teeth
Brain Collector Teeth.description:
这颗牙很干净且锋利。这颗牙可以被制作成一发@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{怪物精准弹药}。

This tooth is clean and sharp. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{Monster Precision Ammunition}.
