Religious Text of Nethys.name: 奈西斯的宗教文本 Religious Text of Nethys
Religious Text of Nethys.description:
如果你在尝试对奈西斯进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}时查阅此文本，你在该次掷骰中获得+1物品加值。

If you consult this text while trying to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about Nethys, you gain a +1 item bonus to the roll.

Snakeskin (Giant Anaconda).name: 蛇皮（巨型水蚺） Snakeskin (Giant Anaconda)
Snakeskin (Giant Anaconda).description:
蛇皮拥有独特的花纹与美丽的鳞片，在许多市场都能找到并出售。

With its distinctive pattern and beautiful scales, snakeskin can be found and sold in many markets.

Golem Engine Core.name: 魔像引擎核心 Golem Engine Core
Golem Engine Core.description:
这个装置由硬化钢和铜线圈制成，曾为一个血肉魔像提供动力。它可以卖给收藏家和发明家，或干脆当作废料出售。

This contraption, made from hardened steel and coils of copper, once powered a flesh golem. It can be sold to collectors and inventors, or simply as scrap.

Alicorn Dust.name: 天角兽尘 Alicorn Dust
Alicorn Dust.description:
激活 2 交互

这种独角兽角尘由磨碎的独角兽角制成。食用这种尘埃会腌制你身上正在影响你的任何毒药，无需进行反制检定。若该尘埃是采集而来，你无法从该生物身上采集独角兽角。

Activate 2 Interact

This alicorn dust is made from ground-up unicorn horn. Consuming this dust cures you of any poison affecting you, no counteract check required. If the dust is harvested, you cannot harvest a unicorn horn from the creature.

Brain Collector Claw.name: 脑收集者爪 Brain Collector Claw
Brain Collector Claw.description:
这只爪很沉，还会轻微抽动。爪可用于制作一把属于棍棒或锤类武器组的武器。该武器上蚀刻有一个 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DxCuJKynlnMQZHgp]{Striking} 符文。该武器的伤害骰也有所提高，造成1d6伤害而非1d4，造成1d8伤害而非1d6，依此类推（最多提高到1d12）。

This claw is heavy and twitches a little. A claw can be used to craft a weapon from the club or hammer weapon groups. The weapon has a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DxCuJKynlnMQZHgp]{Striking} rune etched into it. This weapon also has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4, 1d8 damage instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12).

Drakauthix Tendrils.name: 德拉考西克斯触须 Drakauthix Tendrils
Drakauthix Tendrils.description:
这条触须覆盖着一种黏稠的毒药。一条触须可以用来制作一把 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.f1gwoTkf3Nn0v3PN]{鞭}。该武器是一把+1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.leqZKQWSmvaM3Tf7]{剧毒}武器。

This tendril is covered in a sticky poison. A tendril can be used to craft a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.f1gwoTkf3Nn0v3PN]{Whip}. The weapon is a +1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.leqZKQWSmvaM3Tf7]{Toxic} weapon.

Gug Skin.name: 古格皮肤 Gug Skin
Gug Skin.description:
启动 F 想象

触发 你尝试 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.kMcV8e5EZUxa6evt]{挤过}

需求 你在特技中受训。

这张皮肤极其柔韧。当你启动这张皮肤时，你在挤过检定上自动成功，并且在这次挤过中，你以你的全速度移动。

Activate F envision

Trigger You attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.kMcV8e5EZUxa6evt]{Squeeze}

Requirements You are trained in Acrobatics.

This skin is highly flexible. When you activate the skin, you automatically succeed on the Squeeze check, and for this instance of Squeeze, you move at your full speed.

Troll Blood.name: 巨魔（特征）血液 Troll Blood
Troll Blood.description:
这种血液一旦从小瓶中取出就会迅速凝固。血液可用于制作 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.hDLbR56Id2OtU318]{生命药剂}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.2RuepCemJhrpKKao]{治疗药水}，或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.ODnXQHvFoK7tIVpu]{烟雾弹}（如炼金术士专长中所述）。用巨魔（特征）血液制作的烟雾弹比普通烟雾弹更强效，因为受影响的生物除了承受任何其他效果外，还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑（状态）} 状态。

This blood coagulates rapidly if taken out of its vial. The blood can be used to craft an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.hDLbR56Id2OtU318]{Elixir of Life}, a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.2RuepCemJhrpKKao]{Healing Potion}, or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.ODnXQHvFoK7tIVpu]{Smoke Bomb} (as in the alchemist feat). Smoke bombs created with troll blood are more potent than regular smoke bombs, as the affected creature suggers the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} condition in addition to any other effects.

Cultist Garb.name: 邪教徒装束 Cultist Garb
Cultist Garb.description:
这套服饰作为一套 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{皮甲}发挥作用。穿着时，你在进行以冒充与该服装相符的邪教成员为目的的欺瞒检定时，获得+1物品加值。

This garb functions as a set of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor}. While wearing, you gain a +1 item bonus to Deception checks made to pass as a member of the cult matching the clothing.

Unprocessed Giant Monitor Lizard Venom.name: 未加工的巨型巨蜥毒液 Unprocessed Giant Monitor Lizard Venom
Unprocessed Giant Monitor Lizard Venom.description:
启动 2 交互

这种毒液效力强劲，能够造成虚弱。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15]

最长持续时间 6轮

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}（1轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[毒药]] 且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 2}（1轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This venom is potent and can cause enfeeblement.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} (1 round)

Otyugh Teeth.name: 奥堤厄格之牙 Otyugh Teeth
Otyugh Teeth.description:
启动 F 想象

触发 你使用已装附的武器成功打击一名生物。

这颗牙是黄色的，并覆满污秽。当你启动它时，你击中的生物将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（@Check[type:fortitude|dc:17] 以恢复）

Activate F envision

Trigger You successfully Strike a creature with the affixed weapon.

This tooth is yellow and covered in filth. When you activate it, the creature you hit is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (@Check[type:fortitude|dc:17] to recover)

Shemhazian Teeth.name: 舍姆哈齐安之牙 Shemhazian Teeth
Shemhazian Teeth.description:
启动 F 想象

触发 你使用所附着的武器成功打击一名生物

需求 你必须精通所附着的武器。

这颗牙渗出带绿色的液体，其气味令你的喉头泛起胆汁。你启动它时，你击中的生物将获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 3}，持续 1 分钟。

Activate F envision

Trigger You successfully Strike a creature with the affixed weapon

Requirements You are an expert with the affixed weapon.

The tooth oozes a greenish liquid, the smell of which makes bile rise in your throat. When you activate it, the creature you hit is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3} for 1 minute.

Bola Bolts.name: 流星锤弩矢 Bola Bolts
Bola Bolts.description:
弹药 弩矢

这一射击不造成伤害，但命中时，目标必须成功通过 @Check[type:reflex|dc:16] 豁免，否则会被击倒 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} 并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} 直到其 [[/act escape dc=15]]{Escapes (DC 15)}。该检定可以由目标或与目标相邻的生物尝试。

Ammunition bolt

This shot deals no damage, but on a hit, the target must succeed @Check[type:reflex|dc:16] save or be knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} until it [[/act escape dc=15]]{Escapes (DC 15)}. This check can be attempted either by the target or a creature adjacent to the target.

Astronomer Spellbook.name: 天文学家法术书 Astronomer Spellbook
Astronomer Spellbook.description:
这本法术书里爬满了法术。它包含以下法术：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl]，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.TTwOKGqmZeKSyNMH]，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.OhD2Z6rIGGD5ocZA]，以及@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.xqmHD8JIjak15lRk]。

This spellbook has spells crawled inside it. It contains the following spells: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.TTwOKGqmZeKSyNMH], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.OhD2Z6rIGGD5ocZA], and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.xqmHD8JIjak15lRk].

Soul Gem.name: 灵魂宝石 Soul Gem
Soul Gem.description:
这颗灵魂宝石充满了一名生物的灵魂，其类型决定其价值。所列信息给出了灵魂宝石的价格，以及用于指引冒险小队在何时可能发现该品质灵魂宝石的等级。

  • 无心灵的灵体（软泥，丧尸（特征））；等级 1，价格 10 gp，
  • 动物灵体（马，狼）；等级 2-3，价格 25 gp，
  • 基础灵魂（人形生物平民）；等级 4-7，价格 100 gp，
  • 值得注意的灵魂（冒险者，幼龙）；等级 8-14，价格 500 gp，
  • 宏伟灵魂（龙，强大的英雄）；等级 15+，价格 1000-5000 gp

This soul gem is filled with a creature's soul, the type of which determines its value. The information listed provides the price for a soul gem and the level to guide when an adventuring group may find a soul gem of that quality.

  • Mindless Spirit (ooze, zombie); Level 1, Price 10 gp,
  • Animal Spirit (horse, wolf); Level 2-3, Price 25 gp,
  • Basic Soul (humanoid commoner); Level 4-7, Price 100 gp,
  • Noteworthy Soul (adventurer, drake); Level 8-14, Price 500 gp,
  • Grand Soul (dragon, powerful hero); Level 15+, Price 1000-5000 gp

Ancient Copper Dragon Head Spikes.name: 远古铜龙头部尖刺 Ancient Copper Dragon Head Spikes
Ancient Copper Dragon Head Spikes.description:
启动 2 交互

这些尖刺很结实，但用足够的力量就能折断。你折断尖刺时，你施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{缓慢}，以6环（法术DC 31）。

Activate 2 Interact

These spikes are strong but can be snapped with enough force. When you snap the spike, you cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow} at 6th-rank (spell DC 31).

Unprocessed Kraken Ink Poison.name: 未加工的海怪墨汁毒药 Unprocessed Kraken Ink Poison
Unprocessed Kraken Ink Poison.description:
启动 2 交互

这种墨水漆黑如墨，质地如凝胶。它只能在水中使用。克拉肯免疫这种毒药。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:35]

最大持续时间 10 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[3d6[poison]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[4d6[poison]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}（1 轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This ink is pitch-black and has the consistency of gel. It can only be used in water. Krakens are immune to this poison.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:35]

Maximum Duration 10 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[3d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[4d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (1 round)

Lion Head Teeth.name: 狮首獠牙 Lion Head Teeth
Lion Head Teeth.description:
这颗牙很干净且锋利。这颗牙可以被制作成一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{怪物精准弹药}。

This tooth is clean and sharp. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{Monster Precision Ammunition}.

Eagle Feathers.name: 鹰羽毛 Eagle Feathers
Eagle Feathers.description:
这些羽毛可以用来制作一份 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.96Vbld5r0bbEUFJ1]{远程弹药} 或一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.cJKQ5uwGQhilXq8G]{幸运羽毛}。

These feathers can be used to craft a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.96Vbld5r0bbEUFJ1]{Long-Range Ammunition} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.cJKQ5uwGQhilXq8G]{Lucky Feather}.

Draconic Ammunition (Silver or White).name: 龙族弹药（银色或白色） Draconic Ammunition (Silver or White)
Draconic Ammunition (Silver or White).description:
弹药 箭矢、弩矢

被这种弹药命中的生物会受到1d6点与巨龙颜色相匹配类型的伤害（见下表）。

制作需求 初始制作材料必须包含一枚龙牙或其他合适的牙齿（见生物条目）。

巨龙类型 伤害类型
黑龙或铜龙 强酸
蓝龙或黄铜龙 电击
黄铜龙、金龙或红龙 火焰
绿龙 毒素
银龙或白龙 寒冷

 

Ammunition arrow, bolt

A creature hit with this ammunition takes 1d6 damage of a type matching the dragon's color (see the table below).

Craft Requirements The initial crafting materials must include one dragon tooth or other suitable tooth (see creature entries).

Dragon Type Damage Type
Black or Copper Acid
Blue or Brass Electricity
Brass, gold, or red Fire
Green Poison
Silver or white Cold

Glabrezu Pinchers.name: 钳魔钳击 Glabrezu Pinchers
Glabrezu Pinchers.description:
这个钳子会自行开合。钳子可以用来制作一把来自棍棒或锤类武器组的武器。该武器上刻有一个 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.KCQRFvUgbyclvOGi]{Striking (Greater)} 符文。该武器的伤害骰增加，造成1d6伤害而不是1d4；1d8伤害而不是1d6，依此类推（最大至1d12）。如果该武器原本没有擒拿（武器特征），它也获得该特征。

This pincher opens and closes on its own. A pincher can be used to craft a weapon from the club or hammer weapon groups. The weapon has a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.KCQRFvUgbyclvOGi]{Striking (Greater)} rune etched into it. This weapon has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4. 1d8 damage instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12). It also has the grapple weapon trait if it doesn't already.

Drake Hide.name: 龙兽皮 Drake Hide
Drake Hide.description:
这种龙蜥的皮革可能会被没见识的买家误认为是龙皮。它可以卖给不择手段的皮匠。

This drake hide could be mistaken for dragonhide by an uneducated buyer. It can be sold to unscrupulous leatherworkers.

Astrolabe.name: 星盘 Astrolabe
Astrolabe.description:
一名受过生存训练的生物可以使用星盘来协助观察夜空以获取信息。在使用星盘时，你在进行用于辨认天体以及使用星辰导航的检定时获得+1物品加值。

A creature trained in Survival can use the astrolabe to assist with observing the night sky for information. While using the astrolabe, you gain a +1 item bonus to checks made to identify celestial bodies and to navigate using the stars.

Ooze Goo (Greater).name: 软泥黏胶（强效） Ooze Goo (Greater)
Ooze Goo (Greater).description:
启动 1 打击

这种黏液是强力的腐蚀剂。软泥黏液的作用等同于一瓶@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.jC8GmH0Un6vDxdMj]{强效酸液瓶}

 

Activate 1 Strike

This goo is a strong corrosive. The ooze goo functions as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.jC8GmH0Un6vDxdMj]{Acid Flask (Greater)}

Alghollthu Mucus.name: 阿尔古苏黏液 Alghollthu Mucus
Alghollthu Mucus.description:
启动 1 交互

这种黏液从夺心魔鱼身上提取而来，有时会被富有创意的刺客使用。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:18]

潜伏期 1分钟

最大持续时间 6分钟

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（1分钟）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}，并且你失去呼吸空气的能力，但获得呼吸水的能力（1分钟）

Activate 1 Interact

This mucus is extracted from aboleths and is sometimes used by creative assassins.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:18]

Onset 1 minute

Maximum Duration 6 minutes

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 minute)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} and you lose the ability to breathe air, but gain the ability to breathe water (1 minute)

Horn of Vrock Screeching.name: 弗罗克尖啸号角 Horn of Vrock Screeching
Horn of Vrock Screeching.description:
这个号角上附着着一根黑色的弗洛克羽毛。它可以作为乐器演奏，在进行表演检定时获得+2物品加值。

启动 2 操控（听觉、神圣、无力化、音波）

频率 每日一次

效果 你吹响号角，发出尖锐刺耳的尖啸。除你之外，30尺爆发范围内的每个非恶魔生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:23|traits:auditory,divine,incapacitation,sonic] 豁免。若失败，该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{昏迷 2}（若为大成功或大失败中的大失败，则为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{昏迷 3}）

制造需求 初始原始材料必须包含一套弗洛克声带。

This horn has a black vrock feathers attached to it. It can be played as an instrument, granting a +2 item bonus to Performance checks.

Activate 2 manipulate (auditory, divine, incapacitation, sonic)

Frequency once per day

Effect You blow in the horn and create a shrill screech. Each non-demon creature within a @Template[type:burst|distance:30] other than you must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:23|traits:auditory,divine,incapacitation,sonic] save. On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3} on a critical failure)

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include one set of vrock vocal cords.

Helm of Protection.name: 防护头盔 Helm of Protection
Helm of Protection.description:
穿戴时，该头盔使你在对抗邪秽生物的AC与豁免上获得+1物品加值。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包含一顶卡西西安头盔。

While worn, this helmet grants you a +1 item bonus to AC and saves against unholy creatures.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include one Cassisian helm.

Velociraptor Claw.name: 伶盗龙爪 Velociraptor Claw
Velociraptor Claw.description:
此物品的功能等同于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{枭熊利爪}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{狼牙}或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{血染利爪}护符。你在系附护符时选择其一。

This functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear Claw}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon} talisman. You choose which when you affix the talisman.

Ectoplasm.name: 灵质 Ectoplasm
Ectoplasm.description:
这个小瓶中的灵质呈柔和的蓝绿色。这份灵质可用于制作@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.LNd5u19GqC51ngby]{幽灵（特征）能量弹}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.dmQAN56aMro0gecx]{幽灵（特征）尘护符}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.PU9aXqOrdJRc0C3Y]{幽灵（特征）克星油}。

The ectoplasm in this vial is a muted teal color. This ectoplasm can be used to craft a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.LNd5u19GqC51ngby]{Ghost Charge}, a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.dmQAN56aMro0gecx]{Ghost Dust} talisman or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.PU9aXqOrdJRc0C3Y]{Ghost Bane Oil}.

Megaprimatus Fangs.name: 巨型灵长类獠牙 Megaprimatus Fangs
Megaprimatus Fangs.description:
这件物品的功能等同于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{枭熊之爪}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{狼之獠牙}或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{血染利爪} 护符。你在将护符附着时选择其中一种。

This functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear Claw}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon} talisman. You choose which when you affix the talisman.

Oblivion Extract.name: 湮灭萃取物 Oblivion Extract
Oblivion Extract.description:
启动 1 交互

这种萃取物呈深黑色，并带有腐臭气味。你可以将这种液体涂抹在一个非魔法物品上，其负载为1或更低。1分钟后，该物品被摧毁，不留任何存在痕迹。

Activate 1 Interact

This extract is a deep black and has a putrid smell. You can spread this liquid over a non-magical item of 1 Bulk or less. After 1 minute, the item is destroyed, leaving no trace of its existence.

Were Blood.name: 血裔 Were Blood
Were Blood.description:
启动 1 交互

这种血液在月光触碰下会闪烁微光。饮下这种血液后，你可以与动物交谈，如同@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.BBvV7qoXGdw09q1C]{与动物交谈}法术一般。你能交谈的动物类型仅限于与采集该血液的兽化生物大体同类的动物。

Activate 1 Interact

This blood shimmers when touched by moonlight. After consuming this blood, you can speak with animals, as with the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.BBvV7qoXGdw09q1C]{Speak with Animals} spell. The type of animal you can speak to is limited to animals of the same general kind as the werecreature the blood was harvested from.

Ghoul Claws.name: 食尸鬼（特征）之爪 Ghoul Claws
Ghoul Claws.description:
这只爪子很脏但很锋利。这只爪子可以被制作成一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{怪物精准弹药}。

This claw is dirty but sharp. The claw can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{Monster Precision Ammunition}.

Bandolier.name: 弹带 Bandolier
Bandolier.description:
这条子弹带穿在胸前，便于获取特定类型的装备。一条子弹带最多可容纳六件轻负载的物品。子弹带上的物品可以作为需要它们的动作的一部分拔取。

This bandolier is worn over the chest, allowing easy access to certain types of equipment. A bandolier can hold up to six items of light Bulk. Items on the bandolier can be drawn as part of the action that requires them.

Raw Fungi.name: 生蕈 Raw Fungi
Raw Fungi.description:
一旦处理完成，这些真菌就可作为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.L9ZV076913otGtiB]{口粮}（1周）使用。

Once cured, the fungi function as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.L9ZV076913otGtiB]{Ration} (1 week).

Bloodseeker Proboscis.name: 嗜血者长喙 Bloodseeker Proboscis
Bloodseeker Proboscis.description:
这根小小的长鼻仍在渗出血液。四根长鼻可以绑在一起，从而制成一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.k6D64EAjcKMf8NZB]{Bloodseeker Beak}护符。

This small proboscis still exudes blood. Four proboscises can be tied together, thereby making a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.k6D64EAjcKMf8NZB]{Bloodseeker Beak} talisman.

Drake Teeth (Acid).name: 龙牙（酸蚀） Drake Teeth (Acid)
Drake Teeth (Acid).description:
这颗牙齿带有火焰、寒霜或其他与其采集来源的巨龙相匹配的元素痕迹。这颗牙齿可以被制作成一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.I02YUoBn9ItwO9BG]{龙裔弹药（酸蚀）}。

This tooth has traces of fire, frost, or another element matching the dragon it was harvested from. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.I02YUoBn9ItwO9BG]{Draconic Ammunition (Acid)}.

Nightmare Smoke (Greater).name: 梦魇烟雾（强效） Nightmare Smoke (Greater)
Nightmare Smoke (Greater).description:
启动 R 交互

触发 你受到来自敌对来源的伤害。

这股烟雾浓厚且漆黑。当你受到伤害时，你可以打碎小瓶并释放烟雾。烟雾充满一个以你空间的一个角为中心的 @Template[type:burst|distance:15]{15尺半径爆发}。该区域内的所有生物均为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，并且所有其他生物对它们也为隐蔽。任何在烟雾中开始其回合的生物会变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}（@Check[type:fortitude|dc:27] 成功则免疫）。烟雾持续1分钟，或直到被强风驱散。梦魇、梦魇骑手、不在呼吸或不会呼吸的生物，以及免疫毒素的生物不受该灵光的恶心效果影响，但不免疫隐蔽

Activate R Interact

Trigger You take damage from a hostile source.

This smoke is thick and black. When you take damage, you can break the vial and unleash the smoke. The smoke fills a @Template[type:burst|distance:15]{15-foot radius burst} centered on one corner of your space. All creatures within that area are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, and all other creatures are concealed to them. Any creature that starts its turn within the smoke becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (@Check[type:fortitude|dc:27] negates). The smoke lasts for 1 minute or until dispersed by a strong wind. Nightmares, nightmare riders, creatures that aren’t breathing or don’t breathe, and creatures immune to poison are unaffected to the aura’s sickened effect but not the concealment

Griffon Feathers.name: 狮鹫羽毛 Griffon Feathers
Griffon Feathers.description:
这些羽毛可以被制作成一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.96Vbld5r0bbEUFJ1]{长射程弹药}或一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.cJKQ5uwGQhilXq8G]{幸运羽毛}。

These feathers can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.96Vbld5r0bbEUFJ1]{Long-Range Ammunition} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.cJKQ5uwGQhilXq8G]{Lucky Feather}.

Dragon Sole Patches (Green).name: 龙鳞鞋底贴片（绿色） Dragon Sole Patches (Green)
Dragon Sole Patches (Green).description:
这块脚底皮料能让你在自然环境中移动而不留下足迹。两块补片可用于制作一双@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.L7LW5E58iwmehD81]{无痕行步靴}。

This piece of foot sole allows you to move through natural surroundings without leaving tracks. Two patches can be used to craft a pair of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.L7LW5E58iwmehD81]{Boots of Trackless Steps}.

Ghaele Eye.name: 迦埃勒之眼 Ghaele Eye
Ghaele Eye.description:
启动 2 交互

这只眼睛散发出明亮的绿色光芒。当你启动这只眼睛时，你将其捏碎，并使用你的施法能力施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.sX2o0HH4RjJDAZ8C]{神圣敕令}，且不消耗法术位。你必须是神圣施法者才能以这种方式使用该组件，并且拥有相应等级的法术位，但你不需要知晓该法术或将其准备好。

Activate 2 Interact

This eye glows a bright green. When you activate the eye, you crush it and cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.sX2o0HH4RjJDAZ8C]{Divine Decree} using your spellcasting ability and without expending a spell slot. You must be a divine spellcaster to use the component in this way and have a spell slot of the appropriate level, but you do not need to know the spell or have it prepared.

High-Grade Dragon Turtle Shellplate Armo.name: 高等龙龟甲壳板甲护甲 High-Grade Dragon Turtle Shellplate Armor
High-Grade Dragon Turtle Shellplate Armo.description:
Harvest Compendium 注记：由于尚不支持自定义材料，此物品代表一件通用的龙龟壳板护甲，以及其自动化规则。你可以编辑其细节与特征，使之匹配你想要的护甲类型，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}。

穿戴龙龟壳板护甲的角色获得火焰抗力15。

制造需求 初始原材料必须包含至少价值16000 gp + 每负载1600 gp 的龙龟壳板。

Harvest Compendium Note: As custom materials are not yet supported, this item represents a generic piece of Dragon Turtle Shellplate armor, along with its automated rules. You can edit its details and traits to match the type of armor you want, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}.

The wearer of dragon turtle shellplate armor has fire resistance 15.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include dragon turtle shellplate worth at least 16000 gp + 1600 gp per Bulk.

Bulette Sole Patches.name: 鲆鲨皮革鞋底补丁 Bulette Sole Patches
Bulette Sole Patches.description:
这块鞋底坚硬且有弹性。两块补片可以用来制作一双@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.ecqz1iUGtyQEkZwy]{跃步之靴}。

The piece of foot sole is hard and flexible. Two patches can be used to craft a pair of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.ecqz1iUGtyQEkZwy]{Boots of Bounding}.

Frost Rune Framework.name: 寒霜符文框架 Frost Rune Framework
Frost Rune Framework.description:
该框架概述了安装一枚 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.M5M1WJ5KzbYfRGsY]{Frost} 符文的步骤。当你将强袭符文蚀刻到一把武器上时，其价格降低25%。

This framework outlines the steps to install a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.M5M1WJ5KzbYfRGsY]{Frost} rune. When you etch the striking rune into a weapon, its price is lowered by 25%.

Projectile Spike.name: 投射尖刺 Projectile Spike
Projectile Spike.description:
启动 F 构想

触发你用已固定的武器成功打击一名生物，且该目标在距离至少一名对你敌对的其他生物5英尺内。

尖刺锋利且略微弯曲。当你启动尖刺时，它会从你的武器上射出，并命中至多两名在你打击目标5英尺内的敌对生物。这些额外目标受到1d10穿刺伤害。

Activate F envision

Trigger You successfully Strike a creature with the affixed weapon, and the target is within 5 feet of at least one other creature hostile to you.

The spike is sharp and slightly curved. When you activate the spike, it shoots away from your weapon and hits up to two hostile creatures within 5 feet of the target of your Strike. These additional targets take 1d10 piercing damage.

Cauthooj Vocal Cords.name: 考苏图的声带 Cauthooj Vocal Cords
Cauthooj Vocal Cords.description:
这些声带以几乎听不见的音调振动。声带可以被制作成一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.MNasJoKkVVgiGhXy]{考苏图吉尖啸号角}

These vocal cords vibrate with a nearly inaudible tone. The cords can be crafted into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.MNasJoKkVVgiGhXy]{Horn of Cauthooj Screeching}

Fear Pheromones.name: 恐惧信息素 Fear Pheromones
Fear Pheromones.description:
这只小瓶装满了刺鼻的气体，其气味会让你后颈的汗毛竖起。它可以被制作成一颗 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.ZAtwiAPkk1zwCf82]{恐惧宝石}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.ggTZgfjOtiVCQXw4]{恐惧强化气体}，或一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.ROdjFw7wby982qf5]{骇人弹药}。

This vial is filled with an odorous gas, the scent of which makes the hairs on your neck stand up. It can be crafted into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.ZAtwiAPkk1zwCf82]{Fear Gem}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.ggTZgfjOtiVCQXw4]{Fear Enhancement Gas}, or a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.ROdjFw7wby982qf5]{Terrifying Ammunition}.

Barguest Rawhide.name: 巴盖斯特生皮 Barguest Rawhide
Barguest Rawhide.description:
这种生皮又黑又粗糙。你可以使用这些生皮片段来制作一套 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.QnATTSi4pCb25NmZ]{标准等级巴盖斯特生皮皮革护甲}。

This rawhide is dark and coarse. You can use these sections of rawhide to craft a set of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.QnATTSi4pCb25NmZ]{Standard-Grade Barghest Rawhide Leather Armor}.

Horn of Cloaker Moaning.name: 潜影魔哀鸣号角 Horn of Cloaker Moaning
Horn of Cloaker Moaning.description:
这只号角散发着变幻的紫色光辉。它可以作为乐器演奏，使表演检定获得+2物品加值。

启动 2 操控（听觉、情绪、精神）；

频率 每日一次

效果 你对着号角吹气，发出低沉的哀鸣，以随机效果影响附近的生物。除你以外，所有位于@Template[type:emanation|distance:20]内且能听见号角的生物必须尝试一次DC 20意志豁免以抵抗号角的效果。

  • 恐惧（恐惧、无力化）。受影响的生物获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 1}（或在大成功或大失败中的大失败时，获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 2}并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑}，持续1轮）。@Check[type:will|dc:20|traits:auditory,emotion,mental, incapacitation, fear]
  • 恶心。受影响的生物倒地并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}。@Check[type:will|dc:20|traits:auditory,emotion,mental]

制造需求 初始原材料必须包含一套披风怪的声带。

This horn has a shifting purple glow. It can be played as an instrument, granting a +2 item bonus to Performance checks.

Activate 2 manipulate (auditory, emotion, mental);

Frequency once per day

Effect You blow in the horn and create deep moan, affecting nearby creatures with a random effect. Each creature within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] that can hear the horn other than you must attempt a DC 20 Will save to resist the horn’s effect.

  • Fear (fear, incapacitation). Affected creatures become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1} (or, on a critical failure, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round). @Check[type:will|dc:20|traits:auditory,emotion,mental, incapacitation, fear]
  • Nausea. Affected creatures fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} and become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}. @Check[type:will|dc:20|traits:auditory,emotion,mental]

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include one set of cloaker vocal cords.

Simple Injury Poison.name: 简易伤害毒药 Simple Injury Poison
Simple Injury Poison.description:
启动 1 交互

这种毒药不持久，也不会留下持续效果。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:18]

最大持续时间 1 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[2d4[poison]] 伤害（1 轮）

Activate 1 Interact

This poison isn't long lasting and doesn't have lingering effects.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:18]

Maximum Duration 1 round

Stage 1 @Damage[2d4[poison]] damage (1 round)

Balor Ash.name: 巴洛炎烬 Balor Ash
Balor Ash.description:
启动 1 交互

这种温热的灰烬中充满了发光的火焰微粒。食用这把灰烬后，你在1小时内免疫火焰伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.GpZMzs8WV1viU76s]{效果：巴洛炎魔灰烬}

Activate 1 Interact

This warm ash is filled with glowing motes of flame. After consuming this ash, you are immune to fire damage for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.GpZMzs8WV1viU76s]{Effect: Balor Ash}

Ceremonial Robes.name: 仪式长袍 Ceremonial Robes
Ceremonial Robes.description:
穿着这些长袍时，你在进行以冒充与其服饰相符的教团成员为目的的欺瞒检定时，获得+1物品加值。

While wearing these robes, you gain a +1 item bonus to Deception checks made to pass as a member of the cult matching the clothing.

Distilled Otyugh Stench.name: 蒸馏食腐怪恶臭 Distilled Otyugh Stench
Distilled Otyugh Stench.description:
启动 F 操控

触发 你施放一个法术或使用一个会使生物变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} 的能力。

这股恶臭强烈到令人衰弱。当你启动它时，被该法术或能力选为目标的生物在其豁免上承受 -2 环境减值。

Activate F manipulate

Trigger You cast a spell or use an ability that causes a creature to become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened}.

This stench is debilitatingly strong. When you activate it, the creature targeted by the spell or ability suffers a -2 circumstance penalty on its save.

Hell Hound Blood.name: 地狱猎犬血统 Hell Hound Blood
Hell Hound Blood.description:
这种血液呈明亮的橙色，并且异常温暖。这种血液可用于制作一瓶@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.tcy8xmXlo3bUtHhT]{邪恶涂层油}或一瓶@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.TpxNmOa5zZnN2Tzv]{邪恶抗力药水}。

This blood is bright orage and strangely warm. The blood can be used to craft an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.tcy8xmXlo3bUtHhT]{Oil of Evil Coating} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.TpxNmOa5zZnN2Tzv]{Potion of Evil Resistance}.

High-Grade Mukradi Rawhide Armor.name: 高等穆克拉迪生皮护甲 High-Grade Mukradi Rawhide Armor
High-Grade Mukradi Rawhide Armor.description:
Harvest Compendium 注记：由于自定义材料尚未受支持，此物品代表一件通用的穆克拉迪生皮护甲，以及其自动化规则。你可以编辑其细节与特征以匹配你想要的护甲类型，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}。

穆克拉迪生皮护甲的穿戴者对不同的伤害类型具有抗力。每天在你的每日准备期间，从酸蚀、电击或火焰中选择一种伤害类型。直到你的下一次每日准备之前，你对所选伤害类型具有抗力10。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.VlJJNZGX6Z2kzdeH]{效果：穆克拉迪生皮护甲}

制作需求 初始原材料必须包括价值至少 4100 gp 的穆克拉迪生皮 + 每负载 410 gp

Harvest Compendium Note: As custom materials are not yet supported, this item represents a generic piece of Mukradi Rawhide armor, along with its automated rules. You can edit its details and traits to match the type of armor you want, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}.

The wearer of mukradi rawhide armor is resistant to different damage types. Each day during your daily preparations, choose one damage type from acid, electricity, or fire. You have resistance 10 to the chosen damage type until your next daily preparations.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.VlJJNZGX6Z2kzdeH]{Effect: Mukradi Rawhide Armor}

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include mukradi rawhide worth at least 4100 gp + 410 gp per Bulk

Giant Flytrap Leaves.name: 巨型捕蝇草叶 Giant Flytrap Leaves
Giant Flytrap Leaves.description:
这片叶子呈暗绿色。它可用于制作一枚酸性@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Lw3B9DpnyrpXD9Di]{能量抗性}符文。

The leaf is dull green. It can be used to craft an acid @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Lw3B9DpnyrpXD9Di]{Energy-Resistant} rune.

Lucky Feather.name: 幸运羽毛 Lucky Feather
Lucky Feather.description:
启用 1 交互

当你启用这根羽毛时，你抚摸它并将其贴身收起。你在1小时内对抗魔法和疾病的所有豁免获得+2物品加值

Activate 1 Interact

When you activate this feather, you stroke it and stow it against your skin. You gain a +2 item bonus to all saves against magic and disease for 1 hour

Daemon Precision Ammunition.name: 恶魔精准弹药 Daemon Precision Ammunition
Daemon Precision Ammunition.description:
弹药 箭矢，弩矢

被这种弹药命中的生物会受到1d4精准伤害。若该生物是魔神，则该加值提高至2d4。

制造需求 初始制造材料必须包含一颗魔神牙齿。

Ammunition arrow, bolt

A creature hit with this ammunition takes 1d4 precision damage. This bonus increases to 2d4 if the creature is a daemon.

Craft Requirements The initial crafting materials must include one daemon tooth.

Manticore Wing.name: 蝎尾狮之翼 Manticore Wing
Manticore Wing.description:
这些翅膀巨大且如皮革般坚韧。这些翅膀可以被制作成一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.um7saAjjztSlDF2O]{飞行斗篷}。

These wings are grand and leathery. The wings can be crafted into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.um7saAjjztSlDF2O]{Cloak of Flying}.

Harpy Feathers.name: 鹰身女妖羽毛 Harpy Feathers
Harpy Feathers.description:
这些羽毛可以用来制作一份 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.96Vbld5r0bbEUFJ1]{远程弹药} 或一枚 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.cJKQ5uwGQhilXq8G]{幸运羽毛}。

These feathers can be used to craft a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.96Vbld5r0bbEUFJ1]{Long-Range Ammunition} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.cJKQ5uwGQhilXq8G]{Lucky Feather}.

Quetzalcoatlus Skull.name: 风神翼龙颅骨 Quetzalcoatlus Skull
Quetzalcoatlus Skull.description:
一具风神翼龙的头骨是绝妙的装饰品，只要你有足够的空间来摆放它。

A quetzalcoatlus skull makes for a marvelous decoration, if you have the space for it.

Cauthooj Beak.name: 考苏图喙 Cauthooj Beak
Cauthooj Beak.description:
这只带刺的喙又长又锋利，而且不知为何仍然湿润。一只爪子可用于制作一把造成穿刺伤害的近战武器。该武器上蚀刻着一枚@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DxCuJKynlnMQZHgp]{Striking}符文。该武器的伤害骰也有所提升，造成1d6伤害而非1d4，造成1d8伤害而非1d6，依此类推（最高至1d12）。

This spiky beak is long, sharp, and somehow still wet. A claw can be used to craft a melee weapon that deals piercing damage. The weapon has a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DxCuJKynlnMQZHgp]{Striking} rune etched into it. This weapon also has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4, 1d8 damage instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12).

Devil's Swill.name: 恶魔泔水 Devil's Swill
Devil's Swill.description:
这种泔水呈深红色，夹杂着黑色与橙色的条纹。这种泔水可用于制作一瓶@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.bDnk4TSzvD5BQmE5]{火焰抗力药水}或一瓶@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.ktjFOp3U0wQD9t0Z]{解毒剂}

This swill is dark red with streaks of black and orange. The swill can be used to craft a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.bDnk4TSzvD5BQmE5]{Potion of Fire Resistance} or an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.ktjFOp3U0wQD9t0Z]{Antidote}

Drake Teeth (Poison).name: 龙牙（毒药） Drake Teeth (Poison)
Drake Teeth (Poison).description:
这颗牙齿带有火焰、寒霜或其他与其采集来源的龙相匹配的元素痕迹。这颗牙齿可以被制作成一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.NEqyHUcbhm7wiJ5v]{龙族弹药（毒素）}。

This tooth has traces of fire, frost, or another element matching the dragon it was harvested from. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.NEqyHUcbhm7wiJ5v]{Draconic Ammunition (Poison)}.

Amulet of Seduction.name: 魅惑护符 Amulet of Seduction
Amulet of Seduction.description:
佩戴此护符时，你在引诱另一名生物的欺瞒和交涉检定中获得+2物品加值。此外，任何在你5英尺内的生物在对抗你的欺瞒和交涉DC的检定中承受–1环境减值。

制造需求 初始原材料必须包含一只魅魔之角。

While this amulet is worn, you gain a +2 item bonus to Deception and Diplomacy checks made to seduce another creature. In addition, any creature within 5 feet of you takes a –1 circumstance penalty to checks against your Deception and Diplomacy DCs.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include one succubus horn.

Leshy Spores.name: 莱希孢子 Leshy Spores
Leshy Spores.description:
启动 F 操控

触发 你施放一个以一名生物为目标且具有毒素（特征）的法术。

这些孢子会刺激眼睛与喉咙。当你启动它时，毒素法术所选定的目标生物在对抗该法术的豁免上承受-2环境减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.W8gano6cCfvVjdsE]{效果：莱西孢子}

Activate F manipulate

Trigger You Cast a Spell with the poison trait that targets a creature.

These spores irritate the eyes and throat. When you activate it, the creature targeted by the poison spell suffers a -2 circumstance penalty on its save against the spell.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.W8gano6cCfvVjdsE]{Effect: Leshy Spores}

Raw Plant Stems.name: 生植物茎 Raw Plant Stems
Raw Plant Stems.description:
一旦处理完成，这些茎就如同一份@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.L9ZV076913otGtiB]{口粮}（1周）。

Once cured, the stems function as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.L9ZV076913otGtiB]{Ration} (1 week).

Devil Hide (Greater).name: 魔鬼皮（高等） Devil Hide (Greater)
Devil Hide (Greater).description:
启动 1 交互

这张兽皮很有嚼劲，而且难以下咽。食用这张兽皮后，你获得10点火焰抗力与物理伤害抗力，持续1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.9PajAkSTiivjqwtw]{效果：恶魔兽皮（强效）}

Activate 1 Interact

This hide is chewy and hard to swallow. After consuming this hide, you gain resistance 10 to fire and physical damage for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.9PajAkSTiivjqwtw]{Effect: Devil Hide (Greater)}

Unprocessed Amnesia Venom.name: 未加工的失忆毒液 Unprocessed Amnesia Venom
Unprocessed Amnesia Venom.description:
交互 2 交互

这种毒液会使生物陷入困惑并失去对身体的控制。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}（1 轮）

阶段 2 off-guard 且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}、off-guard 且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}（1 轮）

Interact 2 Interact

This venom causes creatures to become confused and lose control of their bodies.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} (1 round)

Stage 2 off-guard and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}, off-guard, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} (1 round)

Baomal Heads.name: 宝莫尔首级 Baomal Heads
Baomal Heads.description:
如果头部已被收获，你就无法从该生物身上收获任何牙齿。

If the heads are harvested, you cannot harvest any teeth from the creature.

Drake Teeth (Electricity).name: 龙牙（电击） Drake Teeth (Electricity)
Drake Teeth (Electricity).description:
这颗牙齿带有火焰、寒霜或其他与其采集来源的巨龙相匹配的元素痕迹。这颗牙齿可以被制作成一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.howxCMyba5Fzc0Ge]{龙族弹药（电击）}。

This tooth has traces of fire, frost, or another element matching the dragon it was harvested from. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.howxCMyba5Fzc0Ge]{Draconic Ammunition (Electricity)}.

Unprocessed Ether Spider Venom.name: 未处理的以太蜘蛛毒液 Unprocessed Ether Spider Venom
Unprocessed Ether Spider Venom.description:
启动 2 交互

这种毒液略微半透明。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:18]

最大持续时间 6轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]]伤害和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}（1轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[2d6[poison]]伤害、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}（1轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[3d6[poison]]伤害、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 3}以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 2}（1轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This venom is slightly transluscent.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:18]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[3d6[poison]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 3} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} (1 round)

Electric Eel Rawhide.name: 电鳗生皮 Electric Eel Rawhide
Electric Eel Rawhide.description:
这张生皮噼啪作响，仿佛充满了电流。这张生皮可以用来制作一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.8HxM35X8DDt2gw9d]{电鳗皮}。

This rawhide crackles as if filled with electricity. The rawhide can be used to craft an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.8HxM35X8DDt2gw9d]{Electric Eelskin}.

Dragon Teeth (Brass, Gold, or Red).name: 龙牙（黄铜、金或红） Dragon Teeth (Brass, Gold, or Red)
Dragon Teeth (Brass, Gold, or Red).description:
这颗牙齿上带有火焰、寒霜或其他与其采集自的巨龙相匹配的元素痕迹。这颗牙齿可以被制作成一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.rPxVgaEQAlnqcpTO]{龙族弹药（黄铜、金或红）}

This tooth has traces of fire, frost, or another element matching the dragon it was harvested from. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.rPxVgaEQAlnqcpTO]{Draconic Ammunition (Brass, Gold, or Red)}

Homunculus Poison.name: 人造人毒药 Homunculus Poison
Homunculus Poison.description:
启动 2 交互

这种毒药略带颗粒感。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15]

最大持续时间 6轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]]伤害并且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}（1轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This poison is slightly grainy.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (1 round)

Darkness Grenade (Moderate).name: 黑暗手榴弹（中等） Darkness Grenade (Moderate)
Darkness Grenade (Moderate).description:
当你启动这枚手榴弹时，你让它沿着地面弹跳，直到它停在你20尺内一个未被占据的空间中。一团浓厚的 @Template[type:burst|distance:15]{15尺半径} 黑暗帷幕从弹体中爆发，阻止光线穿透或在该区域内发散，效果如同 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.4GE2ZdODgIQtg51c]{黑暗} 法术。该黑暗持续[[/r 1d4 + 1#黑暗持续时间]]轮。

即使具有黑暗视觉（但不包括高等黑暗视觉）的生物，也只能勉强看穿这片黑暗。具有黑暗视觉的生物将通过该黑暗看到的目标视为隐蔽。

When you activate this grenade, you bounce it along the floor until it comes to rest in an unoccupied space within 20 feet of you. A thick @Template[type:burst|distance:15]{15-foot-radius} shroud of darkness erupts from the shell, preventing light from penetrating or emanating within the area, like with the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.4GE2ZdODgIQtg51c]{Darkness} spell. The darkness lasts for [[/r 1d4 + 1#Darkness duration]] rounds.

Even creatures with darkvision (but not greater darkvision) can barely see through the darkness. Creatures with darkvision treat targets seen through the darkness as concealed.

Unprocessed Dark Naga Venom.name: 未处理的黑暗娜迦毒液 Unprocessed Dark Naga Venom
Unprocessed Dark Naga Venom.description:
启动 2 交互

这种毒液会导致昏迷，使其效果的受害者成为容易捕食的猎物。

豁免投掷 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:22]

最长持续时间 6 分钟

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2}（1 轮）

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}，且无法进行察觉检定以醒来（[[/r 1d4+1# minutes asleep]] 分钟睡眠）

Activate 2 Interact

This venom can cause unconsciousness, making the victim of its effects easy prey.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:22]

Maximum Duration 6 minutes

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} (1 round)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} with no Perception check to wake up ([[/r 1d4+1# minutes asleep]] minutes)

Pure Light.name: 纯净之光 Pure Light
Pure Light.description:
这瓶液体闪闪发光，在10英尺半径内提供明亮光照，并在接下来的10英尺内提供昏暗光照。它可用于制作 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.XpmPX3ScEOBgAoKd]{显形蜡烛}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.61mFRFnaCLHDtvdv]{真理蜡烛}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qnvq3PSTiejQTSi9]{幽灵墨水}，或一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.NI7twU2G6UCDmvCO]{闪光弹药}。

This vial of liquid glows, shedding bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for the next 10 feet. It can be used to craft a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.XpmPX3ScEOBgAoKd]{Candle of Revealing}, a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.61mFRFnaCLHDtvdv]{Candle of Truth}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qnvq3PSTiejQTSi9]{Ghost Ink}, or a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.NI7twU2G6UCDmvCO]{Shining Ammunition}.

Linnorm Tendons.name: 林诺姆肌腱 Linnorm Tendons
Linnorm Tendons.description:
启动 1 互动

这条肌腱坚韧而有弹性。食用这条肌腱后，你获得6环@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.aqRYNoSvxsVfqglH]{不受束缚的移动}的效果，持续10分钟。

Activate 1 Interact

The tendon is tough and flexible. After consuming this tendon, you gain the effects of a 6th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.aqRYNoSvxsVfqglH]{Unfettered Movement} for 10 minutes.

Wight Hand.name: 尸妖之手 Wight Hand
Wight Hand.description:
启动 R 构想

触发 你被降至 0 生命值。

这只手枯槁扭曲，并散发出淡淡的黑雾。当你启动这只手时，在你承受被降至 0 生命值的后果之前，你可以进行一次打击。

Activate R envision

Trigger You are reduced to 0 Hit Points.

This hand is gnarled and produces a faint, black mist. When you activate the hand, you can make one Strike before you suffer the consequences of being reduced to 0 Hit Points.

Hourglass of Lesser Death.name: 次级死亡沙漏 Hourglass of Lesser Death
Hourglass of Lesser Death.description:
启动 1 交互

当你启动这个沙漏时，你将其翻转，让凡人时代之沙落下。持续1分钟，你会自动知晓所有你能看见的生物的生命值、状态、苦难与情绪。效果结束时，沙子流尽，沙漏碎裂成片。你失去你所有的生命值并陷入昏迷，且获得濒死（状态）2。你照常将你可能拥有的任何重伤值加入此濒死（状态）。

Activate 1 Interact

When you activate this hourglass, you turn it and let the sands of mortal time fall. For 1 minute, you automatically know the Hit Points, conditions, afflictions, and emotions of all creatures you can see. When the effect ends, the sand runs out and the hourglass cracks into pieces. You lose all of your Hit Points and fall unconscious and are dying 2. You add any wounded value you may have to this dying condition as normal.

Big Crocodile Teeth.name: 大型鳄鱼牙齿 Big Crocodile Teeth
Big Crocodile Teeth.description:
这作为一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{枭熊之爪}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{狼牙}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{染血之爪}护符使用。你在固定护符时选择其中一种。

This functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear Claw}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon} talisman. You choose which when you affix the talisman.

Rakshasa Rawhide.name: 罗刹（特征）生皮 Rakshasa Rawhide
Rakshasa Rawhide.description:
这张皮革非常柔软。这张皮革可以被制作成一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.UAacoSVHrvAwcS5k]{魔法防护斗篷}。

This hide is very soft. The hide can be crafted into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.UAacoSVHrvAwcS5k]{Cloak of Magic Protection}.

Ghast Teeth.name: 食尸鬼之牙 Ghast Teeth
Ghast Teeth.description:
启动 F 幻想

触发 你使用已装附的武器成功打击一个活着的、非精灵生物

如果你接触这颗牙齿，它会使你麻木。当你启动这颗牙齿时，该生物必须在一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17] 豁免中成功，否则变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}。它可以在它每个回合结束时尝试一次新的豁免，并且在每次此类豁免中DC累积减少1。

Activate F envision

Trigger You successfully Strike a living, non-elf creature with the affixed weapon

The tooth numbs you if you touch it. When you activate the tooth, the creature must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}. It can attempt a new save at the end of each of its turns, and the DC cumulatively decreases by 1 on each such save.

Centaur Tail Hair.name: 半人马尾毛 Centaur Tail Hair
Centaur Tail Hair.description:
这些毛簇可用于制作一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.n5L7HE9H8jn8ftQy]{攀爬栓}或一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.G4cmHHhAChAlypFN]{攀爬绳}。如果在制作陷阱时作为额外的组件使用，则所需的原材料总成本降低10%。每个陷阱只能以这种方式使用一簇毛或尾毛。

These tufts of hair can be used to craft a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.n5L7HE9H8jn8ftQy]{Climbing Bolt} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.G4cmHHhAChAlypFN]{Rope of Climbing}. If used as an additional component when crafting a snare, the cost of the total required raw materials is lowered by 10%. Only one tuft or tail hair can be used in this manner per snare.

Creation Oil.name: 造物油 Creation Oil
Creation Oil.description:
启用 1 交互

这种液体闪烁着明亮的金色光泽。该油可以涂抹在一把近战武器上，或涂抹在五发弹药上。在接下来的10分钟内，该武器或弹药在命中时会额外造成1d6活力伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.ImuPiyiO0LuDBtCC]{效果：创生之油}

Activate 1 Interact

This liquid shimmers, golden and bright. The oil can be applied to a melee weapon or to five pieces of ammunition. For the next 10 minutes, the weapon or ammunition deals an additional 1d6 vitality damage on a hit.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.ImuPiyiO0LuDBtCC]{Effect: Creation Oil}

Holy Rune Framework.name: 神圣符文框架 Holy Rune Framework
Holy Rune Framework.description:
该框架概述了安装一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DH0kB9Wbr5pDeunX]{神圣}符文的步骤。当你将神圣符文蚀刻到一把武器上时，其价格降低25%。

This framework outlines the steps to install a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DH0kB9Wbr5pDeunX]{Holy} rune. When you etch the holy rune into a weapon, its price is lowered by 25%.

Dryad Leaves.name: 树精叶片 Dryad Leaves
Dryad Leaves.description:
启动 F 操控

触发 你施放一个需要你为火焰伤害掷骰的法术。

这些叶子美丽且极易燃。当你启动一片叶子并为该法术掷骰伤害时，你额外掷1个火焰伤害骰。

Activate F manipulate

Trigger You cast a spell that requires you to roll for fire damage.

These leaves are beautiful and highly flammable. When you activate a leaf and roll damage for the spell, you roll 1 additional die of fire damage.

Basilisk Teeth.name: 蛇发怪之牙 Basilisk Teeth
Basilisk Teeth.description:
这颗牙齿作为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear Claw}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon}护符使用。你在固定护符时选择其中一种。

This tooth functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear Claw}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon} talisman. You choose which when you affix the talisman.

Snakeskin (Viper).name: 蛇皮（蝰蛇） Snakeskin (Viper)
Snakeskin (Viper).description:
蛇皮凭借其独特的纹理和美丽的鳞片，在许多市场都能找到并出售。

With its distinctive pattern and beautiful scales, snakeskin can be found and sold in many markets.

Tiny Plague Doctor Mask.name: 微型瘟疫医生面具 Tiny Plague Doctor Mask
Tiny Plague Doctor Mask.description:
启动 F 构想

触发 你施放一个法术或使用一个带有听觉（特征）的能力。

这张面具被制作成适合微小的鸟类头骨。当你启动面具时，该法术或能力的目标在其豁免上承受−2环境减值。

Activate F envision

Trigger You cast a spell or use an ability with the auditory trait.

This mask was made to fit a tiny avian skull. When you activate the mask, the target of the spell or ability suffers a −2 circumstance penalty on its save.

Fear Enhancement Gas.name: 恐惧增强气体 Fear Enhancement Gas
Fear Enhancement Gas.description:
启动 F 操作

触发 你使另一名生物变为惊惧（状态）。

你通过吸入来启动这份气体。当你这么做时，你施加在目标上的惊惧（状态）的数值增加1，至多为3。

制造需求 初始制造材料必须包含一小瓶恐惧信息素。

Activate F manipulate

Trigger You cause another creature to become frightened.

You activate this gas by inhaling it. When you do, the value of the frightened condition you're imposing on the target increases by 1, to a maximum of 3.

Craft Requirements The initial crafting materials must include one vial of fear pheromones.

Dragon Wing.name: 龙翼 Dragon Wing
Dragon Wing.description:
这些翅膀呈皮革质感，覆盖着细小的鳞片。这些翅膀可以被制作成一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.SZa5q9ZpMTSz3VK6]{反应性抗力斗篷}

These wings are leathery and covered in small scales. The wings can be crafted into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.SZa5q9ZpMTSz3VK6]{Cloak of Reactive Resistance}

Manifesto.name: 宣言 Manifesto
Manifesto.description:
如果你在尝试回忆知识以了解这份宣言取自的那位先知的专长时查阅这段文本，你在此次掷骰中获得+2物品加值。

If you consult this text while trying to Recall Knowledge about the specialty of the prophet the manifesto was taken from, you gain a +2 item bonus to the roll.

Unprocessed Sea Serpent Algae.name: 未加工海蛇海藻 Unprocessed Sea Serpent Algae
Unprocessed Sea Serpent Algae.description:
启动 2 交互

海蛇藻类备受追捧，尤其受到以飞行猎物为目标的猎人青睐。

豁免掷骰 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:27]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑}，且若在飞行，该生物在其每个回合的第一个动作必须用于下降20英尺（1 轮）

阶段 2 困惑，且若在飞行，该生物会下降直到抵达下方的地面或水面（1 轮）。

Activate 2 Interact

Sea serpent algae is highly sought-after, especially by hunters targeting flying prey.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:27]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} and, if flying, the creature spends its first action each turn to descend 20 feet (1 round)

Stage 2 confused and, if flying, the creature descends until it reaches the ground or water below (1 round).

Simurgh Fangs.name: 西穆尔格之牙 Simurgh Fangs
Simurgh Fangs.description:
这枚毒牙作为一枚@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.sjxhPujyv6rJJRWO]{毒蛇之牙}护符起效。

This fang functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.sjxhPujyv6rJJRWO]{Viper's Fang} talisman.

Apron (Functions as Padded Armor).name: 围裙（视为衬垫护甲） Apron (Functions as Padded Armor)
Apron (Functions as Padded Armor).description:
这件围裙的功能等同于一套@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{软垫护甲}，但穿上这件围裙需要3次@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F]{交互}动作，脱下它需要1次交互动作。

This apron functions as a set of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{Padded Armor}, except it takes 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F]{Interact} actions to don the apron and 1 Interact action to remove it.

Lich Nail.name: 巫妖之钉 Lich Nail
Lich Nail.description:
启动 F 构想

触发 你使用已装附的武器成功打击一名活体生物。

这枚钉子裂开并覆有尸尘。当你启动它时，被你打击伤害的生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:26] 豁免，否则将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹} 状态，持续 1 轮。

Activate F envision

Trigger You successfully Strike a living creature with the affixed weapon.

This nail is split and covered in corpse dust. When you activate it, the creature damaged by your Strike must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:26] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} for 1 round.

Gug Teeth.name: 古格牙齿 Gug Teeth
Gug Teeth.description:
这颗牙齿很锋利，上面带有血迹。这颗牙齿可以被制作成一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{怪物精准弹药}。

This tooth is sharp with traces of blood on it. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{Monster Precision Ammunition}.

Miner's Harness.name: 矿工挽具 Miner's Harness
Miner's Harness.description:
矿工挽具的功能等同于一套@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{皮甲}，但穿戴该挽具需要3次交互动作，脱下它需要1次交互动作。此外，当你使用该挽具并配合@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.9UJbMaglf35GVzaZ]{攀爬工具组}进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.pprgrYQ1QnIDGZiy]{攀爬}时，你获得+1物品加值

The miner's harness functions as a set of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor}, except it takes 3 Interact actions to don the harness and 1 Interact action to remove it. In addition, you gain a +1 item bonus when @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.pprgrYQ1QnIDGZiy]{Climbing} using the harness alongside a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.9UJbMaglf35GVzaZ]{Climbing Kit}

Perfect Wemmuth Thorns.name: 完美的韦姆穆斯荆棘 Perfect Wemmuth Thorns
Perfect Wemmuth Thorns.description:
这根刺处于完好无损的状态，且令人惊讶地配重良好。一根完美的维穆斯刺可以作为一枚+1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DxCuJKynlnMQZHgp]{Striking} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Tt4Qw64fwrxhr5gT]{Dart}使用。

This thorn is in pristine condition and is surprisingly well weighted. A perfect wemmuth thorn can be used as a +1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DxCuJKynlnMQZHgp]{Striking} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Tt4Qw64fwrxhr5gT]{Dart}.

Roper Eye.name: 罗珀之眼 Roper Eye
Roper Eye.description:
启动 1 交互

这只眼睛呈红色且饱满。食用这只眼睛后，你获得黑暗视觉，持续1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.FdptScLJSOLSC4z7]{效果：绞索怪之眼}

Activate 1 Interact

The eye is reddish and full. After consuming this eye, you gain darkvision for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.FdptScLJSOLSC4z7]{Effect: Roper Eye}

Swift Water.name: 迅捷之水 Swift Water
Swift Water.description:
这只小瓶中的水在持续的漩涡中旋转。饮下这水后，你的游泳速度在 1 小时内翻倍。

The water in this vial swirls in a constant vortex. After drinking this water, your swim Speed is doubled for 1 hour.

Skulltaker's Shroud.name: 夺颅者的裹尸布 Skulltaker's Shroud
Skulltaker's Shroud.description:
这件破烂的裹尸布的缠裹中绑着些许骨片。穿着裹尸布时，你获得寒冷抗力10。

启动 R 构想

触发 你受到穿刺或挥砍伤害。

效果 你获得对触发的伤害的抗力10。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.MsFltMPm4TwJXxqx]{效果：夺颅者的裹尸布}

This ragged shroud has pieces of bone bound within its wraps. You gain cold resistance 10 while wearing the shroud.

Activate R envision

Trigger You take piercing or slashing damage.

Effect You gain resistance 10 to the triggering damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.MsFltMPm4TwJXxqx]{Effect: Skulltaker's Shroud}

Draconic Ammunition (Blue or Bronze).name: 龙族弹药（蓝龙或青铜龙） Draconic Ammunition (Blue or Bronze)
Draconic Ammunition (Blue or Bronze).description:
弹药 箭、弩矢

被该弹药命中的生物会受到1d6点伤害，其伤害类型与巨龙的颜色相匹配（见下表）。

制作需求 初始制作材料必须包括一颗龙牙或其他合适的牙齿（见生物条目）。

巨龙类型 伤害类型
黑龙或铜龙 强酸
蓝龙或青铜龙 电击
黄铜龙、金龙或红龙 火焰
绿龙 毒素
银龙或白龙 寒冷

 

Ammunition arrow, bolt

A creature hit with this ammunition takes 1d6 damage of a type matching the dragon's color (see the table below).

Craft Requirements The initial crafting materials must include one dragon tooth or other suitable tooth (see creature entries).

Dragon Type Damage Type
Black or Copper Acid
Blue or Bronze Electricity
Brass, gold, or red Fire
Green Poison
Silver or white Cold

Innkeeper's Ledger.name: 旅店老板的账簿 Innkeeper's Ledger
Innkeeper's Ledger.description:
这本账簿记录了过去一个月内在对应旅店租住过客房的所有住客。

This ledger contains a record of all guests who have rented a room in the corresponding inn within the past month.

Animal Carapace.name: 动物甲壳 Animal Carapace
Animal Carapace.description:
这种甲壳取自动物，常用于护甲镶板。你可以将这些甲壳部分作为原材料，用来制作一套板甲。

This carapace is taken from an animal and is often used in armor plating. You can use these sections of carapace as raw materials to craft a set of plate armor.

Unprocessed Goliath Spider Venom.name: 未加工的巨石蜘蛛毒液 Unprocessed Goliath Spider Venom
Unprocessed Goliath Spider Venom.description:
启动 2 交互

这种毒液呈灰白色。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:27]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[2d6[poison]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[2d6[poison]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 2}（1 轮）

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}，持续 [[/r 2d4#hours paralyzed]] 小时。

Activate 2 Interact

This venom is an off-white color.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:27]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} (1 round)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} for [[/r 2d4#hours paralyzed]] hours.

Protean Blood (Greater).name: 万变血脉（高等） Protean Blood (Greater)
Protean Blood (Greater).description:
启动 1 互动

这份血液浓稠而泛彩。饮用这份血液后，你在1小时内获得15点对酸、闪电或音波伤害的抗力。你在饮用血液时选择伤害类型。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.ircTBjESE5Krfour]{效果：变幻体之血（强效）}

Activate 1 Interact

This blood is thick and iridescent. After consuming this blood, you gain resistance 15 to acid, electricity, or sonic damage for 1 hour. You choose the damage type when you drink the blood.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.ircTBjESE5Krfour]{Effect: Protean Blood (Greater)}

Unprocessed Crag Linnorm Venom.name: 未处理的峭岩林虫龙毒液 Unprocessed Crag Linnorm Venom
Unprocessed Crag Linnorm Venom.description:
启动 2 交互

这种毒液炽热灼人，会逸散出缕缕薄烟。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:31]

最大持续时间 10 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[4d6[fire]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[6d6[fire]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 2}（1 轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This venom is searing hot and lets off thin wisps of smoke.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:31]

Maximum Duration 10 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[4d6[fire]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[6d6[fire]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} (1 round)

Displacement Cloak.name: 移位斗篷 Displacement Cloak
Displacement Cloak.description:
这件斗篷会在空间中偏移并弯折光线，使得佩戴者更难被命中。穿着这件斗篷时，你在隐匿检定上获得+2物品加值。

启动 1 操控

频率 每日一次

效果 在接下来的10分钟内，你更难被命中。以你为目标的生物必须尝试一次@Check[type:flat|dc:11]纯骰检定，如同你处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐匿}状态一般，尽管你仍保持被观察。

诸如@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.y2XeMe1F18lIyo59]{盲斗}专长以及半身人的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.ancestryfeatures.y1EmCv2cEb5hXBwx]{锐利双眼}这类对抗隐匿生物的纯骰检定也适用的能力，在你处于斗篷的效果影响下时同样对你生效。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包括两块星界魔裔的皮。

This cloak shifts in space and bends the light, making it harder to hit the wearer. While wearing this cloak, you gain a +2 item bonus to Stealth checks.

Activate 1 manipulate

Frequency once per day

Effect For the next 10 minutes, you are harder to hit. Creatures targeting you must attempt a @Check[type:flat|dc:11] check, as if you were @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}, even though you remain observed.

Things such as the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.y2XeMe1F18lIyo59]{Blind-Fight} feat and halfling’s @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.ancestryfeatures.y1EmCv2cEb5hXBwx]{Keen Eyes} that apply to the flat check against hidden creatures also apply against you when you are under the effects of the cloak.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include two sections of astradaemon hide.

Spell Essence.name: 法术精华 Spell Essence
Spell Essence.description:
启动 F 操控

触发 你施放一个需要你为伤害掷骰的法术

需求 你在奥术学中受训。

这种虹彩液体会产生浓雾和刺鼻气味。当你启动它并为该法术的伤害掷骰时，你可以将任意掷出1或2的结果重骰，并且必须采用新的结果。

制作需求 消耗一个法术位。

Activate F manipulate

Trigger You cast a spell that requires you to roll damage

Requirements You are trained in Arcana.

This iridescent liquid produces a thick mist and sharp smell. When you activate it and roll damage for the spell, you can reroll any results of 1 or 2 and must take the new results.

Craft Requirements Expend one spell slot.

Alghollthu Mucus (Greater).name: 阿尔古苏黏液（强效） Alghollthu Mucus (Greater)
Alghollthu Mucus (Greater).description:
启动 1 交互

这种黏液从夺心魔鱼身上提取，有时会被富有创意的刺客使用。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:25]

潜伏期 1分钟

最大持续时间 1小时

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}（10分钟）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 3}（10分钟）

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 4}，且你失去呼吸空气的能力，但获得呼吸水的能力（10分钟）

Activate 1 Interact

This mucus is extracted from aboleths and is sometimes used by creative assassins.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:25]

Onset 1 minute

Maximum Duration 1 hour

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (10 minutes)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 3} (10 minutes)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 4} and you lose the ability to breathe air, but gain the ability to breathe water (10 minute)

Barguest Teeth.name: 巴格斯特之牙 Barguest Teeth
Barguest Teeth.description:
这颗牙齿干净而锋利。这颗牙齿可以被制作成一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{怪物精准弹药}。

This tooth is clean and sharp. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{Monster Precision Ammunition}.

Hooded Cloak.name: 兜帽斗篷 Hooded Cloak
Hooded Cloak.description:
这件斗篷带有兜帽，让你更容易混入人群。穿着这件斗篷时，当你在人群中进行用于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{躲藏} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行} 的隐匿检定时，你获得+1物品加值。

This cloak has a hood, letting you easier mingle with the crowd. While wearing the cloak, you gain a +1 item bonus to Stealth checks made to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} in a crowd of people.

Caligni Dust.name: 卡林吉尘埃 Caligni Dust
Caligni Dust.description:
这种粉尘在被照亮时会闪烁。这种粉尘可用于制作一剂 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.cTBmQgWUyf50x3dY]{黑涂毒药}。

This dust glints when illuminated. The dust can be used to craft a dose of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.cTBmQgWUyf50x3dY]{Black Smear Poison}.

Vampire Fangs.name: 吸血鬼（特征）獠牙 Vampire Fangs
Vampire Fangs.description:
这颗牙齿上有猩红色的纹路，仿佛血管或红色的空腔。这颗牙齿可以被制作成一发 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.F1o4h8GJL8dAGHG8]{吸血弹药}。

This tooth has lines of scarlet in it, like veins or red cavities. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.F1o4h8GJL8dAGHG8]{Vampiric Ammunition}.

Tor Linnorm Hide.name: 托尔林诺姆鳞皮 Tor Linnorm Hide
Tor Linnorm Hide.description:
这种兽皮具有与龙皮类似的特性。你可以使用这些兽皮片段来制作一套对火焰伤害免疫的龙皮护甲或一面龙皮盾牌。

This hide holds similar properties to dragonhide. You can use these sections of hide to craft a set of dragonhide armor or a dragonhide shield that is immune to fire damage.

Tyrannosaurus Head.name: 暴龙头颅 Tyrannosaurus Head
Tyrannosaurus Head.description:
如果头部被采集，你就不能从该生物身上采集任何牙齿。

If the head is harvested, you cannot harvest any teeth from the creature.

Dark Naga Skull.name: 黑暗纳迦头骨 Dark Naga Skull
Dark Naga Skull.description:
这个头骨具有蛇一般的外观。这个头骨可以被制作成@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qjOhfZHZr5lXiKfG]{思维守护头盔}。

This skull has a serpent-like appearance. The skull can be crafted into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qjOhfZHZr5lXiKfG]{Helm of Thought Guarding}.

Heartstaff of the Simurgh.name: 西穆尔格之心杖 Heartstaff of the Simurgh
Heartstaff of the Simurgh.description:
这根法杖的杖冠镶嵌着一只西穆尔格的不朽之心。当作为武器使用时，西穆尔格心杖是一把+2强效猛击法杖。持用它时，你对抗魔法的所有豁免获得+1物品加值。

自愿摧毁一根心杖会召唤出一股烈焰洪流。持用该法杖时，你可以用一个交互动作将其折断。这会释放一个以法杖为中心的@Template[type:burst|distance:30]魔法爆炸。爆炸每消耗法杖中剩余的每一点充能，造成@Damage[2d8[fire]]伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:40|basic:true|traits:death]豁免）。你会自动在该豁免上大失败。免疫火焰的生物不会获得通常的免疫收益，而是将其豁免掷骰结果视为提升一级成功度。因该伤害而降至0生命值的生物会立刻死亡；这是一个死亡效果。

启动 施放法术

效果 你从法杖中消耗一定数量的充能，以从其列表中施放一个法术。

  • 戏法 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4]
  • 1环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.zul5cBTfr7NXHBZf]
  • 2环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.b515AZlB0sridKSq], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{治疗术}
  • 3环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.aewxsale5xWEPKLk]
  • 4环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]
  • 5环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.bay4AfSu2iIozNNW], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.SwUiVavHKMWG7t5K]
  • 6环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.E3X2RbzWHCdz7gsk]
  • 7环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.d6o52BnjViNz7Gub]

制造需求 提供所有列出法术在所有列出等级各一次施放，且初始原始材料必须包含一颗西穆尔格之心。

This staff has the petrified heart of a simurgh as its crown. When used as a weapon, a heartstaff of the simurgh is a +2 greater striking staff. While wielding it, you gain +1 item bonus to all saves against magic.

Voluntarily destroying a heartstaff calls a torrent of flame into existence. While wielding the staff, you can use an Interact action to break it. This releases a @Template[type:burst|distance:30] magical explosion centered on the staff. The explosion deals @Damage[2d8[fire]] damage per charge remaining in the staff (@Check[type:reflex|dc:40|basic:true|traits:death] save). You automatically critically fail your save. Creatures that are immune to fire, instead of gaining the usual benefit of immunity, treat the results of their saving throws as one degree of success better. A creature reduced to 0 Hit Points by this damage dies instantly; this is a death effect.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.

  • Cantrips @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4]
  • 1st @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.zul5cBTfr7NXHBZf]
  • 2nd @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.b515AZlB0sridKSq], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}
  • 3rd @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.aewxsale5xWEPKLk]
  • 4th @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]
  • 5th @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.bay4AfSu2iIozNNW], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.SwUiVavHKMWG7t5K]
  • 6th @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.E3X2RbzWHCdz7gsk]
  • 7th @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.d6o52BnjViNz7Gub]

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells, and the initial raw materials must include one simurgh heart.

Ceustodaemon Horns.name: 刻斯托戴蒙之角 Ceustodaemon Horns
Ceustodaemon Horns.description:
这些角硬如钢铁。两只角可以被制作成一顶@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.JKDQng8JUYE49O2R]{死亡防护头盔}。

The horns are hard as steel. Two horns can be crafted into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.JKDQng8JUYE49O2R]{Helm of Death Protection}.

Sphinx Claws.name: 斯芬克斯之爪 Sphinx Claws
Sphinx Claws.description:
此物品的功能等同于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{枭熊之爪}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{狼牙}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{血腥利爪}护符。你在固定该护符时选择其中一种。

This functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear Claw}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon} talisman. You choose which when you affix the talisman.

Hydra Blood.name: 九头蛇之血 Hydra Blood
Hydra Blood.description:
这血液浓稠而沉重。这血液可用于制作一瓶@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.hDLbR56Id2OtU318]{生命灵药}或一瓶@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.2RuepCemJhrpKKao]{治疗药水}

This blood is dense and heavy. The blood can be used to craft an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.hDLbR56Id2OtU318]{Elixir of Life} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.2RuepCemJhrpKKao]{Healing Potion}

Alchemical Golem Engine Core.name: 炼金魔像引擎核心 Alchemical Golem Engine Core
Alchemical Golem Engine Core.description:
管子和电线让这枚炼金魔像引擎核心看起来像一团由散乱的铜、橡胶和细绳构成的鸟巢。它可以卖给收藏家和发明家，或干脆当作废料出售。

Tubes and wires make this alchemical golem engine core look like a bird's nest of scattered copper, rubber, and string. It can be sold to collectors and inventors, or simply as scrap.

Unprocessed Serpent Venom.name: 未加工的蛇毒 Unprocessed Serpent Venom
Unprocessed Serpent Venom.description:
启动 2 交互

这种毒液呈半透明的黄色。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:22]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[2d6[poison]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 2}（1 轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This venom is a translucent yellow color.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:22]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} (1 round)

Shadow Shift Cloak.name: 暗影转移斗篷 Shadow Shift Cloak
Shadow Shift Cloak.description:
这件斗篷黑得能与阴影融为一体。穿着这件斗篷时，当你站在昏暗光照中，即使对拥有微光视觉或黑暗视觉的生物而言，你也处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包括一张斗篷怪的皮。

This cloak is so dark that it blends in with the shadows. While wearing the cloak, you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} when you stand in dim light, even to creatures with low-light vision or darkvision.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include one cloaker hide.

Clay Golem Engine Core.name: 黏土魔像引擎核心 Clay Golem Engine Core
Clay Golem Engine Core.description:
黏土魔像的核心由雕刻成型的黏土管与块构成。一旦从魔像身上取下，它就出奇地脆弱。它可以卖给收藏家和发明家，或仅仅当作废料出售。

The core of a clay golem is made from sculpted clay tubes and blocks. It is surprisingly fragile when removed from the golem. It can be sold to collectors and inventors, or simply as scrap.

Cockatrice Beak Points.name: 鸡蛇兽喙点数 Cockatrice Beak Points
Cockatrice Beak Points.description:
这只喙很脏但很锋利。喙尖可以被制作成一发 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{怪物精准弹药}。

This beak is dirty but sharp. The beak point can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{Monster Precision Ammunition}.

Dragon Teeth (Black or Copper).name: 龙牙（黑龙或铜龙） Dragon Teeth (Black or Copper)
Dragon Teeth (Black or Copper).description:
这颗牙齿带有火焰、寒霜或其他与其采集来源的巨龙相匹配的元素痕迹。这颗牙齿可以被制作成一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.I02YUoBn9ItwO9BG]{龙族弹药（黑龙或铜龙）}。

This tooth has traces of fire, frost, or another element matching the dragon it was harvested from. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.I02YUoBn9ItwO9BG]{Draconic Ammunition (Black or Copper)}.

Baomal Teeth.name: 鲍莫尔之牙 Baomal Teeth
Baomal Teeth.description:
这颗带刺的牙齿又长又锋利，而且不知为何仍然湿润。牙齿可用于制作一把造成穿刺伤害的近战武器。该武器上蚀刻有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.KCQRFvUgbyclvOGi]{Striking (Greater)}。该武器的伤害骰也有所提升，造成 1d6 伤害而非 1d4，1d8 而非 1d6，依此类推（最高至 1d12）。

This spiked tooth is long, sharp, and somehow still wet. A tooth can be used to craft a melee weapon that deals piercing damage. The weapon has a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.KCQRFvUgbyclvOGi]{Striking (Greater)} etched into it. This weapon also has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4, 1d8 instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12).

Ceustodaemon Blood.name: 刻斯托代蒙之血 Ceustodaemon Blood
Ceustodaemon Blood.description:
启动 1 交互

这血液黑得近乎发黑。饮下血液后，你会被凶残的狂怒充满，并在你的攻击中显露出来。持续1分钟，当你以一次成功的打击命中一名生物时，目标会额外受到1d6点精准伤害。你也会受到这份额外伤害。若由于一次大成功的命中使这额外伤害翻倍，你所受到的伤害也同样翻倍。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.zuPTPeZRWEskMWXu]{效果：刻斯托戴蒙之血}

Activate 1 Interact

The blood is so dark it's almost black. After consuming the blood, you are filled with vicious rage that shows in your attacks. For 1 minute, when you hit a creature with a successful Strike, the target takes an additional 1d6 precision damage. You also take this additional damage. If this extra damage is doubled due to a critical hit, the damage you take is doubled as well.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.zuPTPeZRWEskMWXu]{Effect: Ceustodaemon Blood}

Shield Archon Eyes.name: 盾天使之眼 Shield Archon Eyes
Shield Archon Eyes.description:
启动 2 交互

这只眼睛是白色的，仿佛对世界失明。当你启动这只眼睛时，你将其捏碎并施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{Dimension Door}。当你以这种方式施放该法术时，你可以选择移动到你在该法术射程内可见的一名自愿盟友的空间中。若你如此做，你的盟友与你互换位置，出现在你刚刚空出的空间中，仿佛该盟友也施放了Translocate。

Activate 2 Interact

This eye is white, as if blind to ther world. When you activate the eye, you crush it and cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{Dimension Door}. When you cast the spell this way, you can choose to move into the space of a willing ally you can see within range of the spell. If you do so, your ally switches places with you, appearing in the space you just vacated as if the ally had also cast Translocate.

Shuln Fang.name: 舒尔恩·獠牙 Shuln Fang
Shuln Fang.description:
这根尖牙由精金制成。这根尖牙可用于制作一把来自锤类或剑类武器组的武器。该武器刻蚀有一枚@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.KCQRFvUgbyclvOGi]{Striking (Greater)}符文。该武器还具有以下特性。

撕裂护甲 当你使用此武器进行一次近战打击并造成大成功时，你也会对目标的护甲造成等同数值的伤害，并无视任何低于10的硬度。

This fang is made of adamantine. The fang can be used to craft a weapon from the hammer or sword weapon groups. The weapon has a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.KCQRFvUgbyclvOGi]{Striking (Greater)} rune etched into it. The weapon also has the following feature.

Armor-Rending When you score a critical hit with a melee Strike using this weapon, you deal the same amount of damage to the target's armor, bypassing any Hardness lower than 10.

Simurgh Blood.name: 西穆尔格之血 Simurgh Blood
Simurgh Blood.description:
启动 1 交互

这份血液呈鲜红色——几乎亮得过分。饮用这份血液后，你获得15点火焰伤害抗力，持续1小时。你在持续时间内也免疫睡眠效果与疾病。

Activate 1 Interact

This blood is bright red—almost too bright. After consuming this blood, you gain resistance 15 to fire damage for 1 hour. You are also immune to sleep effects and to disease for the duration.

Devil Hide.name: 魔鬼皮革 Devil Hide
Devil Hide.description:
启动 1 交互

这张皮嚼起来很费劲，难以下咽。食用这张皮后，你获得火焰与物理伤害抗力5，持续1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.jffcSwGeYpgoG030]{效果：魔鬼皮}

Activate 1 Interact

This hide is chewy and hard to swallow. After consuming this hide, you gain resistance 5 to fire and physical damage for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.jffcSwGeYpgoG030]{Effect: Devil Hide}

Unprocessed Sin Spirit (Gluttony).name: 未处理的罪孽之魂（暴食） Unprocessed Sin Spirit (Gluttony)
Unprocessed Sin Spirit (Gluttony).description:
启动 1 交互

罪恶之灵能对其目标造成极其不利的效果。具体效果因其采集自何种罪孽孽种而异。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{汲取 1}（2 轮）

Activate 1 Interact

Sin spirit can have incredibly adverse effects on its target. The exact effects vary depending on the sinspawn it was harvested from.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (2 rounds)

Toxic.name: 毒素 Toxic
Toxic.description:
这把武器会持续渗出稳定的毒液。该武器在一次成功的打击时，额外造成 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害。在一次大成功或大失败的命中时，除非目标在一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24] 中成功，否则目标还会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}，持续至其下一回合结束。

The weapon produces as steady trickle of poison. The weapon deals an additional @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage on a successful Strike. On a critical hit, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} until the end of its next turn unless it succeeds at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24]

Harbormaster Ledger.name: 港务长账簿 Harbormaster Ledger
Harbormaster Ledger.description:
这本账簿记录了过去一个月内所有曾在对应港口靠岸的海上船只。

This ledger contains a record of all seaborne vessels that have docked at the corresponding harbor within the past month.

Hag Coven Amulet.name: 鬼婆（特征）密会护身符 Hag Coven Amulet
Hag Coven Amulet.description:
秘会护身符并不一定意味着鬼婆（特征）是某个秘会的成员，但它们象征着一群鬼婆（特征）聚集所能造成的毁灭。没有秘会的鬼婆（特征）通常在护身符上佩戴一枚空白的吊坠，而受秘会约束的鬼婆（特征）则会在吊坠上刻有代表她们联盟的符号。
