Coven amulets don't necessarily mean the hag is a member of a coven, but they serve as a symbol of the destruction a gathering of hags could cause. Hags without covens usually have a blank pendant on their amulet, while coven-bound hags have a symbol representing their union engraved on the pendant.

Molten Flame.name: 熔融烈焰 Molten Flame
Molten Flame.description:
这种液体闪耀着红、白、黄的色调。熔融火焰可用于制作 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.yd3kEK21YknZLlcT]{炼金火焰}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.bDnk4TSzvD5BQmE5]{火焰抗力药水}，或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.5hNynp5xDp0Z1AFB]{火焰涂层油}。

This liquid glows with hues of red, white, and yellow. Molten flame can be used to craft @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.yd3kEK21YknZLlcT]{Alchemist's Fire}, a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.bDnk4TSzvD5BQmE5]{Potion of Fire Resistance}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.5hNynp5xDp0Z1AFB]{Oil of Fire Coating}.

Deadly Mantis Leg Tips.name: 致命螳螂腿尖 Deadly Mantis Leg Tips
Deadly Mantis Leg Tips.description:
启动 F 想象

触发 你 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap}

需求 你在运动中为专家。

这块腿部轻微抽动。当你启动这条腿时，你可以进行一次跳跃，最多可垂直跳跃40英尺、水平跳跃20英尺。

Activate F envision

Trigger You @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap}

Requirements You are an expert in Athletics.

This bit of leg twitches slightly. When you activate the leg, you Leap up to 40 feet vertically and 20 feet horizontally.

Shemhazian Tail.name: 舍姆哈兹扬之尾 Shemhazian Tail
Shemhazian Tail.description:
这条尾巴又长又重，却出奇地平衡。该尾巴可用于制作一把属于长矛或长柄武器组的武器。该武器上刻有一枚 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.KCQRFvUgbyclvOGi]{Striking (Greater)} 符文。该武器还具有以下特性。

启动 R 操控

触发 一个位于你武器触及范围内的生物在其进行的一个移动动作期间离开一个方格

效果 你尝试对该生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip}。

This tail is long, heavy, and surprisingly balanced. The tail can be used to craft a weapon from the spear or polearm weapon groups. The weapon has a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.KCQRFvUgbyclvOGi]{Striking (Greater)} rune etched into it. The weapon also has the following feature.

Activate R manipulate

Trigger A creature within reach of your weapon leaves a square during a move action it's taking

Effect You attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} the creature.

Scholarly Robes.name: 学者长袍 Scholarly Robes
Scholarly Robes.description:
穿着这些长袍期间，你对学者与学术人士进行基于魅力的检定时获得+1物品加值。

While wearing these robes, you gain a +1 item bonus to Charisma-based checks against scholars and academics.

Poison Base.name: 毒素基础 Poison Base
Poison Base.description:
这种毒药本身只会引起短暂的恶心，但可以被制作成更强力的东西。若在制作毒药时作为额外成分使用，则所需原材料的总成本降低10%。在制作毒药时最多可使用三瓶毒药基底，使材料获得最高30%的折扣。

This poison only causes short-term nausea on its own but can be crafted into something more powerful. If used as an additional component when crafting a poison, the cost of total required raw materials is lowered by 10%. Up to three vials of poison base can be used when crafting a poison, for a maximum 30% discount on materials.

Animal Hide.name: 兽皮 Animal Hide
Animal Hide.description:
这张兽皮取自动物，经常用于鞣制与皮革加工。你可以将这些兽皮片段作为原始材料，用来制作一套 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{皮甲}，或一件由皮革制成的物品。

This hide is taken from an animal and is often used in tanning and leatherwork. You can use these sections of hide as raw materials to craft a set of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor}, or an item made of leather.

Archon Core.name: 天使核心 Archon Core
Archon Core.description:
启动 1 交互

当你注视这枚泪滴状核心时，它会让你充满希望。你可以在手中捏碎核心，使自己获得对 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.EAP98XaChJEbgKcK]{Retributive Strike} 反应动作（）的许可，持续1小时。

Activate 1 Interact

This teardrop-shaped core fills you with a sense of hope when you look at it. You can crush the core in your hand, granting yourself access to the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.EAP98XaChJEbgKcK]{Retributive Strike} reaction for 1 hour.

Quatoid Hide Strips.name: 类凝兽皮革条 Quatoid Hide Strips
Quatoid Hide Strips.description:
启动 1 交互

这块兽皮带有生物发光的光芒。食用这片兽皮后，你在1小时内对抗情绪效果的豁免检定获得+2环境加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.NgjL1A1a92lGY30K]{效果：夸托体兽皮条}

Activate 1 Interact

This hide has a bioluminescent glow. After consuming this piece of hide, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to saving throws against emotion effects for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.NgjL1A1a92lGY30K]{Effect: Quatoid Hide Strips}

Evil Ammunition.name: 邪恶弹药 Evil Ammunition
Evil Ammunition.description:
弹药 箭矢、弩矢

被此弹药命中的生物会额外受到1d6点不洁 @Damage[1d6[spirit]] 伤害。

制作需求 初始制作材料必须包括两根 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.4cPw8hZwW6uvyzvh]{Vrock} 羽毛（见 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-journals.mALAKsH9rWdxCVAi]{图鉴生物条目}）

Ammunition arrow, bolt

A creature hit with this ammunition takes an additional unholy @Damage[1d6[spirit]] damage.

Craft Requirements The initial crafting materials must include two @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.4cPw8hZwW6uvyzvh]{Vrock} feathers (see @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-journals.mALAKsH9rWdxCVAi]{Bestiary Creature Entries})

Gorilla Fangs.name: 猩猩獠牙 Gorilla Fangs
Gorilla Fangs.description:
这件物品的功能等同于一个 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{枭熊之爪}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{狼牙}或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{血淋淋的利爪}护符。你在将护符贴附时选择其中一种。

This functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear Claw}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon} talisman. You choose which when you affix the talisman.

Quasit Venom.name: 小恶魔毒液 Quasit Venom
Quasit Venom.description:
启动 2 互动

这种毒液并不强力，但依然会刺痛。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害（1 轮）

阶段 2 同阶段 1

阶段 3 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}（1 轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This venom isn't potent, but it still stings.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 As stage 1

Stage 3 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 round)

Demonologist Spellbook.name: 恶魔学家法术书 Demonologist Spellbook
Demonologist Spellbook.description:
这本法术书里爬满了法术。它包含以下法术：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.zvKWclOZ7A53DObE]，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.4gBIw4IDrSfFHik4]，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.4koZzrnMXhhosn0D]，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.tlSE7Ly8vi1Dgddv]，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.OhD2Z6rIGGD5ocZA]，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.GKpEcy9WId6NJvtx]。

This spellbook has spells crawled inside it. It contains the following spells: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.zvKWclOZ7A53DObE], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.4gBIw4IDrSfFHik4], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.4koZzrnMXhhosn0D], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.tlSE7Ly8vi1Dgddv], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.OhD2Z6rIGGD5ocZA], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.GKpEcy9WId6NJvtx].

Religious Symbol of Nethys.name: 奈希斯的宗教圣徽 Religious Symbol of Nethys
Religious Symbol of Nethys.description:
如果你正挥舞该圣徽，你在进行欺瞒检定以将自己表现为涅西斯的追随者时，获得+1物品加值。

If you're brandishing this symbol, you gain a +1 item bonus to Deception checks made to present yourself as a follower of Nethys.

Shoggoth Goo.name: 修格斯黏液 Shoggoth Goo
Shoggoth Goo.description:
启动 1 交互

这种黏液呈黑绿色，内部漂浮着细小的发光绿点。当你吞食这种黏液时，你必须在一次 @Check[type:will|dc:34] 豁免中成功，否则将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑} 状态，持续 1 轮（若为大成功或大失败中的大失败，则持续 [[/r 2d4#Rounds confused]] 轮）。若你豁免成功，则你获得对强酸与寒冷伤害的抗力15，持续 1 分钟。 

Activate 1 Interact

This goo is blackish green, with small specks of glowing green floating within. When you consume this goo, you must succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:34] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round (or [[/r 2d4#Rounds confused]] rounds on a critical failure). If you successfully save, you gain resistance 15 to acid and cold damage for 1 minute.

Chimera Wings.name: 奇美拉之翼 Chimera Wings
Chimera Wings.description:
这些翅膀巨大而革质。翅膀可以被制作成一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.um7saAjjztSlDF2O]{飞行斗篷}。

These wings are grand and leathery. The wings can be crafted into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.um7saAjjztSlDF2O]{Cloak of Flying}.

Scalpel.name: 手术刀 Scalpel
Scalpel.description:
这把手术刀的功能如同一把不带投掷特性的匕首。当你进行治疗伤口时，手术刀可作为消耗品使用，使你在医疗检定中获得+1物品加值。

This scalpel functions as a dagger without the thrown property. A scalpel can be used as a consumable when you Treat Wounds, giving you a +1 item bonus to the Medicine check.

Rugged Clothes with Tool Belt.name: 带工具腰带的粗犷衣装 Rugged Clothes with Tool Belt
Rugged Clothes with Tool Belt.description:
这件皮围裙的功能等同于一套@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{软垫护甲}，但它带有工具腰带，允许你将一套工具固定在护甲上。

This leather apron functions as a set of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{Padded Armor}, except it has a tool belt, allowing you to affix one set of tools to the armor.

Snakeskin (Giant Viper).name: 蛇皮（巨型蝰蛇） Snakeskin (Giant Viper)
Snakeskin (Giant Viper).description:
蛇皮有着独特的花纹和美丽的鳞片，在许多市场都能找到并出售。

With its distinctive pattern and beautiful scales, snakeskin can be found and sold in many markets.

Unprocessed Sin Spirit (Greed).name: 未处理的罪恶之灵（贪婪） Unprocessed Sin Spirit (Greed)
Unprocessed Sin Spirit (Greed).description:
启用 1 互动

罪孽灵质会对其目标产生极其不利的效果。具体效果取决于它是从哪种罪裔身上采集的。

豁免投掷 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{反胃 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{反胃 2} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}（2 轮）

Activate 1 Interact

Sin spirit can have incredibly adverse effects on its target. The exact effects vary depending on the sinspawn it was harvested from.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} (2 rounds)

Dhampir Wizard Spellbook.name: 吸血裔（特征） 法师 法术书 Dhampir Wizard Spellbook
Dhampir Wizard Spellbook.description:
这本法术书里爬满了法术。它包含以下法术：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.mAMEt4FFbdqoRnkN]，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.aIHY2DArKFweIrpf]，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]，以及@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.TVKNbcgTee19PXZR]

This spellbook has spells crawled inside it. It contains the following spells: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.mAMEt4FFbdqoRnkN], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.aIHY2DArKFweIrpf], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM], and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.TVKNbcgTee19PXZR]

High-Grade Kraken Rawhide Armor.name: 高等克拉肯生皮护甲 High-Grade Kraken Rawhide Armor
High-Grade Kraken Rawhide Armor.description:
收获宝典注记：由于自定义材料尚未受支持，此物品代表一件通用的海怪生皮护甲，以及其自动化规则。你可以编辑其细节与特征以匹配你想要的护甲类型，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{皮甲} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{胸甲}。

穿戴海怪生皮护甲者获得寒冷抗力 10，以及 30 尺的游泳速度。

制造需求 初始原材料必须包含价值至少 4200 gp + 每 负载 420 gp 的海怪生皮。

Harvest Compendium Note: As custom materials are not yet supported, this item represents a generic piece of Kraken Rawhide armor, along with its automated rules. You can edit its details and traits to match the type of armor you want, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}.

The wearer of kraken rawhide armor has cold resistance 10 and a swim Speed of 30 feet.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include kraken rawhide worth at least 4200 gp + 420 gp per Bulk.

Hyena Fangs.name: 鬣狗獠牙 Hyena Fangs
Hyena Fangs.description:
此物的功能等同于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{枭熊爪}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{狼牙}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{染血利爪}护符。你在贴附护符时选择其中一种。

This functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear Claw}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon} talisman. You choose which when you affix the talisman.

Angel Blood.name: 天使之血 Angel Blood
Angel Blood.description:
血液中夹杂着金色条纹。天使之血可用于制作一瓶@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.hDLbR56Id2OtU318]{生命灵药}或一瓶@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.2RuepCemJhrpKKao]{治疗药水}。

The blood is lined with streaks of gold. Angel blood can be used to craft an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.hDLbR56Id2OtU318]{Elixir of Life} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.2RuepCemJhrpKKao]{Healing Potion}.

Roper Strands.name: 罗珀垂丝 Roper Strands
Roper Strands.description:
这些丝线偶尔会自行收紧。一根丝线可用于制作一件来自连枷武器组的武器。该武器上蚀刻有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DKWuJb2rSgiotOG7]{武器强能（+1）}符文，且如果它原本没有擒拿（武器特征）武器特征，则获得擒拿（武器特征）武器特征。

These strands occasionally constrict on their own. A strand can be used to craft a weapon from the flail weapon group. The weapon has a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DKWuJb2rSgiotOG7]{Weapon Potency (+1)} rune etched into it, and it has the grapple weapon trait if it doesn't already.

Big Deinosuchus Teeth.name: 巨型恐鳄之牙 Big Deinosuchus Teeth
Big Deinosuchus Teeth.description:
此物品的功能等同于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear Claw}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang}或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon} 护符。你在贴附该护符时选择其一。

This functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear Claw}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon} talisman. You choose which when you affix the talisman.

Fake Relics.name: 赝品圣物 Fake Relics
Fake Relics.description:
这些遗物在未经训练的眼中看起来很有价值，其价值增加十倍。当试图出售这些遗物时，买家必须在DC 15 宗教检定中成功，才能判断这些遗物是假的。

These relics look valuable to the untrained eye, increasing in value tenfold. When attempting to sell the relics, the buyer must succeed at a DC 15 Religion check to determine that the relics are fake.

Distilled Kraken Ink.name: 精炼海怪墨汁 Distilled Kraken Ink
Distilled Kraken Ink.description:
启动 R 交互

触发 你在水下并从敌对来源受到伤害

需求 你具有游泳速度。

这种墨汁漆黑如夜，质地如凝胶。当你受到伤害时，你可以打破小瓶并释放墨汁。墨汁充满以你为中心的 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20]。云雾内的生物会暴露于海妖墨汁毒素，并且在云雾内时处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未被侦测} 状态。墨汁持续 1 分钟，或直到被强水流驱散。

海妖墨汁 （毒素）；海妖对该毒素免疫。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:39|traits:poison]

最大持续时间 10 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[3d6[poison]] 伤害且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[4d6[poison]] 伤害且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}（1 轮）

Activate R Interact

Trigger You take damage from a hostile source and you are underwater

Requirements You have a swim speed.

This ink is pitch black and has the consistency of gel. When you take damage, you can break the vial and unleash the ink. The ink fills a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] centered on you. Creatures inside the cloud are exposed to kraken ink poison and are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} while inside the cloud. The ink lasts for 1 minute or until dispersed by a strong current.

Kraken Ink (poison); Krakens are immune to this poison.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:39|traits:poison]

Maximum Duration 10 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[3d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[4d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (1 round)

Sea Serpent Teeth.name: 海蛇之牙 Sea Serpent Teeth
Sea Serpent Teeth.description:
这颗牙齿干净而锋利。这颗牙齿可以被制作成一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{怪物精准弹药}。

This tooth is clean and sharp. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{Monster Precision Ammunition}.

Ancient Dragon Fangs (Brass, Gold, or Re.name: 远古巨龙之牙（黄铜、黄金或红） Ancient Dragon Fangs (Brass, Gold, or Red)
Ancient Dragon Fangs (Brass, Gold, or Re.description:
这枚尖牙接触时很烫。尖牙可用于制作一把造成穿刺伤害的武器。该武器是一把+1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.RSZwUlCzUX7Nb4UA]{Flaming (Greater)} 武器。该武器的伤害骰也会增加，造成1d6伤害而非1d4，1d8而非1d6，依此类推（最高至1d12）。

This fang is hot to the touch. A fang can be used to craft a weapon that deals piercing damage. The weapon is a +1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.RSZwUlCzUX7Nb4UA]{Flaming (Greater)} weapon. This weapon also has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4, 1d8 instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12).

Elemental Core.name: 元素核心 Elemental Core
Elemental Core.description:
启动 1 互动

这颗核心涌动着元素能量。你可以将这颗核心在手中捏碎，使自己获得 +2 环境加值，用于对抗会造成流血、麻痹、剧毒或睡眠的效果。此效果持续 1 小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.N3Gf09i6ELBc3wQR]{效果：元素核心}

Activate 1 Interact

This core swirls with elemental energy. You can crush this core in your hand, granting yourself a +2 circumstance bonus against effects that would cause bleed, paralysis, poison, or sleep. This effect lasts for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.N3Gf09i6ELBc3wQR]{Effect: Elemental Core}

Daemon Teeth.name: 魔鬼牙齿 Daemon Teeth
Daemon Teeth.description:
这颗牙齿干净且锋利。这颗牙齿可以被制作成一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.cai9yLwnrCPkSxjR]{恶魔精准弹药}。

This tooth is clean and sharp. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.cai9yLwnrCPkSxjR]{Daemon Precision Ammunition}.

Executioner's Hood.name: 行刑者兜帽 Executioner's Hood
Executioner's Hood.description:
这顶黑色兜帽遮住了面部的大部分，只为眼睛和嘴巴留出些许空隙。佩戴它时，你获得对威吓检定的+1物品加值，但对依赖视觉的察觉检定获得-2物品减值。

This black hood covers most of the face, leaving only gaps for the eyes and mouth. While wearing it, you gain a +1 item bonus to Intimidation checks, and but gain a -2 item penalty to Perception checks that rely on sight.

Monster Precision Ammunition.name: 怪物精确弹药 Monster Precision Ammunition
Monster Precision Ammunition.description:
弹药 箭矢、弩矢

被该弹药命中的生物受到 1d4 精确伤害。若该生物与用于制造该弹药的牙齿相匹配，则该加值提高至 2d4。

制作需求 初始制作材料必须包含一枚巴盖斯特、奇美拉、龙龟或其他合适的牙齿（见 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-journals.mALAKsH9rWdxCVAi]{Bestiary Creature Entries}）

Ammunition arrow, bolt

A creature hit with this ammunition takes 1d4 precision damage. This bonus increases to 2d4 if the creature matches the tooth used to make the ammunition.

Craft Requirements The initial crafting materials must include one barghest, chimera, dragon turtle, or other suitable tooth (see @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-journals.mALAKsH9rWdxCVAi]{Bestiary Creature Entries})

Helm of Thought Guarding.name: 思维防护头盔 Helm of Thought Guarding
Helm of Thought Guarding.description:
佩戴时，这顶头盔保护其佩戴者免受侵入性的思想探查。

启动 1 构想

频率 每天一次

效果 你获得对任何形式读心的免疫，持续1小时。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包含一枚黑暗那伽的头骨。

While worn, this helmet protects its wearer from invasive thought probing.

Activate 1 envision

Frequency once per day

Effect You gain immunity to any form of mind reading for 1 hour.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include one dark naga skull.

Unprocessed Hunting Spider Venom.name: 未加工的狩猎蜘蛛毒液 Unprocessed Hunting Spider Venom
Unprocessed Hunting Spider Venom.description:
启动 2 交互

这种毒液呈灰白色。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15]

最长持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d10[poison]] 伤害 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d12[poison]] 伤害，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1} 和 措手不及（1 轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[2d6[poison]] 伤害，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2} 和 措手不及。（1 轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This venom is an off-white color.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d10[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d12[poison]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} and off-guard (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} and off-guard. (1 round)

Pure Earth Essence.name: 纯净大地精华 Pure Earth Essence
Pure Earth Essence.description:
这种精华可能会被误认为普通的泥土。纯粹的大地精华可用于制作 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.YcvSw7Zn3oyqlJaw]{石拳灵药} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.CApjx23qLlH0VPx3]{堡垒之油}。

This essence could be mistaken for common soil. Pure earth essence can be used to craft a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.YcvSw7Zn3oyqlJaw]{Stone Fist Elixir} or an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.CApjx23qLlH0VPx3]{Oil of the Bastion}.

Lion Fangs.name: 狮之尖牙 Lion Fangs
Lion Fangs.description:
这件物品的功能等同于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear Claw}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon} 护符。你在附加护符时选择其中一种。

This functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear Claw}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon} talisman. You choose which when you affix the talisman.

Pure Flame Essence.name: 纯净烈焰精华 Pure Flame Essence
Pure Flame Essence.description:
启动 F 操控

触发 你施放一个需要你为火焰伤害掷骰的法术

需求 你拥有火焰抗力5或更高。

这种精华看起来和摸起来像灰烬，但如果撒在可燃物上会立刻引燃。你启动它时，你不再为该法术掷骰伤害，而是造成该法术可能造成的最大伤害数值。

Activate F manipulate

Trigger You cast a spell that requires you to roll for fire damage

Requirements You have fire resistance 5 or higher.

This essence looks and feels like ash, but if sprinkled over a flammable source it instantly catches flame. When you activate it, instead of rolling damage for the spell, you deal the maximum possible amount of damage.

Cave Worm Stinger.name: 洞穴蠕虫刺针 Cave Worm Stinger
Cave Worm Stinger.description:
这根毒刺柔韧但坚硬。毒刺可用于制作一件属于长矛武器组的武器。该武器上蚀刻有一枚@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DxCuJKynlnMQZHgp]{Striking}符文。该武器的伤害骰也提高：造成1d6伤害而非1d4，造成1d8伤害而非1d6，依此类推（最多至1d12）。

This stinger is flexible but hard. A stinger can be used to craft a weapon from the spear weapon group. The weapon has a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DxCuJKynlnMQZHgp]{Striking} rune etched into it. This weapon also has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4, 1d8 damage instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12).

Terotricus Infestation Spores.name: 特罗特里库斯侵染孢子 Terotricus Infestation Spores
Terotricus Infestation Spores.description:
启动 1 交互

你将侵染孢子撒在脚边的地面上，使孢子侵染附近的地貌。孢子从附近的树木与灌木丛中汲取养分，同时以真菌生长侵染它们。@Template[type:emanation|distance:30] 内所有非魔法植物（但不包括植物生物）枯萎，并长出恶臭的霉菌与黏滑的蘑菇，移除树木与灌木丛提供的任何掩蔽与隐蔽。这些霉菌与蘑菇在附近没有 terotricus 时无法存活，会在 10 分钟内枯萎腐烂。

Activate 1 Interact

You sprinkle the infestation spores on the ground at your feet, causing the spores to infest the nearby landscape. The spores drain nutrients from nearby trees and undergrowth while simultaneously infesting them with fungal growth. All non-magical plant life (though not plant creatures) within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] withers and sprouts foul mold and slimy mushrooms, removing any cover and concealment provided by trees and undergrowth. The mold and mushrooms cannot survive without a terotricus near, withering into rot over the course of 10 minutes.

Holy Ammunition.name: 神圣弹药 Holy Ammunition
Holy Ammunition.description:
弹药 箭矢，弩矢

被此弹药命中的生物会额外受到1d6活力伤害。

制作需求 初始制作材料必须包含两根天界羽毛。

Ammunition arrow, bolt

A creature hit with this ammunition takes an additional 1d6 vitality damage.

Craft Requirements The initial crafting materials must include two celestial feathers.

Draconic Ammunition (Brass, Gold, or Red.name: 龙族弹药（黄铜、黄金或红） Draconic Ammunition (Brass, Gold, or Red)
Draconic Ammunition (Brass, Gold, or Red.description:
弹药 箭矢、弩矢

被此弹药命中的生物会受到1d6点与龙的颜色相匹配的伤害类型（见下表）。

制作需求 初始制作材料必须包含一颗龙牙或其他合适的牙齿（见生物条目）。

龙的类型 伤害类型
黑龙或铜龙 酸
蓝龙或黄铜龙 电击
黄铜龙、金龙或红龙 火焰
绿龙 毒素
银龙或白龙 寒冷

 

Ammunition arrow, bolt

A creature hit with this ammunition takes 1d6 damage of a type matching the dragon's color (see the table below).

Craft Requirements The initial crafting materials must include one dragon tooth or other suitable tooth (see creature entries).

Dragon Type Damage Type
Black or Copper Acid
Blue or Brass Electricity
Brass, gold, or red Fire
Green Poison
Silver or white Cold

Pegasus Feathers.name: 飞马羽毛 Pegasus Feathers
Pegasus Feathers.description:
这些羽毛可用于制作一份@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.96Vbld5r0bbEUFJ1]{长射程弹药}或一枚@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.cJKQ5uwGQhilXq8G]{幸运羽毛}。

These feathers can be used to craft a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.96Vbld5r0bbEUFJ1]{Long-Range Ammunition} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.cJKQ5uwGQhilXq8G]{Lucky Feather}.

Horned Archon Antlers.name: 有角天使鹿角 Horned Archon Antlers
Horned Archon Antlers.description:
这根鹿角覆有一层柔软的绒毛。两根鹿角可以被制作成@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.TdsqJIyIDdy9etH9]{慈善头盔}。

This antler has a fuzzy coat. Two antlers can be crafted into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.TdsqJIyIDdy9etH9]{Helm of Charity}.

Servant's Uniform.name: 仆从制服 Servant's Uniform
Servant's Uniform.description:
这套装束的功能等同于一套皮制护甲。穿着它时，你在进行用于伪装成仆人的欺瞒检定时获得+2物品加值。

This garb functions as a set of leather armor. While wearing it, you gain a +2 item bonus to Deception checks made to pass as a servant.

Sticky Adhesive.name: 黏性胶黏剂 Sticky Adhesive
Sticky Adhesive.description:
启动 1 交互

这种黏合剂又黏又拉丝。黏合剂可以涂在护甲上。任何触碰你或用近战打击命中你的生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:18] 豁免，否则会被黏合剂 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱}，直到它 [[/act escape dc=18]]{逃脱}（DC 18）。命中你的武器会粘在你身上，可以用成功的 @Check[type:athletics|dc:18] 检定以带有操作（特征）的单动作移除。粘在你身上的物品会计入你的负载上限。黏合剂在涂抹后 1 分钟溶解，释放所有被粘住的物体和生物。

Activate 1 Interact

This adhesive is sticky and stringy. The adhesive can be applied to armor. Any creature that touches you or hits you with a melee Strike must succeed at a @Check[type:reflex|dc:18] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} by the adhesive until it [[/act escape dc=18]]{Escapes} (DC 18). A weapon that hits you is stuck to you and can be removed with a successful @Check[type:athletics|dc:18] check as a single action with the manipulate trait. Items adhered to you count towards your Bulk limits. The adhesive dissolves 1 minute after application, releasing all stuck objects and creatures.

Horn of Owlbear Screeching.name: 枭熊尖啸号角 Horn of Owlbear Screeching
Horn of Owlbear Screeching.description:
这支号角装饰着枭熊羽毛。它可以作为乐器演奏，使表演检定获得+2物品加值。

启动 2 操控（听觉，情绪，恐惧，精神）

频率 每日一次

效果 你吹响号角，发出响亮的尖啸。@Template[type:emanation|distance:40]范围内的每个生物必须尝试一次@Check[type:will|dc:18|traits:auditory,emotion,fear,mental]豁免。

无论结果如何，这些生物在1分钟内获得暂时免疫。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

失败 该生物陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。

大失败 该生物陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}，并在1轮内陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包含一套枭熊声带。

This horn is decorated with owlbear feathers. It can be played as an instrument, granting a +2 item bonus to Performance checks.

Activate 2 manipulate (auditory, emotion, fear, mental)

Frequency once per day

Effect You blow in the horn and create a loud screech. Each creature in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:40] must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:18|traits:auditory,emotion,fear,mental] save.

Regardless of the result, creatures are temporarily immune for 1 minute.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include one set of owlbear vocal cords.

Raw Meat.name: 生肉 Raw Meat
Raw Meat.description:
一旦腌制完成，这些肉可作为一份 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.L9ZV076913otGtiB]{口粮}（1周）使用。

Once cured, the meat functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.L9ZV076913otGtiB]{Ration} (1 week).

Unstable Kraken Ink.name: 不稳定克拉肯墨汁 Unstable Kraken Ink
Unstable Kraken Ink.description:
启动 1 打击

这种墨汁漆黑如夜，质地如凝胶。它只能在水下使用。命中时，墨汁会充满以其命中的目标为中心的 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20]。云雾内的生物会暴露于海妖墨汁毒药，并且在云雾内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未察觉}状态。

海妖墨汁 (毒药)；海妖对该毒药免疫。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:39|traits:poison]

最大持续时间 10 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[3d6[poison]] 伤害并且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[4d6[poison]] 伤害并且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}（1 轮）

Activate 1 Strike

This ink is pitch black and has the consistency of gel. It can only be used underwater. On a hit, ink fills a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] centered on what it struck. Creatures inside the cloud are exposed to the kraken ink poison and are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} while inside the cloud.

Kraken Ink (poison); Krakens are immune to this poison.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:39|traits:poison]

Maximum Duration 10 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[3d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[4d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (1 round)

Shadow Stock.name: 暗影储备 Shadow Stock
Shadow Stock.description:
这种原液黑如墨汁，但要浓稠得多。这种原液可用于制作一枚@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.OMGvArw0F13p4Ysw]{黑暗手雷}。

This stock is black like ink, but much thicker. The stock can be used to craft a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.OMGvArw0F13p4Ysw]{Darkness Grenade}.

Drunkard's Outfit.name: 酒鬼装束 Drunkard's Outfit
Drunkard's Outfit.description:
这件围裙的功能等同一套@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{衬垫护甲}。穿着它时，你在进行用于表现得像是醉酒的检定时获得+1物品加值。

This apron functions as a set of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{Padded Armor}. While wearing it, you gain a +1 item bonus to checks made to appear intoxicated.

Keen Rune Framework.name: 锐锋符文框架 Keen Rune Framework
Keen Rune Framework.description:
本框架概述了安装一枚@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.hg3IogR8ue2IWwgS]{锐利}符文的步骤。当你将强击符文蚀刻到一把武器上时，其价格降低25%。

This framework outlines the steps to install a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.hg3IogR8ue2IWwgS]{Keen} rune. When you etch the striking rune into a weapon, its price is lowered by 25%.

Deinonychus Claw.name: 恐爪龙之爪 Deinonychus Claw
Deinonychus Claw.description:
这作为一个 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear Claw}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon} 护符发挥作用。你在将护符固定时选择其中之一。

This functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qoM7Va5GqcLLBzgu]{Owlbear Claw}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.clyXfh0aVXgij2Hb]{Wolf Fang} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon} talisman. You choose which when you affix the talisman.

Low-Grade Bulette Shellplate Armor.name: 低级布蕾特壳板护甲 Low-Grade Bulette Shellplate Armor
Low-Grade Bulette Shellplate Armor.description:
收获图鉴注记：由于尚不支持自定义材料，此物品代表一件通用的步雷特甲壳板甲护甲，以及其自动化规则。你可以编辑其细节与特征，以匹配你想要的护甲类型，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{皮甲} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{胸甲}。

穿戴步雷特甲壳板甲护甲的生物，在进行用于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{跳高} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{跳远} 的运动检定时，获得 +2 物品加值。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包含价值至少 70 sp + 每 负载 7 sp 的 mulette 壳板甲。

Harvest Compendium Note: As custom materials are not yet supported, this item represents a generic piece of Bulette Shellplate armor, along with its automated rules. You can edit its details and traits to match the type of armor you want, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}.

The wearer of bulette shellplate armor gains a +2 item bonus to Athletics checks made to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{High Jump} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump}.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include mulette shellplate worth at least 70 sp + 7 sp per Bulk.

Crag Linnorm Hide.name: 峭岩林巨龙皮 Crag Linnorm Hide
Crag Linnorm Hide.description:
这种兽皮具有与龙皮类似的特性。你可以使用这些兽皮片段来制作一套龙皮护甲或一个免疫火焰伤害的龙皮盾牌。

This hide holds similar properties to dragonhide. You can use these sections of hide to craft a set of dragonhide armor or a dragonhide shield that is immune to fire damage.

Nilith Eyes.name: 尼利斯之眼 Nilith Eyes
Nilith Eyes.description:
启动 F 操控

触发 你施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.LiGbewa9pO0yjbsY]{Confusion}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.U58aQWJ47VrI36yP]{Hallucination}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.9BnhadUO8FMLmeZ3]{Mind Probe}

这只眼睛发出明亮、诡异的红光。当你启动这只眼睛时，触发的法术改为以单动作施放，而非以双动作行动施放。

Activate F manipulate

Trigger You cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.LiGbewa9pO0yjbsY]{Confusion}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.U58aQWJ47VrI36yP]{Hallucination}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.9BnhadUO8FMLmeZ3]{Mind Probe}

This eye glows a bright, eerie red. When you activate the eye, the triggering spell is cast as a single action instead of a two-action activity.

Oil of Evil Coating.name: 邪恶涂油 Oil of Evil Coating
Oil of Evil Coating.description:
启动 1 交互

这种油漆黑而黏稠，如同焦油。该油可以涂抹在一把近战武器上，或涂抹在五发弹药上。持续1分钟，该武器或弹药在命中时会额外造成1d6点邪秽灵魂伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.yx1Fy0AG34psoVDU]{效果：邪恶涂层之油}

Activate 1 Interact

This oil is black and thick like tar. The oil can be applied to a melee weapon or to five pieces of ammunition. For 1 minute, the weapon or ammunition deals an additional 1d6 unholy spirit damage on a hit.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.yx1Fy0AG34psoVDU]{Effect: Oil of Evil Coating}

Keketar Tongue.name: 凯克塔尔之舌 Keketar Tongue
Keketar Tongue.description:
启动 1 交互

这条舌头呈深栗红色。食用这条舌头后，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.SwUiVavHKMWG7t5K] 法术的效果，持续1小时。

Activate 1 Interact

This tongue is a deep maroon. After consuming this tongue, you gain the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.SwUiVavHKMWG7t5K] spell for 1 hour.

Vrock Rawhide.name: 弗罗克生皮 Vrock Rawhide
Vrock Rawhide.description:
这张兽皮呈令人不适的红色。它可用于制作一枚抗电 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Lw3B9DpnyrpXD9Di]{能量抗性} 符文。

This hide is a nasty red color. It can be used to craft an electricity @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Lw3B9DpnyrpXD9Di]{Energy-Resistant} rune.

Sphinx Feathers.name: 斯芬克斯羽毛 Sphinx Feathers
Sphinx Feathers.description:
这些羽毛可以被制作成一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.96Vbld5r0bbEUFJ1]{长射程弹药}或一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.cJKQ5uwGQhilXq8G]{幸运羽毛}。

These feathers can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.96Vbld5r0bbEUFJ1]{Long-Range Ammunition} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.cJKQ5uwGQhilXq8G]{Lucky Feather}.

Lyrakien Wing Dust.name: 莱拉基恩翼尘 Lyrakien Wing Dust
Lyrakien Wing Dust.description:
启用 F 操控

触发 你施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.aqRYNoSvxsVfqglH]{行动自如}

这种粉尘很轻，需要很长时间才能沉降。当你启用粉尘时，触发的法术改为以单动作施放，而非两个动作的行动。

Activate F manipulate

Trigger You cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.aqRYNoSvxsVfqglH]{Freedom of Movement}

This dust is light and takes a long time to settle. When you activate the dust, the triggering spell is cast as a single action instead of a two action activity.

Dragon Fangs (Blue or Bronze).name: 龙牙（蓝龙或青铜龙） Dragon Fangs (Blue or Bronze)
Dragon Fangs (Blue or Bronze).description:
这颗尖牙偶尔会产生电荷。尖牙可用于制作一把造成穿刺伤害的武器。该武器是一把+1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.NVst7e69agGG9Qwd]{Shock}武器。该武器的伤害骰也会增加，将1d4改为1d6、将1d6改为1d8，依此类推（最高至1d12）。

This fang occasionally produces an electrical charge. A fang can be used to craft a weapon that deals piercing damage. The weapon is a +1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.NVst7e69agGG9Qwd]{Shock} weapon. This weapon also has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4, 1d8 instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12).

Dragon Blood (Adult).name: 龙之血（成年） Dragon Blood (Adult)
Dragon Blood (Adult).description:
这种血液十分黏稠，并带有刺鼻的气味。根据采集血液的巨龙种类不同，这种血液可用于制作成年巨龙吐息药水。

巨龙类型 药水
黑龙或铜龙 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.x04huvOBBXmExTDl]{黑龙吐息药水（成年）}
蓝龙或黄铜龙 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.rOQlcAV4m8Zaebue]{黄铜龙吐息药水（成年）}
黄铜龙、金龙或红龙 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Bn1o5foPq1kqZKf0]{红龙吐息药水（成年）}
绿龙 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.eV0owvv0lYQph0nn]{绿龙吐息药水（成年）}
银龙或白龙 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.t9wFCiFkCRcSLtaG]{银龙吐息药水（成年）}

 

This blood is thick and has a sharp smell. This blood can be used to craft a Adult Dragon's Breath Potion, depending on the type of dragon the blood was harvested from.

Dragon Type Potion
Black or Copper @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.x04huvOBBXmExTDl]{Black Dragon's Breath Potion (Adult)}
Blue or Brass @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.rOQlcAV4m8Zaebue]{Brass Dragon's Breath Potion (Adult)}
Brass, gold, or red @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Bn1o5foPq1kqZKf0]{Red Dragon's Breath Potion (Adult)}
Green @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.eV0owvv0lYQph0nn]{Green Dragon's Breath Potion (Adult)}
Silver or white @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.t9wFCiFkCRcSLtaG]{Silver Dragon's Breath Potion (Adult)}

Mage For Hire Spellbook.name: 雇佣法师法术书 Mage For Hire Spellbook
Mage For Hire Spellbook.description:
这本法术书里爬满了法术。它包含以下法术：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4]、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.kBhaPuzLUSwS6vVf]、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Wu0xFpewMKRK3HG8]、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.6Ot4N22t5tPD51BO]。

This spellbook has spells crawled inside it. It contains the following spells: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.kBhaPuzLUSwS6vVf], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Wu0xFpewMKRK3HG8], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.6Ot4N22t5tPD51BO].

Helm of Command.name: 命令头盔 Helm of Command
Helm of Command.description:
这顶头盔赋予其佩戴者领导的能力。

启动 1 操控

频率 每天一次

效果 在接下来的10分钟内，你30尺内的盟友生物获得+1环境加值，适用于攻击掷骰、伤害掷骰、AC、豁免和技能检定。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.CaaGWE07VxN1Ar4d]{效果：命令头盔}

制作需求 初始原材料必须包括一件破损的玛丽莉丝胸甲，或两根深狱炼魔之角。

This helmet imbues its wearer with the ability to lead.

Activate 1 manipulate

Frequency once per day

Effect For the next 10 minutes, allied creatures within 30 feet of you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to attack rolls, damage rolls, AC, saves, and skill checks.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.CaaGWE07VxN1Ar4d]{Effect: Helm of Command}

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include one mangled marilith breastplate, or two pit fiend horns.

Unsweet Dreams.name: 无糖美梦 Unsweet Dreams
Unsweet Dreams.description:
这种毒药常在决斗、会面或其他重要事件前对人使用，以削弱他们，为即将到来的冲突做准备。

启动 1 交互（摄入）

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:27]

潜伏期 1天

最大持续时间 3天

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏}（1天）

阶段 2 疲乏且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{力竭 1}（1天）

阶段 3 疲乏且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{力竭 2}（1天）

This poison is often used against people before a duel, meeting, or other important event to weaken them for the conflict ahead.

Activate 1 Interact (Ingested)

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:27]

Onset 1 day

Maximum Duration 3 days

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} (1 day)

Stage 2 Fatigued and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (1 day)

Stage 3 Fatigued and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} (1 day)

Ooze Goo (Moderate).name: 软泥黏胶（中等） Ooze Goo (Moderate)
Ooze Goo (Moderate).description:
启动 1 打击

这种黏液是一种强力腐蚀剂。软泥黏液的功能等同于一瓶@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.SgtqZxt26BdjUmEB]{强酸瓶（中等）}

 

Activate 1 Strike

This goo is a strong corrosive. The ooze goo functions as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.SgtqZxt26BdjUmEB]{Acid Flask (Moderate)}

Salamander Scales.name: 蝾螈鳞片 Salamander Scales
Salamander Scales.description:
这片鳞片如火焰般闪烁。这些鳞片可用于制作@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Ekk7o1gPu8RotixD]{火蜥蜴药剂}。

This scale shimmers like fire. The scales can be used to craft a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Ekk7o1gPu8RotixD]{Salamander Elixir}.

Triceratops Horns.name: 三角龙之角 Triceratops Horns
Triceratops Horns.description:
三角龙的角是很好的谈话开场白。

The horns of a triceratops make for a great conversation starter.

Cloak of Flying.name: 飞行斗篷 Cloak of Flying
Cloak of Flying.description:
这件斗篷的形状像一对巨大的翅膀。它轻柔地飘动，仿佛有风正迎面吹拂。

启动 1 专注

频率 每天一次

效果 你获得30尺的飞行速度，持续10分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.1Ua3xq6J18YrrL7n]{效果：飞行斗篷}

制作需求 初始原材料必须包括两只奇美拉翅膀或其他合适的翅膀（见 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-journals.mALAKsH9rWdxCVAi]{图鉴生物条目}）

This cloak has the shape of large wings. It flutters gently, as if a wind is blowing against it.

Activate 1 concentrate

Frequency once per day

Effect You gain a fly Speed of 30 feet for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.Item.1Ua3xq6J18YrrL7n]{Effect: Cloak of Flying}

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include two chimera wings or other suitable wings (see @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-journals.mALAKsH9rWdxCVAi]{Bestiary Creature Entries})

Sea Serpent Fin.name: 海蛇鳍 Sea Serpent Fin
Sea Serpent Fin.description:
鳍片光滑且反光。两段鳍片可用于制作一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.6OtYYtILkjoTIjmy]{隐匿披风}。

The fin is slick and reflective. Two sections of fin can be used to craft a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.6OtYYtILkjoTIjmy]{Mantle of Undetection}.

Ancient Dragon Fangs (Black or Copper).name: 远古巨龙獠牙（黑龙或铜龙） Ancient Dragon Fangs (Black or Copper)
Ancient Dragon Fangs (Black or Copper).description:
一缕细细的酸液从这枚獠牙中滴落。獠牙可用于制作一把造成穿刺伤害的武器。该武器是一把+1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.vQUIUAFOTOWj3ohh]{Corrosive (Greater)}武器。该武器的伤害骰也会增加，造成1d6伤害而非1d4、1d8而非1d6，依此类推（最高至1d12）。

A thin stream of acid trickles out of this fang. A fang can be used to craft a weapon that deals piercing damage. The weapon is a +1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.vQUIUAFOTOWj3ohh]{Corrosive (Greater)} weapon. This weapon also has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4, 1d8 instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12).

Brain Collector Venom.name: 脑收集者毒液 Brain Collector Venom
Brain Collector Venom.description:
启动 2 互动

这种毒液带有紫色色调。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20]

潜伏期 1分钟

最大持续时间 6轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}（1轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害，虚弱 1以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 1}（1轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[2d6[poison]] 伤害，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 2}，以及缓慢 1（1轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This venom has a purple tint to it.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20]

Onset 1 minute

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage, enfeebled 1 and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}, and slowed 1 (1 round)

Fey Flux.name: 妖精涌流 Fey Flux
Fey Flux.description:
启动　1　交互

这只小瓶中的液体呈万花筒般的色彩，随着瓶身转动而改变颜色与黏稠度。饮下这份涌流会让混沌进入你的身体，影响你未来的失败与成功。妖精涌流的效果持续24小时或直到被触发，之后涌流会离开你的身体。一个生物一次只能从一剂妖精涌流中获益，而且涌流无法被刻意触发，例如通过攻击盟友、强制进行技能检定或类似行为。若不清楚涌流是否会被触发，则由GM决定其是否会被触发。

你饮下涌流时，进行一次 @Check[type:flat|dc:10]。

成功 在持续时间内，你所掷骰的第一次失败或大成功或大失败会转变为成功。

失败　在持续时间内，你所掷骰的第一次成功或大成功或大失败会转变为失败。

Activate 1 Interact

The liquid in this vial is kaleidoscopic, changing in color and consistency as the vial turns. Drinking the flux causes chaos to enter your body, affecting your future failures and successes. The effects of fey flux last for 24 hours or until triggered, after which the flux leaves your body. A creature can only benefit from one dose of fey flux at a time, and the flux cannot be purposefully triggered, such as by attacking an ally, enforcing a skill check, or similar. If it is unclear whether the flux would be triggered, the GM determines if it would be triggered or not.

Make a @Check[type:flat|dc:10] when you drink the flux.

Success The first failure or critical failure you roll within the duration turns into a success.

Failure The first success or critical success you roll within the duration turns into a failure.

Cleansing Potion (Moderate).name: 净化药水（中等） Cleansing Potion (Moderate)
Cleansing Potion (Moderate).description:
激活 1 交互

饮用这瓶药水会净化你的身体。如果你处于虚弱、恶心、迟缓或呆滞（状态）状态之下，你将其中一种状态的数值降低2。由你选择要降低的状态。

Activate 1 Interact

Drinking this potion cleanses your body. If you are under the enfeebled, sickened, slowed, or stupefied conditions, you reduce the value of one of those conditions by 2. You choose the condition

Unprocessed Guardian Naga Venom.name: 未加工的守护那伽毒液 Unprocessed Guardian Naga Venom
Unprocessed Guardian Naga Venom.description:
启动 2 交互

这种毒液造成毒素伤害并引发嗜睡

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24]

最长持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[3d6[poison]] 伤害（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[3d6[poison]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 1}（1 轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This venom deals poison damage and causes lethargy

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[3d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[3d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (1 round)

Hive Mother Mandibles.name: 蜂巢之母的颚钳 Hive Mother Mandibles
Hive Mother Mandibles.description:
这根颚骨渗出深绿色的腐蚀性液体。一根颚骨可用于制作一把来自锤类武器组的武器。该武器为一把+1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Wm0X7Pfd1bfocPSv]{Corrosive}武器。

This mandible oozes a dark green, corrosive liquid. A mandible can be used to craft a weapon from the hammer weapon group. The weapon is a +1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Wm0X7Pfd1bfocPSv]{Corrosive} weapon.

Guthallath Eyes.name: 古萨拉斯之眼 Guthallath Eyes
Guthallath Eyes.description:
启动2 交互

你可以举起这只眼睛并将其指向你的敌人，以启动其中的毁灭性魔法。启动时，一条 @Template[type:line|distance:120] 从眼睛中喷涌而出。这条线上的一切都会自动被一个8环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{Disintegrate} 法术击中（法术DC 35）。

这只笨重的眼睛从未打算以这种方式被挥舞。当你启动这只眼睛时，你必须进行一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:35]。

成功 你将线稳定住。

失败 你失去握持，眼睛抖动，扰乱了这条线。本会被这条线影响的生物在对抗这条线效果的强韧豁免上获得+5环境加值。

大成功或大失败 眼睛从你手中滑落并失效，直接指向你。这条线会击中你而非你原本的目标。

Activate 2 Interact

You can hold up this eye and point it at your enemies to activate the destructive magic within. When activated, a @Template[type:line|distance:120] erupts from the eye. Everything in this line is automatically hit by an 8th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{Disintegrate} spell (spell DC 35).

This cumbersome eye was never meant to be wielded in this way. When you activate the eye, you must make a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:35].

Success You keep the line steady.

Failure You lose your grip and the eye jitters, disrupting the line. Creatures that would be affected by the line gain a +5 circumstance bonus to their Fortitude save against the line's effects.

Critical Failure The eye slips from your hands and fails, pointing directly at you. The line hits you instead of your intended targets.

Trueseeing Eyes.name: 真知之眼 Trueseeing Eyes
Trueseeing Eyes.description:
启动 2 交互

如果你盯着这只眼睛看得太久，它的瞳孔会颤动。吞食这只眼睛后，你获得6环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{真实视域} 法术的效果，持续1分钟。

Activate 2 Interact

The pupil of this eye shivers if you stare at it too long. After consuming the eye, you gain the effects of a 6th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{True Seeing} spell for 1 minute.

Unprocessed Crimson Worm Venom.name: 未加工的深红蠕虫毒液 Unprocessed Crimson Worm Venom
Unprocessed Crimson Worm Venom.description:
启动 2 交互

这种毒液呈绿色，并带有黄色条纹。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:35]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[2d6[poison]] 伤害并且 Drain 1（1 轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[2d6[poison]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 2}（1 轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This venom is green with streaks of yellow.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:35]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage and drained 1(1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} (1 round)

Faerie Dragonhide.name: 妖精龙皮 Faerie Dragonhide
Faerie Dragonhide.description:
仙灵龙的皮非常柔韧。你可以用这些皮制作一套@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.3gO6Hhy8V9Yufml8]{仙灵龙皮护甲}。

The hide of a faerie dragon is highly flexible. You can use these sections of hide to craft a set of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.3gO6Hhy8V9Yufml8]{Faerie Dragonhide Armor}.

Palace Insignia Chain Mail.name: 宫廷徽记链甲 Palace Insignia Chain Mail
Palace Insignia Chain Mail.description:
穿戴这套锁子甲时，你在伪装成宫廷卫队成员的欺瞒检定上获得+1物品加值。

While wearing this chain mail, you gain a +1 item bonus to Deception checks made to pass as a member of the palace guard.

Pouch of Rocks.name: 石块袋 Pouch of Rocks
Pouch of Rocks.description:
这些石头几乎一文不值，但它们用符号和雕刻进行了漂亮的装饰，使它们看起来很赏心悦目。你在将这些石头作为表演或伪装的一部分时进行的检定获得+1物品加值，例如假装这些石头具有魔法性质。

These rocks are practically worthless, but they are prettily decorated with symbols and carvings, making them nice to look at. You gain a +1 item bonus to checks that use the rocks as part of a performance or disguise, such as pretending the rocks have magical properties.

Gravedigger's Outfit.name: 掘墓人套装 Gravedigger's Outfit
Gravedigger's Outfit.description:
这套服装如同一套 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{皮革护甲}般发挥作用。穿着它时，你在将自己伪装成掘墓人时进行的欺瞒检定获得+1物品加值。

This outfit functions as a set of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor}. While wearing it, you gain a +1 item bonus to Deception checks made to present yourself as a gravedigger.

Unprocessed Sin Spirit (Envy).name: 未净化的罪灵（嫉妒） Unprocessed Sin Spirit (Envy)
Unprocessed Sin Spirit (Envy).description:
启动 1 互动

罪孽之魂会对其目标产生极其不利的效果。具体效果因其采集自哪种罪孽孽种而异。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 2}（2 轮）

Activate 1 Interact

Sin spirit can have incredibly adverse effects on its target. The exact effects vary depending on the sinspawn it was harvested from.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} (2 rounds)

Cloaker Hide.name: 潜藏怪皮 Cloaker Hide
Cloaker Hide.description:
这张皮革能与阴影和黑暗融为一体。这张皮革可以被制作成一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.kYy2bEFdyyWnfJmm]{暗影偏移斗篷}。

This hide blends in with shadows and darkness. The hide can be crafted into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.kYy2bEFdyyWnfJmm]{Shadow Shift Cloak}.

Cinder Smog Cannister.name: 灰烬烟雾罐 Cinder Smog Cannister
Cinder Smog Cannister.description:
启动 R 交互

触发 你因敌对来源而受到伤害。

这只小瓶中的烟雾呈灰色且浓稠，内部夹杂着细小的余烬碎屑。当你受到伤害时，你可以打碎小瓶并释放烟雾。烟雾充满以你空间的一个角为中心的 @Template[type:burst|distance:15]{15英尺半径爆发区域}。在该区域内的所有生物都处于隐蔽状态，而对他们而言，所有其他生物都处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态。任何在烟雾中开始其回合的生物都会受到 @Damage[2d6[fire]] 伤害。烟雾持续1分钟，或直到被强风驱散。

Activate R Interact

Trigger You take damage from a hostile source.

The smog in this vial is gray and thick with small flecks of embers within. When you take damage, you can break the vial and unleash the smog. The smog fills a @Template[type:burst|distance:15]{15-foot radius burst} centered on one corner of your space. All creatures within that area are concealed, and all other creatures are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to them. Any creature that starts its turn within the smoke takes @Damage[2d6[fire]] damage. The smoke lasts for 1 minute or until dispersed by a strong wind.

Unprocessed Giant Octopus Venom.name: 未加工的巨型章鱼毒液 Unprocessed Giant Octopus Venom
Unprocessed Giant Octopus Venom.description:
启动 2 交互

这种毒液会导致笨拙，使受影响者更容易被攻击。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:23]

最长持续时间 6轮

阶段 1 @Damage[2d6[poison]] 伤害和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}（1轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[2d6[poison]] 伤害，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}和措手不及（1轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[2d6[poison]] 伤害，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}和措手不及（1轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This venom causes clumsiness, making it easier to attack those affected.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:23]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} and off-guard (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} and off-guard (1 round)

Cloak of Flexibility.name: 灵活斗篷 Cloak of Flexibility
Cloak of Flexibility.description:
这件有弹性的斗篷可以折叠得非常薄。

启动 1 交互

频率 每日一次

效果 接下来的10分钟内，你可以像小型生物一样穿过狭窄空间，并且可以以你的完整速度进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.kMcV8e5EZUxa6evt]{挤过}。

制作需求 初始原材料必须包括两段咕格生皮。

This stretchy cloak can be folded very thin.

Activate 1 Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect For the next 10 minutes, you can fit through tight spaces as if you were a Small creature and can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.kMcV8e5EZUxa6evt]{Squeeze} at your full Speed.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include two sections of gug rawhide.

Imp Venom.name: 小魔鬼毒液 Imp Venom
Imp Venom.description:
启动 2 交互

这种毒液不算强力，但仍然刺痛。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]]、笨拙 1，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}

Activate 2 Interact

This venom isn't potent, but it still stings.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]], clumsy 1, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}

Sleep Gas.name: 睡眠气体 Sleep Gas
Sleep Gas.description:
启动 1 打击

这种气体带有甜香，会让你昏昏欲睡。命中时，目标及目标周围20英尺内的每个生物都必须在一次@Check[type:fortitude|dc:35|traits:incapacitation,sleep]豁免中成功，否则将陷入昏迷[[/r 1d4#Rounds of unconsciousness]]{1d4轮}（若大失败则为[[/r 2d4#Rounds of unconsciousness]]{2d4轮}）。这是一个睡眠与无力化效果。

Activate 1 Strike

This gas has a sweet scent and makes you drowsy. On a hit, the target and every creature within 20 feet of the target must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:35|traits:incapacitation,sleep] save or fall unconscious for [[/r 1d4#Rounds of unconsciousness]]{1d4 rounds} (or [[/r 2d4#Rounds of unconsciousness]]{2d4 rounds} on a critical failure). This is a sleep and incapacitation effect.

Boar Tusk.name: 野猪獠牙 Boar Tusk
Boar Tusk.description:
启动 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.qQt3CMrhLkUV1wCv]{Sudden Charge}

野猪的獠牙可用于装饰头盔和护甲。当你启动獠牙时，你会进入一次Sudden Charge，如同野蛮人和战士的专长那样。

如果你拥有Sudden Charge专长，你可以作为同一次Sudden Charge动作的一部分进行两次打击。照常将你的多重攻击减值应用于这些打击

Activate 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.qQt3CMrhLkUV1wCv]{Sudden Charge}

The tusks of a boar can be used to decorate helmets and armor. When you activate the tusk, you go into a Sudden Charge, as with the barbarian and fighter feat.

If you have the Sudden Charge feat, you can Strike twice as part of the same Sudden Charge action. Apply your multiple attack penalty to the Strikes normally

Textbook.name: 教科书 Textbook
Textbook.description:
如果你花费1小时研读这本书，你会对教材中涵盖的任意主题获得更深入的理解（由GM决定）。你在关于该特定主题的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}检定上获得+2物品加值。该加值持续的小时数等于你的智力调整值（最少为1）。

If you spend 1 hour studying this book, you gain a further understanding of whatever topic is covered in the textbook (as detrmined by the GM). You gain a +2 item bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} checks about that specific topic. This bonus lasts for a number of hours equal to your Intelligence modifier (minimum of 1).

Elephant Tusks.name: 象牙 Elephant Tusks
Elephant Tusks.description:
构成这根獠牙的象牙备受追捧，价值极高。

The ivory that makes up this tusk is highly sought-after and very valuable.

Apron (Functions as Leather Armor).name: 围裙（功能等同于皮质护甲） Apron (Functions as Leather Armor)
Apron (Functions as Leather Armor).description:
这件皮革围裙的作用等同于一套皮甲护甲，但穿上围裙需要3个【交互】动作，脱下则需要1个【交互】动作。 

This leather apron functions as a set of leather armor, except it takes 3 Interact actions to don the apron and 1 Interact action to remove it.

Shifter Solution.name: 变形者方案 Shifter Solution
Shifter Solution.description:
启动 1 交互

这种液体似乎无法在小瓶中沉淀下来，形态不断扭曲变化。饮用它能让你微妙地改变自己的特征，例如眼睛颜色、头发颜色以及面部特征。你获得+1物品加值于欺瞒检定，以及+2物品加值于用于伪装的检定。在该溶液的效果期间，你进行伪装时不需要伪装工具包。

该溶液持续10分钟，之后会离开你的体内。若你在饮下第一剂后的1分钟内再饮用另一剂，该持续时间将延长至1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.JnnFdkMhe0Y3PEBZ]{效果：变形者溶液}

Activate 1 Interact

This liquid seems unable to settle in its vial, constantly twisting in shape. Drinking it allows you to subtly change your features, such as eye color, hair color, and facial features. You gain a +1 item bonus to Deception checks, and a +2 item bonus to checks made to Impersonate. While under the effects of the solution, you don’t need a disguise kit to Impersonate.

The solution lasts for 10 minutes, after which it leaves your system. If you drink another dose of the solution within 1 minute of drinking the first, the duration is extended to 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.JnnFdkMhe0Y3PEBZ]{Effect: Shifter Solution}

Plant Precision Ammunition.name: 植物精准弹药 Plant Precision Ammunition
Plant Precision Ammunition.description:
弹药 箭矢，弩矢

被此弹药命中的生物会受到1d4精准伤害。若该生物为植物，此加值提升至2d4。

制造需求 初始制造材料必须包含一枚捕蝇草牙齿或其他合适的牙齿（见 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-journals.mALAKsH9rWdxCVAi]{Bestiary Creature Entries}）

Ammunition arrow, bolt

A creature hit with this ammunition takes 1d4 precision damage. This bonus increases to 2d4 if the creature is a plant.

Craft Requirements The initial crafting materials must include one flytrap tooth or other suitable tooth (see @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-journals.mALAKsH9rWdxCVAi]{Bestiary Creature Entries})

Gug Rawhide.name: 古格生皮 Gug Rawhide
Gug Rawhide.description:
这块生皮摸起来很黏滑。你可以使用这些生皮片段来制作一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.x5q0noS2Ue7o6UDU]{灵活斗篷}。

This rawhide is slimy to the touch. You can use these sections of rawhide to craft a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.x5q0noS2Ue7o6UDU]{Cloak of Flexibility}.

Leukodaemon Skull.name: 白亡灵头骨 Leukodaemon Skull
Leukodaemon Skull.description:
头骨呈黏稠的黄色。头骨可被制作成一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.JKDQng8JUYE49O2R]{死亡防护头盔}。

The skull is a sticky yellow. The skull can be crafted into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.JKDQng8JUYE49O2R]{Helm of Death Protection}.

Vrock Feathers.name: 弗洛克羽毛 Vrock Feathers
Vrock Feathers.description:
这根羽毛纯黑，并带有酸味。这些羽毛可以被制作成一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.n2TUsLbQxqCFjPyV]{邪恶弹药}。

This feather is pure black and has a sour smell. The feathers can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.n2TUsLbQxqCFjPyV]{Evil Ammunition}.

Krooth Teeth.name: 克鲁斯之牙 Krooth Teeth
Krooth Teeth.description:
这些牙齿异常锋利。一颗牙齿可以被制作成一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.DBe6zma7g7Gz6YH8]{动物精制弹药}。

These teeth are incredibly sharp. A tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.DBe6zma7g7Gz6YH8]{Animal Precision Ammunition}.

Sea Serpent Blood.name: 海蛇之血 Sea Serpent Blood
Sea Serpent Blood.description:
这种血液在小瓶中呈蓝色，暴露在空气中超过一分钟后会变成红色。该血液可用于制作@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.zcJgT5RS8p2MEbOB]{Sea Touch Elixir}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Eb4dEuV22QVlMumS]{Potion of Swimming}。

This blood appears blue in its vial and turns red when exposed to air for longer than a minute. The blood can be used to craft a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.zcJgT5RS8p2MEbOB]{Sea Touch Elixir} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Eb4dEuV22QVlMumS]{Potion of Swimming}.

Wendigo Eyes.name: 温迪戈之眼 Wendigo Eyes
Wendigo Eyes.description:
启动 1 交互

这只眼睛没有瞳孔，会反射光线。吃下这只眼睛后，你获得黑暗视觉 1 小时。在同样的持续时间内，你在 60 英尺射程内拥有热视。热视是一种精确感官，可看见热量特征。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.eWdllS9UNqQjaheH]{效果：温迪戈之眼}

Activate 1 Interact

This eye has no pupil and reflects light. After consuming this eye, you gain darkvision for 1 hour. For the same duration, you have heatsight out of a range of 60 feet. Heatsight is a precise sense that sees heat signatures.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.eWdllS9UNqQjaheH]{Effect: Wendigo Eyes}

Guardian Naga Scales.name: 守护娜迦鳞片 Guardian Naga Scales
Guardian Naga Scales.description:
启动 F 构想

触发 你通过施放一道神圣法术进行一次反制检定

这些鳞片闪烁并泛着微光。当你启动鳞片时，你在该次反制检定上获得+2物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.BfUlLs17Tx1aJdpp]{效果：守护者娜迦鳞片}

Activate F envision

Trigger You make a counteract check by casting a divine spell

These scales shimmer and glint. When you activate the scale, you gain a +2 item bonus to the counteract check.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-effects.BfUlLs17Tx1aJdpp]{Effect: Guardian Naga Scales}

Remorhaz Mandibles.name: 雷莫拉兹颚钳 Remorhaz Mandibles
Remorhaz Mandibles.description:
这对颚接触时炽热。可以使用一个操作来制作一把属于匕首武器组的武器。该武器是一把+1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.XszNvxnymWYRaoTp]{Flaming}武器。此武器的伤害骰也会增加，造成1d6伤害而非1d4，造成1d8伤害而非1d6，依此类推（最高至1d12）。

The mandible is hot to the touch. A manipulate can be used to craft a weapon from the knife weapon group. The weapon is a +1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.XszNvxnymWYRaoTp]{Flaming} weapon. This weapon also has an increased damage dice, dealing 1d6 damage instead of 1d4, 1d8 damage instead of 1d6, and so on (to a maximum of 1d12).

Ankylosaurus Tail.name: 甲龙尾巴 Ankylosaurus Tail
Ankylosaurus Tail.description:
这条尾巴看起来就像是为挥舞而生。尾巴可以用来制作一把属于棍棒或锤类武器组的武器。该武器上蚀刻有一枚@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DxCuJKynlnMQZHgp]{Striking}符文。如果它原本没有，则它还具有回摆（武器特征）武器特征。

This tail seems like it was made to be swung. A tail can be used to craft a weapon from the club or hammer weapon groups. The weapon has a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DxCuJKynlnMQZHgp]{Striking} rune etched into it. It also has the backswing weapon trait if it doesn't already.

Wyvern Teeth.name: 双足飞龙之牙 Wyvern Teeth
Wyvern Teeth.description:
这颗牙齿干净且锋利。这颗牙齿可以被制作成一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{怪物精准弹药}。

This tooth is clean and sharp. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{Monster Precision Ammunition}.

Striking Rune Framework.name: 强击符文框架 Striking Rune Framework
Striking Rune Framework.description:
该框架概述了安装一枚 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DxCuJKynlnMQZHgp]{Striking} 符文的步骤。当你将 striking 符文蚀刻到一把武器上时，它的价格降低25%。

This framework outlines the steps to install a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DxCuJKynlnMQZHgp]{Striking} rune. When you etch the striking rune into a weapon, its price is lowered by 25%.

Nightmare Smoke.name: 梦魇烟雾 Nightmare Smoke
Nightmare Smoke.description:
启动 R 交互

触发 你受到来自敌对来源的伤害。

这烟雾浓厚而漆黑。当你受到伤害时，你可以打碎小瓶并释放烟雾。烟雾充满一个以你空间的一个角为中心的 @Template[type:burst|distance:15]{15尺半径爆发}。该区域内的所有生物都处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，且所有其他生物对他们而言也处于隐蔽。任何在烟雾中开始其回合的生物变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}（@Check[type:fortitude|dc:19] 无效）。烟雾持续 1 分钟，或直到被强风吹散。梦魇、梦魇骑手、不在呼吸或不会呼吸的生物，以及免疫毒素的生物不受该灵光的恶心效果影响，但不免疫隐蔽

Activate R Interact

Trigger You take damage from a hostile source.

This smoke is thick and black. When you take damage, you can break the vial and unleash the smoke. The smoke fills a @Template[type:burst|distance:15]{15-foot radius burst} centered on one corner of your space. All creatures within that area are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, and all other creatures are concealed to them. Any creature that starts its turn within the smoke becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (@Check[type:fortitude|dc:19] negates). The smoke lasts for 1 minute or until dispersed by a strong wind. Nightmares, nightmare riders, creatures that aren’t breathing or don’t breathe, and creatures immune to poison are unaffected to the aura’s sickened effect but not the concealment

Troll Teeth.name: 巨魔之牙 Troll Teeth
Troll Teeth.description:
这颗牙齿干净而锋利。这颗牙齿可以被制作成一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{怪物精准弹药}。

This tooth is clean and sharp. The tooth can be crafted into a piece of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.qet0RvcIjQJVQNvv]{Monster Precision Ammunition}.

Whirlwind Vial.name: 旋风小瓶 Whirlwind Vial
Whirlwind Vial.description:
启动 2 交互

当你启动这只小瓶时，你打开它并释放出一场元素能量风暴，在你周围卷起一阵旋风。以你为中心 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] 内的区域在1分钟内对进行跨步与飞行的生物而言属于困难地形。具有气（特征）的生物不受影响。

Activate 2 Interact

When you activate this vial, you open it and let out a storm of elemental energy, whipping up a whirlwind around you. The area within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] from you is difficult terrain for Striding and Flying creatures for 1 minute. Creatures with the air trait are unaffected.

Work Coat.name: 工作外套 Work Coat
Work Coat.description:
这件外套的功能等同于一套 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{软垫护甲}，但穿上这件外套需要 3 次交互动作，脱下则需要 1 次交互动作。

This coat functions as a set of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{Padded Armor}, except it takes 3 Interact actions to don the coat and 1 Interact action to remove it.

Standard-Grade Kraken Rawhide Armor.name: 标准级克拉肯生皮护甲 Standard-Grade Kraken Rawhide Armor
Standard-Grade Kraken Rawhide Armor.description:
Harvest 汇编注记：由于自定义材料尚未被支持，此物品代表一件通用的海怪生皮护甲，以及其自动化规则。你可以编辑其细节与特征以匹配你想要的护甲类型，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}。

海怪生皮护甲的穿戴者获得寒冷抗力 10，以及 30 英尺的游泳速度。

制造需求 初始原材料必须包含价值至少 250 gp + 每 负载 25 gp 的海怪生皮。

Harvest Compendium Note: As custom materials are not yet supported, this item represents a generic piece of Kraken Rawhide armor, along with its automated rules. You can edit its details and traits to match the type of armor you want, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]{Leather Armor} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.r0ifJfoz8aqf0mwk]{Breastplate}.

The wearer of kraken rawhide armor has cold resistance 10 and a swim Speed of 30 feet.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include kraken rawhide worth at least 250 gp + 25 gp per Bulk.

Unprocessed Wyvern Venom.name: 未加工的双足飞龙毒液 Unprocessed Wyvern Venom
Unprocessed Wyvern Venom.description:
启动 2 交互

这种毒液呈绿色，夹杂着黄色条纹。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[5d6[poison]] 伤害（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[6d6[poison]] 伤害（1 轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[8d6[poison]] 伤害（1 轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This venom is green with streaks of yellow.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[5d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[6d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[8d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Bone Javelin.name: 骨标枪 Bone Javelin
Bone Javelin.description:
这柄标枪由纯骨制成，并嗡鸣着强大的魔法能量。这把武器为+2 强力强袭，在成功命中时额外造成2d6虚体伤害，并且其射程增量为60英尺，而非标准的30英尺。

一旦它被用来攻击一名生物，这柄骨标枪便会失去其特性并变成一柄普通标枪。

This javelin is made of pure bone and hums with potent magical energy. The weapon is a +2 greater striking, it deals an additional 2d6 void damage on a successful hit, and it has a range increment of 60 feet instead of the standard 30 feet.

Once it has been used to attack a creature, the bone javelin loses its properties and becomes a normal javelin.

Unicorn Horn.name: 独角兽之角 Unicorn Horn
Unicorn Horn.description:
这根角由一种被称为独角兽角质的稀有材料制成。这根角可以被制作成一根@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.1h3qJmYwJtO33Tzm]{独角兽角质法杖}。

This horn is made of a rare material known as alicorn. The horn can be crafted into an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.1h3qJmYwJtO33Tzm]{Alicorn Staff}.

Mangled Marilith Breastplate.name: 畸伤马里利斯胸甲 Mangled Marilith Breastplate
Mangled Marilith Breastplate.description:
这副胸甲制作精良，但无法使用。该胸甲可以被制作成一顶@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.uFohi5Q0TSOjXAAZ]{命令头盔}。

This breastplate is well made, but unusable. The breastplate can be crafted into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.uFohi5Q0TSOjXAAZ]{Helm of Command}.
